body:
| | | Friend, _I don’t have anywhere else to turn._ You are one of my top supporters. You’ve always watched my back and helped me in every battle. Now, I need you more than ever. I’m in a critical fight to save Michigan from the grasp of the next Gavin Newsom-style socialist. **A recent poll shows us trailing the Democrat front-runner by 0.5%. ** Now the good news is that this puts us well within the margin of error. We’re still in striking distance. The bad news is we’re STILL BEHIND, and can’t afford to stay there. **We need a surge of support to put us over the edge so we can start going on OFFENSE against the Democrat socialists. ** I can't do that alone. I’m going to need your help. [**_That is why I am setting an emergency fundraising goal of $25,000 before we end this month._**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=38660bc283dd46048f27782506801303&_e=_Us7aRAWNgtaw7MxIme0xOsoLrdkS1dc6lDx7Q-iaADzYNbvbVxJttVsCwk6GKvk862E3lgHragNUWw-nMjYeqT6yiQNyKnIzdwvrpa4ZV8q2RVyxbFgjOOfCLRDUj-VDJINKEHUtkC5swD4cLR1Bz9V6-8OtT-a7qkiCSWkut_PaAnz_1PbHelS0ttXsZ9rWVgFfil38M9d2E_iX0A0dGHt-oxgC1SwyRxG8SOEeDgfckidvYZascAqDK3m0bo1Qg-9HJImRkjKfovZCPSuZ_-BKN8MUo-mG7ILIzeuTrp4rZnxdY6roFuSwFPt7xX6MR8W44QCfhTYhme1uRryrEz6WjedJ41Bn7NtU30DyoNTVbQXt0-1xz1jnmXUVDcQbXqPe91QssUPpFBAcTzd6KLvuHSctpVLCCcTrgOo5fo%3D) **Will you please contribute now to help us meet this urgent goal?**

name: This is sick
subject: They’re putting the Confederacy back on a pedestal.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
I wish I were making this up.
The National Park Service just announced that it’s restoring and reinstalling a statue of Confederate general and suspected KKK leader Albert Pike . The same statue that Black Lives Matter protestors pulled down and set on fire in 2020 — because it stood as a monument to white supremacy in the heart of our nation's capital.
And what’s their excuse?
“The restoration aligns with federal responsibilities under historic preservation law...”
Funny. Because the same federal government that claims it has to reinstall a Confederate war criminal is the one that just erased Donald Trump from the Smithsonian’s presidential impeachment exhibit. LIKE??? COME ON!!!
So let’s be real: this is not about “preservation.”
This is about glorifying hate and whitewashing history.
It’s a reminder that Trump’s second term is not just about enacting far-right policies — it’s about rebranding America in his image. They are literally resurrecting monuments to slavery while banning books, silencing dissent, and trying to gerrymander the future.
We will not stand for it.
We will not be silent.
And we will not let them keep rewriting our story.
If you’re with me in rejecting this revisionist, Confederate-loving nonsense — chip in to help us fight back and take our country back:
👉 CHIP IN TO THE FIGHT TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Let’s tear down more than just statues.
Let’s tear down the system that keeps putting them up.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin
Texas’s 18th Congressional District
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/29828EEA-D82D-4108-A24F-779E47077C54.png]

name: STAND WITH TEXAS! (via SAEF)
subject: Trump is trying to RIG the midterms.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Republican Policy 101: If you can’t win, cheat.
| Folks, this is Republican Policy 101: **_If you can’t win, cheat._** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-texas/?source=VPP_20250805_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=20813%2E878179%2EJv7aZQ) | [ADD MY NAME: SAVE TEXAS FROM MAGA REDISTRICTING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-texas/?source=VPP_20250805_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=20813%2E878179%2EJv7aZQ)
---
**This is one of the most UNABASHED attempts at a power grab that we’ve EVER seen.**

_Thankfully, Governor Gavin Newsom is fighting back:_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-texas/?source=VPP_20250805_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=20813%2E878179%2EJv7aZQ)
[**Instead of changing their policies, Republicans are trying to change the maps. That’s why we’re URGENTLY rounding up Democrats who will join Gavin Newsom in this must win fight to protect not _just_ Texas, but our democracy at LARGE. Will you add your name to stand with Texas and STOP their redistricting steal? We need 15,000 signatures by midnight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-texas/?source=VPP_20250805_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=20813%2E878179%2EJv7aZQ)
[ADD MY NAME: SAVE TEXAS FROM MAGA REDISTRICTING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-texas/?source=VPP_20250805_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=10&akid=20813%2E878179%2EJv7aZQ)
---
We need all hands on deck.

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20813%2E878179%2EJv7aZQ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20813%2E878179%2EJv7aZQ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20813%2E878179%2EJv7aZQ) to request fewer emails. name: Team WFP
subject: Add your name: Thank Texas Democrats for holding the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Trump’s latest attempted power grab is in full swing. | | | Trump’s latest attempted power grab is in full swing, Peter. Republicans in Texas called a special legislative session this week to try and steal five congressional seats for Trump, instead of prioritizing the needs of working families in Texas who are dealing with rising costs and the aftermath of the unprecedented floods just one month ago. Trump and Republicans _know_ that voters are rejecting their agenda. But they’ll stop at nothing to try and cling to power in the midterms, even if it means thwarting the will of the voters and threatening elected officials. It all amounts to nothing less than an attempted coup. **But Texas Democrats aren’t rolling over.** In a courageous move, they broke quorum and left the state in order to block this blatant abuse of power — even as Gov. Abbott threatens to have them arrested, prosecuted, and removed from office. **These state legislators are doing everything they can to stand up for their own constituents, and for all of us.** They are risking _everything_ to oppose aspiring monarchs like Trump and Abbott. Let’s show them that we have their backs today and in the days ahead. [**Sign our thank you card today. Let’s give courageous Texas House Democrats the support they need to keep up this fight, and send a message that we won’t let these extremists rig our elections.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKNLGpiR8kOXONBw5-4WsJIgGqY4WIKJPc0aNAyfGWt-MV0TUyca_FRZZWilZCfGlXkWs2A6waMnyEHQHK1xwAYxLk_XWHA74ybbgt7C-QOFUho1O0v3zluCJG9Zy6TGWOzqUH-G42RjLIn2NOlkql2v3GIHWK-BQFlvgMk_wS1saSjO_M8RQQPjBVlLKNgnxOQ6_YHI_P4xullINgvM-C0Zio3_N_tL6rhM1LQuMiI6y60umY7h4PtcQ2y7evJt_4JeTfptbG0jYEb0Rlt83QCJvMp3l3UdIWta57qeataWTxiXhdX1KtqnfJPlXsPay8409Nxnno1qRFBmc2dtVeytW5v_p5JRzjDMpEsyqXGfg/4it/M0gRknBsRkiGpIFwuv4GZA/h0/h001.jKvtEwm6JuNDCqxB-zh53HJeqclhXFZKPqw1ferutvI) **[Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKNLGpiR8kOXONBw5-4WsJIgGqY4WIKJPc0aNAyfGWt-MV0TUyca_FRZZWilZCfGlXkWs2A6waMnyEHQHK1xwAYxLk_XWHA74ybbgt7C-QOFUho1O0v3zluCJG9Zy6TGWOzqUH-G42RjLIn2NOlkql2ykQwsRk5ddHK_wXl_ZyvDccSRBndNuzTRdjeNd6poNhcq8p4AFhvSvMwJk8_2t9MqY-GTRdtFv9OKVdfgS_RAvJxtMWr5Mncx0lTMD7xvQTx0R2egBYW6lAlq9cZ7NtBFurZpZY2l9rb8ZGefY95CFx5pv8LmsOG2P13CzbJQcJyD0vOsW1pFnOPhjMfs5GpOuZR7UhrwBasgQ74ilIzDQ/4it/M0gRknBsRkiGpIFwuv4GZA/h1/h001.p3bOJ8cC3TNXxwVQwwzm3qviJkw8Or35vKmRrzPKMDo)** Peter, this is NOT an isolated threat. All 50 states should be on high alert. Right now, Trump, Abbott, and their cronies are testing the waters. Rigging elections, eroding voting rights, silencing Democratic voters, and creating a stranglehold on Congress are their long-term goals. And Texas is the first test. If we don’t hold the line here, it will set a dangerous precedent that other Republican-controlled states will be sure to follow. [**We need to show Trump, Abbott, and Republicans everywhere that we won’t back down. Show your support for the Texas House Democrats by signing your name today, and take a stand for democracy.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKNLGpiR8kOXONBw5-4WsJIgGqY4WIKJPc0aNAyfGWt-MV0TUyca_FRZZWilZCfGlXkWs2A6waMnyEHQHK1xwAYxLk_XWHA74ybbgt7C-QOFUho1O0v3zluCJG9Zy6TGWOzqUH-G42RjLIn2NOlkql2YnT6VheZV5Z_YgFTJI2QeXSKTmCy-sT4bx9BjSAKZfWz15wAKD0U4EzfTAJqudKm5o-7QrpZHw8Qlx1qvIv4LTnYWtpJhcPGPIrqXpCYHMxCI-vBVt9Ypz221HcR6-P-vVr_-JBRmwpYC_JRTb4seElh5ZOYOhhx52DzJTofeAb3jAnusapCVz86HM6puKJ2YczrjgyK1iAw6-hyNjdMCg/4it/M0gRknBsRkiGpIFwuv4GZA/h2/h001.9v2U3SO9UuFMwNheoeGsbkqr8JEQRlhvxXp61gwIOnU) We’ll share your signatures and notes with Texas House Democrats. clean_body: Trump’s latest attempted power grab is in full swing. | | | Trump’s latest attempted power grab is in full swing, Peter. Republicans in Texas called a special legislative session this week to try and steal five congressional seats for Trump, instead of prioritizing the needs of working families in Texas who are dealing with rising costs and the aftermath of the unprecedented floods just one month ago. Trump and Republicans know that voters are rejecting their agenda. But they’ll stop at nothing to try and cling to power in the midterms, even if it means thwarting the will of the voters and threatening elected officials. It all amounts to nothing less than an attempted coup. But Texas Democrats aren’t rolling over. In a courageous move, they broke quorum and left the state in order to block this blatant abuse of power — even as Gov. Abbott threatens to have them arrested, prosecuted, and removed from office. These state legislators are doing everything they can to stand up for their own constituents, and for all of us. They are risking everything to oppose aspiring monarchs like Trump and Abbott. Let’s show them that we have their backs today and in the days ahead. Peter, this is NOT an isolated threat. All 50 states should be on high alert. Right now, Trump, Abbott, and their cronies are testing the waters. Rigging elections, eroding voting rights, silencing Democratic voters, and creating a stranglehold on Congress are their long-term goals. And Texas is the first test. If we don’t hold the line here, it will set a dangerous precedent that other Republican-controlled states will be sure to follow. We’ll share your signatures and notes with Texas House Democrats. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Lily Tang Williams for Congress
subject: FIRST QUARTER REPORT (correct reply address)
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/first-quarter-report-lily-in-the-news-upcoming-events-18046124?e=c338950e03)

| |

| |
# FIRST QUARTER REPORT, LILY IN THE NEWS, UPCOMING EVENTS
First Quarter Fundraising Report Thanks to my donors, my campaign raised $253,145 with cash on hand of $318,084 during the quarter, ending June 30, 2025. My opponent, Rep. Maggie Goodlander (D), raised four times more, with $762,996 cash on hand. Of course, she has Soros’, Clinton’s, and Obama’s cash because of her husband, Jake Sullivan, who was National Security Advisor under President Biden. Most of my donors are small donors from New Hampshire and across the country - link here at [FEC New Hampshire](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=a2e71afa3f&e=c338950e03). I appreciate your contribution from the bottom of my heart, and I am counting on your continued support. Please consider signing up with a monthly contribution at _[www.lilytangwilliams.com](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=d50a2cd1cf&e=c338950e03)_. The mailing address for checks is: Lily4Congress Committee PO Box 406 Weare, NH 03281 Lily in the News I was recently interviewed by Fox Business, Blaze, and Tomi Lahren on her Fearless podcast. You can read about me in the news and watch the interview on my website: _[Campaign Blog - Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=063789cd8c&e=c338950e03)_ I continue to make a huge impact on X with viral short videos like this one on socialism (1.7 million views). Please share and follow me on X: _[https://x.com/i/status/1947767021954908388](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=b43541789a&e=c338950e03)
[https://x.com/i/status/1947087781534335170](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=8f16d5b875&e=c338950e03)_ (734K views on Chinese foothold in Nashua) Upcoming Events **8/9 – Epsom Old Home Day**
PARADE ONLY
_Parade at 9:00 AM; parade lineup at 8:30 AM Webster Park, Epsom_ _****_

**8/12 – Nashua Alderman Meeting – 7:30 Pm**
Nashua City Hall
229 Main Street, Nashua, NH Aldermanic Chambers, located on the 2nd floor
_Come voice your concern regarding the recent purchase by Chinese beverage company, Nongfu Spring, of a critical site impacting Nashua’s Pennichuck water system. (Nongfu Spring, the largest Chinese bottled water company, owned by the richest man in China, Zhong Shanshan, purchased the site in Nashua on January 31, 2025, for $67 million, over four times the appraised value at $15 million, for a beverage plant that will draw significant water from Nashua’s Pennichuck water system. The plant site borders Pennichuck Creek upstream of Pennichuck Water Works critical infrastructure, is in the flight path of Nashua Airport, and is also near the Nashua FAA Control Center and defense contractors such as BAE.)_ **8/16 – Dunbarton Old Home Day – 10:00 AM – 4:00 Pm**
_Parade at 10:00 AM; Parade lineup at ~9:00 Am_ **8/23 – Pembroke/Allenstown Old Home Day – 11:00 AM – 5:00 PM** We are actively recruiting volunteers for my exciting campaign in NH02. If you are interested in helping, please sign up here to be a Team Lily member: _[Volunteer – Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=c1e9d1a5f3&e=c338950e03)_
In Liberty,

*Source: _China’s Richest Man Buying Water Supply of New Hampshire Town Sparks Alarm –_ [Newsweek](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=07c8eaa719&e=c338950e03)

name: Governor Kathy Hochul
subject: The gloves are off.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Team — This is Governor Kathy Hochul. Right now, Texas Republicans are rewriting the rules to give themselves an advantage. But I have a news flash for Republicans in Texas: **_This is no longer the Wild West._** We're not going to tolerate our democracy being stolen by a bunch of self-serving politicians. **Americans don't want a system that's stacked against them. They believe in fairness — it's fundamental.** That is why I welcomed the courageous Democratic Texas legislators to the New York State Capitol. These leaders have taken a bold stand against extreme Republican efforts to gerrymander their state to silence the voices of millions, especially Black and Latino communities in Texas. [**_Join me and Kirsten Gillibrand in fighting back against Republicans’ attempts to silence our voices and erode our democracy. Split a donation today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112807529/561715508/-2121549402?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.05_Kathy-Hochul-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFjYWE0NS02MTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2sjJpgzFMjRwygS8FupQ3kD90e8bSCKwhDhqKo67dA=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and Kathy Hochul will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112807530/561715509/-2121549402?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.05_Kathy-Hochul-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFjYWE0NS02MTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2sjJpgzFMjRwygS8FupQ3kD90e8bSCKwhDhqKo67dA=)

History will judge us and how we respond to this moment.
Republicans are willing to rewrite these rules to give themselves an advantage.
**The gloves are off, and I say, bring it on.**
Across the country, our democracy is under attack by Republicans who want to make it harder for people to be heard. **But we won’t go down without a fight.**
[**_Please chip in to Kirsten Gillibrand and my work to fight back against these anti-democratic schemes. The more of us who join this movement, the harder it is for anyone to silence our voices._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112807535/561715514/-2121549402?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.05_Kathy-Hochul-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFjYWE0NS02MTcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2sjJpgzFMjRwygS8FupQ3kD90e8bSCKwhDhqKo67dA=)
Democracy is not a spectator sport — it’s up to all of us to protect it. I won’t back down, and neither should you.
Thank you for standing with me and with those fighting on the frontlines in Texas.
Ever Upward,
Governor Kathy Hochul

This coalition is a clear sign of the momentum we’re building – but now I need your name alongside theirs to show the strength of this grassroots movement.
[**Will you add your name alongside these local leaders and organizations to endorse my campaign and help flip CA-22?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112807591/561720180/1057587532?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU0NmYxNzQtNjM3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A0lqb7t8k4qNTRZry5CG63k_zrq6xEhTLWutz7FmZlw=&emci=aef437b6-0572-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0e46f174-6372-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1120212)

He’s counting on people staying quiet. On no one standing up to him. But our growing coalition is proof that he’s wrong.

name: Powered by People
subject: Texas Democrats broke quorum. Because they had to.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Texas Republicans are trying to rig our congressional map — drawing districts that silence voters in an attempt to take five Democratic-held seats and tighten their grip on power.
In response, **Texas Democrats are showing real courage by breaking quorum to stop this attack on fair representation,** even as they face threats of fines, removal from office, and retaliation from Governor Abbott.
They know the stakes: countless Texans could lose their voice in our democracy if these maps are allowed to go through.
This is what it looks like to fight for democracy, even when the cost is high.
We can’t let them stand alone.
[**Can you chip in $3 to show these courageous Democrats that we have their backs and keep up the fight?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250805-3._JO9Ec&refcode=ema20250805-240283&t=2&akid=240283%2E444211%2EB9E2QO)

name: Case Dixon
subject: Campaign Update – Thank You
body:
Hey everyone,
I just wanted to drop in and give you a quick update on how the campaign is going.
Wednesday through Friday, I was in Nashville for the Young Republicans National Convention, networking and building connections that I hope will help advance this campaign.
Right after, I drove down to Montgomery for the Alabama GOP candidate reception and the state executive meetings the following day—where I had the chance to meet some of you reading this now!
The response to the campaign so far has been incredibly encouraging. I’m grateful for the support, the conversations, and the momentum we’re building together. Without y’all, none of this would be possible.
To those who’ve already donated, volunteered, or offered encouragement—thank you. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.
If you haven’t yet contributed, I’d ask you to consider doing so if you believe in the cause we’re fighting for: restoring fiscal sanity, ending corruption-as-usual in Washington, and defending liberty—even from the threats that sometimes come from within our own party. Every dollar helps us reach more people with that message. [ Donate or Volunteer HERE](https://dixonforuscongress.com/ "https://dixonforuscongress.com/")
We’ve also just announced and scheduled a **town hall at the Albert L. Scott Library in Alabaster on Thursday, August 28th at 6:30 PM** , and I would love for you to attend. Bring a friend! It’ll be a great opportunity to hear more about my platform and ask any questions you may have. RSVP on Facebook [ HERE](https://www.facebook.com/events/1135158971810036 "https://www.facebook.com/events/1135158971810036")
Please keep spreading the word. Forward this email to three friends, family members, or neighbors and encourage them to sign up for updates.
I’ll also begin sending more frequent updates moving forward to keep you in the loop on where I’ve been, what we’re doing, and how you can stay involved.
Also, if you missed it, my latest op-ed, **“Fake Conservatives, Real Damage,”** was published Saturday night by 1819 News. It lays out exactly why this fight matters—and what’s at stake. You can read it [ HERE](https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-fake-conservatives-real-damage "https://1819news.com/news/item/case-dixon-fake-conservatives-real-damage")
I know I mentioned it in the last email, but if you haven't had a chance to watch our launch video yet, you can check it out [ HERE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pl9eU_z16KI "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pl9eU_z16KI")
Lastly, I’d ask that you continue to keep me and this campaign in your prayers.

Sincerely,
**Case Dixon **
Dixon for Congress
(205) 282-9103
615 Brooklane Dr. #3218
Hueytown, AL 35023-2508
DIXONFORUSCONGRESS.COM

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Legacy media lost trust. Help replace it.
body:
**Americans deserve news without spin. Invest in the solution.**

| | |
---
| | |
# WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 6, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Legacy media has failed America. Only **31% of Americans** said they trust the mainstream news. Spin, bias, and hidden agendas have driven millions of people to simply tune out, tired of being misled by outlets that put profit and politics ahead of the truth. At _The Flyover_ , we're proving there's a better way. And you now have an opportunity to [invest as we grow it](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0mv3v97gb8qu7j86ped3bg3guojgrmk1dm81980_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5jm6oj4cph2bs). In just two years, we've built a community of **2.5 million loyal readers** who turn to _The Flyover_ for honest, fact-based news they can count on. With **611% year-over-year revenue growth** and engagement metrics that leave legacy outlets in the dust, we've shown there's real demand for news that respects readers instead of manipulating them. There are still an estimated **70 million Americans** out there looking for news like ours. We have a huge opportunity to meet that demand over the next few years. _The Flyover_ is passionate about making media more trustworthy, and we want to give you the chance to participate. name: American Action News
subject: Legacy media lost trust. Help replace it.
body:
**Americans deserve news without spin. Invest in the solution.**

| | |
---
| | |
# WEDNESDAY, AUGUST 6, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Legacy media has failed America. Only **31% of Americans** said they trust the mainstream news. Spin, bias, and hidden agendas have driven millions of people to simply tune out, tired of being misled by outlets that put profit and politics ahead of the truth. At _The Flyover_ , we're proving there's a better way. And you now have an opportunity to [invest as we grow it](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z680vgmdmq7leu6hq605t2fvkgoqel39n2bq6m7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1c5jm1o34cjh2bs). In just two years, we've built a community of **2.5 million loyal readers** who turn to _The Flyover_ for honest, fact-based news they can count on. With **611% year-over-year revenue growth** and engagement metrics that leave legacy outlets in the dust, we've shown there's real demand for news that respects readers instead of manipulating them. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GwkhQdQe2Ow8q0QPqj_joQ~~/AARclBA~/3sEJliY46WkfgLVADUIWMBe_GPG6VomGdUyPu0U6XrcjVROfnUc2l5IORF_FoMt4yEGuW1fPc4vvbeOONZ-sYU0ZQ_5Ch0oJqddhmHMV8wubDUe5Ikok_HS5C2yNd-Tzb2LtnV9yYqq8Iu8No2AkY-e7g95e7D1uRscZAzDki1ljyHM4Rgby5nTIwRW9EK6CRbdN5ifQ-1NokuFHYwU0lPyGSVEi8ckDpYJG3UQB5i9kxO4WS2hdICazl-fa4cnGvVcBje7G-tcZwU7_bm09K-MBBzg3CXB0lftwUw-zkxZF9mDzuCl19UpnmrmN_2Pq_czyE0rL_ENZBjD1_NJSDQ~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GwkhQdQe2Ow8q0QPqj_joQ~~/AARclBA~/3sEJliY46WkfgLVADUIWMBe_GPG6VomGdUyPu0U6XrcjVROfnUc2l5IORF_FoMt4yEGuW1fPc4vvbeOONZ-sYU0ZQ_5Ch0oJqddhmHMV8wubDUe5Ikok_HS5C2yNd-Tzb2LtnV9yYqq8Iu8No2AkY-e7g95e7D1uRscZAzDki1ljyHM4Rgby5nTIwRW9EK6CRbdN5ifQ-1NokuFHYwU0lPyGSVEi8ckDpYJG3UQB5i9kxO4WS2hdICazl-fa4cnGvVcBje7G-tcZwU7_bm09K-MBBzg3CXB0lftwUw-zkxZF9mDzuCl19UpnmrmN_2Pq_czyE0rL_ENZBjD1_NJSDQ~~) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GwkhQdQe2Ow8q0QPqj_joQ~~/AARclBA~/3sEJliY46WkfgLVADUIWMBe_GPG6VomGdUyPu0U6XrcjVROfnUc2l5IORF_FoMt4yEGuW1fPc4vvbeOONZ-sYU0ZQ_5Ch0oJqddhmHMV8wubDUe5Ikok_HS5C2yNd-Tzb2LtnV9yYqq8Iu8No2AkY-e7g95e7D1uRscZAzDki1ljyHM4Rgby5nTIwRW9EK6CRbdN5ifQ-1NokuFHYwU0lPyGSVEi8ckDpYJG3UQB5i9kxO4WS2hdICazl-fa4cnGvVcBje7G-tcZwU7_bm09K-MBBzg3CXB0lftwUw-zkxZF9mDzuCl19UpnmrmN_2Pq_czyE0rL_ENZBjD1_NJSDQ~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GwkhQdQe2Ow8q0QPqj_joQ~~/AARclBA~/3sEJliY46WkfgLVADUIWMBe_GPG6VomGdUyPu0U6XrcjVROfnUc2l5IORF_FoMt4yEGuW1fPc4vvbeOONZ-sYU0ZQ_5Ch0oJqddhmHMV8wubDUe5Ikok_HS5C2yNd-Tzb2LtnV9yYqq8Iu8No2AkY-e7g95e7D1uRscZAzDki1ljyHM4Rgby5nTIwRW9EK6CRbdN5ifQ-1NokuFHYwU0lPyGSVEi8ckDpYJG3UQB5i9kxO4WS2hdICazl-fa4cnGvVcBje7G-tcZwU7_bm09K-MBBzg3CXB0lftwUw-zkxZF9mDzuCl19UpnmrmN_2Pq_czyE0rL_ENZBjD1_NJSDQ~~)**

name: The Flyover
subject: Epstein Subpoenas, AI Vaccines, and Blackberry Jack
body:
The House Oversight Committee, led by Chair James Comer (R-Ky.), has [subpoenaed Bill and Hillary Clinton](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAUhE8DnSPMn3FBsY27bLulhc0jvAiDZUii3H7lFHuB7UYa6dN883Odrw4T5tu328C2UOYMr5qgNThm2GsDzPWx7AWyqw6fbl0xw8wZVx0zHdOzd5jes6TeBgAOgoLtByXlIIdR0mhlWNniR-YWJrwalXG90jqI1Y0hcK4p2pPGDNM9Y1rwi1pE8CMz2mjTD_1AJAOPrRyXe8HcIoT0Lk84LmvZaLKxtb0S8UX4RPjUIkRM6ewIn2LZ4BT6xEcFwiclhVZGdSeh4i22bncZUvdn2flyJ3yih_X7C1PCqs8Jt83hB0vbv356Wv4bAAD__75AfBo), former FBI directors, and six former U.S. attorneys general as part of its investigation into the federal handling of Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAMgJ8mbJyCAwkMGSqd2P6uHSOT-DhXIXAkHLq3r2gr9QG62tYnf9-PL_eFHDnN33EhWx6rS3TmSKXQ7mjLhTjlY9pWSpiR3-g9J3IgoatlX0vtAnL8uLYK9kEEpCqyjena1rRmaKunbXulsJMgNfVA1EoDNMjJwNRQMH6o2F402UvdSKkV3LpJPcIge93rvjGNEa2kwGXdbz9XTuVJj_hZ37Tf_LpU0T5L2bJQ3wSMAsbzPG_TjiEHwpivEwEj-peAMWIKnGahxqMsLq_H7kmo-z9gHQoK0Nd2ocDHItQ9cN4ifv6OPS4b8pyEus-UaMdYo3_9KVFfGgK0dxyEujdygK7abdhOjpGzvjzmBTn-_rv8V-y3hV8BAAD__197kiw) | |
# Wednesday, August 6, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1926, swimmer Gertrude Ederle, the “Queen of the Waves,” became the [first woman to swim across the English Channel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOpSAQBeCn0Y4bRAQtKLa53b_tlmaUUWeDYGDU3LffeF9h65mcfOf8-Rl_gALF9Tfs6HhJY8S7BGTGPOJRGCmWczoSRihAF8wzRRyVVJ2QvZBm9EDhM-rauwVRYVuja2yntdV20PXmYLBqwX5WYAwYaWyHTeeN1n6Y2tbamtyTJntpGilNq17d1C5-kL3pTd_YxlZaoidO-fU3UeQNl_BJF-bXnPY6uI35KFX7q1LvSr0vigwrPi2-suepUu8UBZzrWVgY0QzKiBUz59OjQI85oJhwhh0FbygWyoXFnXaIgpMoN-0C5pxK-Z4xroHKJuYNYsRQqXednT9uCoGKebTrDhS-Ov6vSS-n_gUAAP__WMeMmQ). The 20-year-old American was covered entirely in grease for her 14.5-hour swim, which set a new record for both men and women. In today’s _Wisdom Wednesday_ , we’re exploring how [friendships across generations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO4yAQBOCnwZ0jDBicguIad7n2SmttlnhPGCzYJMrbn3yv8NcjzaeZP4_lAZQoP3_DgZ5jWTJ-WkJmrAuejZFye61nwQwN6A3bRhkXJdXYy6mXdglA6buYLviIqFB36Ac3GuOMu5tu93rS0YJZNxsBNTin3KAMDCEAjlLeO_JXm5ykHaS0Wt3GVcdwl5Od7DS4wQkjMRCXevtbKPOOMX3LG-ttK0eX_M58NqF_CTULNWfa8JpwhULN--uATPwVaqbMWJ-YsQJTyZD6WAlzaDudrV8xYyRuQs1d9eH8UErU7IU_D6D0H-MfPfT26l8AAAD__9obfA4), like those between Gen Z and Boomers, can improve your well-being. Got a friend from a different age group? Hit reply and tell us how you met. Save up to 80% on your favorite brands when you sign up with today's sponsor, [Brad's Deals](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAMgJ8mbJyCAwkMGSqd2P6uHSOT-DhXIXAkHLq3r2gr9QG62tYnf9-PL_eFHDnN33EhWx6rS3TmSKXQ7mjLhTjlY9pWSpiR3-g9J3IgoatlX0vtAnL8uLYK9kEEpCqyjena1rRmaKunbXulsJMgNfVA1EoDNMjJwNRQMH6o2F402UvdSKkV3LpJPcIge93rvjGNEa2kwGXdbz9XTuVJj_hZ37Tf_LpU0T5L2bJQ3wSMAsbzPG_TjiEHwpivEwEj-peAMWIKnGahxqMsLq_H7kmo-z9gHQoK0Nd2ocDHItQ9cN4ifv6OPS4b8pyEus-UaMdYo3_9KVFfGgK0dxyEujdygK7abdhOjpGzvjzmBTn-_rv8V-y3hV8BAAD__197kiw).
|
---
## House Subpoenas Clintons, DOJ in Epstein Probe
The House Oversight Committee, led by Chair James Comer (R-Ky.), has [subpoenaed Bill and Hillary Clinton](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAUhE8DnSPMn3FBsY27bLulhc0jvAiDZUii3H7lFHuB7UYa6dN883Odrw4T5tu328C2UOYMr5qgNThm2GsDzPWx7AWyqw6fbl0xw8wZVx0zHdOzd5jes6TeBgAOgoLtByXlIIdR0mhlWNniR-YWJrwalXG90jqI1Y0hcK4p2pPGDNM9Y1rwi1pE8CMz2mjTD_1AJAOPrRyXe8HcIoT0Lk84LmvZaLKxtb0S8UX4RPjUIkRM6ewIn2LZ4BT6xEcFwiclhVZGdSeh4i22bncZUvdn2flyJ3yih_X7C1PCqs8Jt83hB0vbv356Wv4bAAD__75AfBo), former FBI directors, and six former U.S. attorneys general as part of its investigation into the federal handling of Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell. The bipartisan-backed effort also demands full, unredacted Epstein records from the Justice Department by Aug. 19. [Depositions are scheduled](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOrCAQRb8Gd3QAEXXB4m3c9dvO0qAUbXUQDNB2_PsJnZkvmE2lklu5qXO-7vPdoMfw-G920MXFOcA7eygF0gxHLoAhv5YjQjDZ4GnWFQPMgomOsoEyNVuD_pplY7UDENA2oHnfSdnLfpTNpjvGYQE-CgGrHJnprFuskkbxDqDteYO6trGBKc6YasWtW1pnRzaoQQ285z2RDCyWmG7PiKFs4PwVT0i3Ne6N11spRybtPyImIqZwHTGXGhEx1WIiJjbUUbdXppWPiGlB76kJlm7ovUkXXT2GEgN1Me2QqHnkT-wWpBYTrCWmTH9VgK139AnOJbjojyhaIBfcY7iImJqk7fFG7zGrivDYDfrPy-VPnk8tvgMAAP__FiOTDA) to begin Aug. 18 and run through mid-October. Hillary Clinton has been asked to appear on Oct. 9, while Bill Clinton is set for Oct. 14. Comer says the inquiry could aid in reforms to federal sex trafficking laws and the use of plea deals in such cases. Maxwell’s deposition is delayed pending a Supreme Court appeal.
## US Races to Put Nuclear Reactor on Moon
NASA is fast-tracking plans to place a [nuclear reactor on the Moon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQRk9jOiP_8Fu4IFpRRNo0KbZEgz0sjoyNbLNobx-RK6QcPWn0vve4T3ewzvrnF2yo8hImj2dymDPGCfeU0fp0zHtADwnsC7S2HifBRE1ZR1kzGbDuPVWFUQuiQFmg4m1dVW3V9lWxqgU4LHxmGnuOAD320sy8nmeQUPUNK6y6vrGONZyxRoqynuVietY1XdPxlrekYmhsDrH8CdbnFRf3Di-MpQ5b4dSa856IHIgYiRjP8yy35C9GxIieHomI8Rp1wRCduU5IQHOg-5GpP7RDiDQi6BwiDZ7mFekWgqfzmwomGT0S3dBYIGKESIeBfz4GfSNyDNoaIm8fV0A80zfGvYjK7Kd1zqbmUn9uYN2fav5X35cSvwEAAP__SLOPUQ) by 2030, aiming to power future lunar bases and outpace rival efforts by China and Russia. Acting NASA Administrator Sean Duffy [issued a directive](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOnCAURp8GdxgEFP4FiyaNu2m669IgXpzbIBi4zmTevrGv8K-_5Ms5589jeXhMmPdf_gBHsSwZ3i0BEdQFzkaAuV3rWSD75vHlQ8AMixRy5MJyMS2bx_RZdLe5CCBBdeAGM2pttPnS3dMpqVYxqaghAghj7BjsOFgRrQneRNuhu9-EFdMgxKRkP64qbl_CTnaygxkM0wI2pFL7vwUzPSGmT3lB7UM5uuSeRGdj6geTM5OzX8Nt0O_lnpmcf5eEhKExOV-NnxfxfIUEvvIKPlCpjR-lZB7KlakiNO4DYd75Lczk3KjUD1Mzbkz9HKRWRkqluuq2840pYZtuwP3wmP4D0bcqvpz8FwAA___Y4IZV) calling for the deployment of fission surface power systems, citing national security and the risk that other nations could establish territorial “keep-out zones.” The proposed reactor would generate at least 100 kilowatts—enough to sustain operations during the Moon’s two-week-long nights, when solar power fails.
## How US Jobs Have Changed Since 2002
A new data visualization shows [how the jobs held by Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNqPHwxhn8NCFLV07IoMf4UWOjbCDlX59lfYTul5d3Xt0vq7T1bLncPu0DzJ5jVOgkjzlTMdEe8rEIT3nPVKwyfJpl4UDTQjYC9AC1OQs-9cka2dWIqSuJtMOvZSDHC6y3oxcoJ1pIFC9BtvqweoW5hkUUqdkhzWb9xpoUC2A6rDp5251F9BKK90O7VBJIMc5Hs09csgbrf4VTzqaJT5qb7ac91R1HxWOFY6llObk9LR-sTtn6znld7HC8S_mb3Jii0U8RRL3OCeRNl4zOTFTLkRBIAAKG5xAQFnhWB_G7YW956TeMLeHZf97nv9l7DT4EwAA__9M3H8W) have shifted over the past two decades. Office and administrative roles dropped from 18% of the workforce in 2002 to just 12% in 2024, as automation replaced clerical tasks. Meanwhile, food service rose from 8% to 9%, transport and logistics climbed from 7% to 9%, and healthcare support jumped from 2% to 5%—all driven by rising demand for hands-on, in-person work. Tech, finance, and management each gained about one worker per 100, pointing to a gradual shift toward higher-skill, knowledge-based roles. [See the full chart here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNqPHwxhn8NCFLV07IoMf4UWOjbCDlX59lfYTul5d3Xt0vq7T1bLncPu0DzJ5jVOgkjzlTMdEe8rEIT3nPVKwyfJpl4UDTQjYC9AC1OQs-9cka2dWIqSuJtMOvZSDHC6y3oxcoJ1pIFC9BtvqweoW5hkUUqdkhzWb9xpoUC2A6rDp5251F9BKK90O7VBJIMc5Hs09csgbrf4VTzqaJT5qb7ac91R1HxWOFY6llObk9LR-sTtn6znld7HC8S_mb3Jii0U8RRL3OCeRNl4zOTFTLkRBIAAKG5xAQFnhWB_G7YW956TeMLeHZf97nv9l7DT4EwAA__9M3H8W).
* * *

On this day in 1926, swimmer Gertrude Ederle, the “Queen of the Waves,” became the . The 20-year-old American was covered entirely in grease for her 14.5-hour swim, which set a new record for both men and women. In today’s Wisdom Wednesday , we’re exploring how , like those between Gen Z and Boomers, can improve your well-being. Got a friend from a different age group? Hit reply and tell us how you met. Save up to 80% on your favorite brands when you sign up with today's sponsor, . | House Subpoenas Clintons, DOJ in Epstein Probe The House Oversight Committee, led by Chair James Comer (R-Ky.), has , former FBI directors, and six former U.S. attorneys general as part of its investigation into the federal handling of Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell. The bipartisan-backed effort also demands full, unredacted Epstein records from the Justice Department by Aug. 19. to begin Aug. 18 and run through mid-October. Hillary Clinton has been asked to appear on Oct. 9, while Bill Clinton is set for Oct. 14. Comer says the inquiry could aid in reforms to federal sex trafficking laws and the use of plea deals in such cases. Maxwell’s deposition is delayed pending a Supreme Court appeal. US Races to Put Nuclear Reactor on Moon NASA is fast-tracking plans to place a by 2030, aiming to power future lunar bases and outpace rival efforts by China and Russia. Acting NASA Administrator Sean Duffy calling for the deployment of fission surface power systems, citing national security and the risk that other nations could establish territorial “keep-out zones.” The proposed reactor would generate at least 100 kilowatts—enough to sustain operations during the Moon’s two-week-long nights, when solar power fails. How US Jobs Have Changed Since 2002 A new data visualization shows have shifted over the past two decades. Office and administrative roles dropped from 18% of the workforce in 2002 to just 12% in 2024, as automation replaced clerical tasks. Meanwhile, food service rose from 8% to 9%, transport and logistics climbed from 7% to 9%, and healthcare support jumped from 2% to 5%—all driven by rising demand for hands-on, in-person work. Tech, finance, and management each gained about one worker per 100, pointing to a gradual shift toward higher-skill, knowledge-based roles. . body:
The Left won’t like your answer...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Trump Poised to Remove Noncitizens from Census🚨**BREAKING NEWS:** President Trump is again leading the charge to protect the integrity of our democracy – **this time by ensuring that only U.S. citizens are counted in the official U.S. Census.**
Peter, for far too long, blue states have inflated their political power by counting illegal immigrants in their census totals, gaining extra congressional seats and electoral votes as a result.
_That ends now._
This bold move strikes at the heart of the Democrats’ scheme to manipulate our system and tip the scales in their favor.
This is about restoring fairness, upholding the rule of law, and ensuring that American citizens, **not illegal aliens** , determine our political future.
But make no mistake: the Left is desperate to block this effort, because without inflated census numbers, they’ll lose their power. That’s why we need every Patriot to step up now. **
****[Sign our Official Petition to Remove Illegal Aliens from the U.S. Census:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._mC3Ow)**[ SIGN THE PETITION
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._qGHMppN6wpQ)Don’t let them rig the system any longer. Demand a fair, lawful count now.**_Stand with President Trump and defend the integrity of our elections and the U.S. Census._**
Thank you, Peter,
Conservative News Alerts (via Team Downing)| |

| | | Dear Reader,

Trump won... But the deep state is alive and well...

And they just scored a HUGE win for Jeffrey Epstein’s clients.

After years of hype, the DOJ has officially dropped the Epstein investigation...

And let countless unnamed conspirators off the hook.

But now the deep state has an even [**bigger target**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1949554/VaHR0cHM6Ly9wcm8ubmhzLW5ld3MuY29tL20vMjQ2NTE2NQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDY/LbmNsb29NU0xhaw/gaJMu-A/s4n34646a1a).

[**A secret**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1949554/VaHR0cHM6Ly9wcm8ubmhzLW5ld3MuY29tL20vMjQ2NTE2NQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDY/LbmNsb29NU0xhaw/gaJMu-A/s4n34646a1a) that, if revealed, could cost them hundreds of billions in profit.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1902, civil rights activist and folk artist [Alice Dickerson Montemayor](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu4yAQgOHT4M4WEAy4oNjGXbbd0sIwjkfBEMEkTm6_yrvCu8D_Sf-_63L1mDDf_voDHL23smQ4WwIiqEvYEbYIRwnVU3tCbI9nbb7CIrkce257rpfoMX0W1UW38jiJDpwwo1LGCiG73fGglOSTFaCttZMxZrWjF5PSap0ijB26b4xbroXgQsnB6skL2JS56BBBGqY4RKRSB9qB4O3blj7lBXUI5eiS24kejV3-MDkzOZ_nOVDbfckJMwyl3picd5_jWsqdyRkyVYTG5HyUTHD4T6m9TxigjxjuUFvJXXXxcWJK2PSXvx0e049Gv3v0cvJ_AAAA__-gq3y6) was born in Laredo. She is known for her writings for LULAC’s quarterly magazine and her painted gourds. Public funding for a new San Antonio Spurs arena will go up for a vote this November. See [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2yrCAQRlejGRagohMQvMRsXnpDq4VWqULaanB-dn9rZgt3A993zvm5z3cIMaTtPxxoy2ulOeEzRywFeXZ7wNXjQY6h5At9Pi_OwDhrqXshRyHN7CHE99zV3i7S31SNVg191w2jUrrerQHlnGqxh7VVvVm0c-1o0MhBKbf0tzrYz5gcpVFKqk43o7mBwrUbWuM86qHqJPpQiJuyY8EX5DW-6YHcODrqaPdSzly1_yo9VXrKkCAVSoEYT-LSEG-VnhZ8AQtHVypv8dUQwJhAMHkkcZ0bg8csKIlEDzwWZLFAjFQqPdVs_fkMMYZsPjjbASF-38vfmj2s_g0AAP__3R-D1g) in today's _Roundup_ , and let us know what you think about tax dollars for sports venues in our _Poll_. We're sponsored today by [Miso Robotics](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuunDAQhp8GOpBvgClcRDra7qRNaRl7WEayMbKHvbx9xCbKC6Sd79fM_N-vb_vtMOJ-_-kSGHqt2e7wrBGIoFi_IawBUvbFUT0h1OMs1RWwgomhY7pjow0O49uqNpiFhZm3YPg0KDVpzkW7mRmEXKZhFsscNCyLd9K7Qc8z9wwWplo01zKm2cg540r0epwdh1VNcvQBxNQoBgEpl542IHi5usZ3fkDpfU5tNBvRURv5oxG3Rtxwf0ClPmHNJS-Z0Ncrd0F5OynZms_ioZFfkBzGRozXMEHAMzXy63AYusMV2qHUDY-_3Lt0OLzvn8Q_yDXrFJvsHxHnjuSslFyzQQ2csbaYcDwxRqzj1eJ-Hfw8Tf-n-mHE7wAAAP__1WKUGg), backed by NVIDIA. ## Spurs Arena Funding Goes to Ballot
Bexar County voters will get to weigh in on [public funding for a new Spurs arena](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u5CAMhZ-GdETgcCFTUGyT7m67ZUSCM0GXwAicn3n7VeYVbmNZsuTzfeff9_jtQgzp-ddtaOla8pjwrBGJsIzzGnDxuOW5OKo7-vraS3UFRxDwxUXPhR69C_E9qsbbSfiHbNBK86WU6aWEZrVGdZMyohPKT0KAduiNMRpEB7M23aMJ9n4meqGlFFJB2-uHk7go0-nZIximBPpAubS0IuHl6hLf-cDSznlrol2JXpV1fxgMDIbzPNuf6ug-MhhuGwZDzLOLDIY7isEg-nvc24FpR07u4mv4Qb7kwhOe_CPKXcHk-DNj5ZT5hJcrfM57ojc_MmGpPCSe8oHbhIXB0BTrX2eIMVR9Yz83F-KHkn7X7WHhfwAAAP__i2eNfw) this November. Yesterday, commissioners voted 4-1 to call an election to raise the hotel tax from 1.75% to 2%, which would generate up to $311 million for the proposed arena. The new arena, which could cost up to $1.5 billion, is the centerpiece of a proposed sports and entertainment district dubbed Project Marvel. The Spurs have [pledged $500 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQhp_G7lgBi71cQbGNi0iXayKltDAMZyIMFjO2z3n6yCvlCa6b0S99-v7_9_v4bmOK-fOnXcDQVyhjhgMTEEEd3RwheFiKq5ZwA4_rVtFWGCWXHeOa8X70NqZzVK03E_dvogUjHp1SDy2EbGfjdadEf59CENp1EzhrO685Dz4ooQW00VwwrnkvBBdK3nT_ZgUE9bj3zoN8NIqDj1TqjWYg-LIY0ll2qDdXljaZmWjF5v5s5NDI4TiO24L5yho5QGYbNnK4SjVyeN3WUdwjErIpWSTmIp0MmSsZt0Q2EwulMlf-nowiIKsFT7bW8gccxZJZyf8_tti6Q7qYlT2f4sevj-mjrcavR0wpYn-5fy42ppcqfW_g3ch_AQAA__8egpND) for the arena, and the city of San Antonio is exploring options to provide another $500 million. Last week, a consulting firm hired by the city predicted the development could produce an [economic impact of $18.7 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2S4yAQhU-DMlTQ-nVAsIkyb7qhCkHLYqclVNC27NtPMVeYpJOu-t733r_7fLeBwvH4a3c0_F7jfOCVCZkxzW4LuHrco0uW8xN9Pp8p24QzKOikGqXqZ28Dfea28mZR_qYrNHro2nYYtYZqM92gxxU6t6DGm4WlW5dl0Niib1zXjK4KpsDUqHqtlW6hHvub1bi2Q9M7jzCIVqEPHFPNGzK-bV7pE1-Yahf3iszGfGbR_BEwCZiu66q_suXyFDCVNgImis6SgKlECZjUWI4WMOH7xMRZOkskE54xsYyHPFP8j47lbtMLSaKLR9yDk2E_rWP5zEiYC7hKxp9XIAq5L6aP3Qb6EePfzfky8B0AAP__ZnCKjg) over the next 30 years, including $351 million in taxes. Critics have dismissed the report as a marketing ploy. On Monday, a coalition of organizations opposed to the project held a press conference at the Alamodome, [calling on elected officials](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2ypCAQRp9Gs54CRMTAYBOzu-mGVgvtlb38WIDjzNtvOa-wcdd3qs7pP1_LFzrv4vdvDDTV15aWSFfxVCvlxeyONkshmYy1nGTLceaCmRbBRA9MA1OLReffi2zttDI78pYmPvRSDppz0e4Tl6h1r1fdq55xxYiNoxk5Ks57tJK3brphTDPFOeNSPLQakdMmh04ZS2JoJCPrasqPulOlF5bNv9OT8sOk0Pppr_UoTferEXMj5uu6Hj8US39fGzFjrs54asR8izVi9smgb8RcMALGmqJL8KHCkdNfMhUC5id5MCmEM7r6BpPQu-pSBPQYkk2B4DjLDiuan3tWqdQCnzqAmSKChNV5f09s8h4zPCmeBDZdsaYrNmIWQwes43oVbAS2agZyHC2gQgly6NW2dboTXd_myR7XDSvqbvEd0PmPev2_hz0n8S8AAP__bUWrWQ) to "invest in community needs before a new stadium is built." The city is expected to discuss the firm’s report during a meeting today.
## High School Football Gets Wearable Tech
When Texas high school football kicks off in a few weeks, many teams will be using wearable technology that [enables coaches to relay calls](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbHO3CAQhJ_G7vYEnA12QXGR4iLSn5QprTWsDRGGE3Dn328f-W_yAKl3Z0bfzO-P-QN98HH7iTvp-rmmOdJRAtVKeTbO02ppTyZjLS-y5fnKBTPNgoke2ABMzhZ9OOeutXphduQtaa76rlMD56J12o7dOA69ujOmpOlVP3Cu5Kj6vje4yqX1-jJjA5OcM96J2yBH5LR26i6NJaGajpH1NeVbdVTpE8sazvSmfDNpb4N2tT5Lc380YmrEdBzHbS_xujViogiv0oipknExhbSdjZgcZntgJsBowdLbG7p-DsKMSyB4BjzBYLh6gX9K8BG-4sH5zUExLqUAa0p1wRDAF8AlvSrUBMZh3AiqI9hwp0ZMmOHx4D9-ff_zrc3aPg8fgi_ygtt29OGLpf7fAm8t_gYAAP__0IedZw) to players on the field. The University Interscholastic League (UIL), which regulates athletics competition among Texas public schools, approved a rule allowing the technology earlier this year. Coaches in the press box will be able to [communicate with any player](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ9GOwygI1pQ_I3d_O2W5goXYYNigBnGffqNs9kn2OoWN-fkO9_Hfb6D825f_8OGMr9MmHcsyWPOGGdlHRqNW1ARcnqgTscjJog4c8pvhA6E9rMG58-5q7VcqB5ZjZKJW9eJgTFeW7kMFHlrRKdapUw_GCp6bQazCDOCUGPt5FVGB9ozRlnHm6EfgaHpRNsrjVxUHUXtcohNtpjxBcn4MzwxNipstZc25yNV7b-KTxWfSilNcter4pN1qyVJ2RB8xad39veSh_MEjiOGJyZSECIsHkmJLuUFdk0ODydR4C87JKOye_BhPYkJkfzMZ5_5tQPYr_VWR6mP4rx3qb-A1w2cf_Plv1l9Sv4dAAD__ygHj5s) wearing a watch, wristband, belt, or other device capable of receiving the one-way messages. Coaches on the sidelines can’t relay calls, and voice transmission is not allowed. The move aims to streamline play-calling and [reduce sign-stealing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0UGumzAQxvHTwG6QMQTIgkVVNbtU3b12hSb2GFu1Gdc2Ibl9xbvCW8_oL_30fdyXOzrvtvUnBprLy_Cy0ZE9lUJpUdaR0RRYJSx5J53jnjImWqSQFxATiGHR6Px76Ws9P4S-tjXN7Xjp-3FqW1nbeaBO4YRaDQavWo3KdFoLrTspxgvJR-3mMyYmMbStaHvZTMMVWzL92A1KkxyrXpB2hVNTLBV6YTb-zU9KjeJQ-9mWEnPVfavkrZK34ziagK-YKObzoZK3U3Re-r_dv-H3B_yAJHeW4k-8_zoqeftsAsaY-EkZDsKED09QSNmNPa9vMJzAutVCVpbZg2EuD_Qeosc3pVzJi_wOilFZylAYFIewb05hIdB7ctsKKwbKjS2hTrOOh_Pe5eHUrQGd_8SUr03wnOX_AAAA__85yKBv). It illustrates the growing trend of incorporating technology at every level of competition. Last season, the UIL allowed the use of video review and data analysis tools during games.

[Miso already has 200K+ hours ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQhp_G7mwxgDFXUEQ6bXdpUyIM4_VIYCzAe7tvH3kT5QXSzvdrZv7v15f9chRpv_90CU17rtnu-F0jtobF-o1wDZiyL67VE0M9zlJdQcsZnwamB6ZscBRfVvbBLCx8QI8G5knKWQPwfjNSB-2DnsCBwEkDVwyECkEJWGYBvCdzLWOaKQAGko9afTjAVc5C-YB87iTDQC2XsW3Y8OnqGl_5gWX0OfXRbK0dtRM_On7r-I32B9Y2Jqq55CU38vXKXVDczpZszWfx2IlPTI5ix9U1TBjoTJ34PByF4XCl7VjqRsdf7l06HN33d-IfBM0GyWb7R8S5U1usEKDZJCdgrC8mHN8UI1V1tbhfB99Pt_9T_TD8dwAAAP__WV-S7g)[under its belt for brands like White Castle](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQhp_G7mwxgDFXUEQ6bXdpUyIM4_VIYCzAe7tvH3kT5QXSzvdrZv7v15f9chRpv_90CU17rtnu-F0jtobF-o1wDZiyL67VE0M9zlJdQcsZnwamB6ZscBRfVvbBLCx8QI8G5knKWQPwfjNSB-2DnsCBwEkDVwyECkEJWGYBvCdzLWOaKQAGko9afTjAVc5C-YB87iTDQC2XsW3Y8OnqGl_5gWX0OfXRbK0dtRM_On7r-I32B9Y2Jqq55CU38vXKXVDczpZszWfx2IlPTI5ix9U1TBjoTJ34PByF4XCl7VjqRsdf7l06HN33d-IfBM0GyWb7R8S5U1usEKDZJCdgrC8mHN8UI1V1tbhfB99Pt_9T_TD8dwAAAP__WV-S7g). With the $1 trillion fast-food industry facing 144% employee turnover rates, Flippy provides 24/7 labor and can boost profits by up to 3X. Miso is scaling its US-based manufacturing to seize a $4 billion/year revenue opportunity. As an investor, you can get up to 8% bonus stock. [Just don't wait too long--Miso's share price changes on August 14](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQhp_G7mwxgDFXUEQ6bXdpUyIM4_VIYCzAe7tvH3kT5QXSzvdrZv7v15f9chRpv_90CU17rtnu-F0jtobF-o1wDZiyL67VE0M9zlJdQcsZnwamB6ZscBRfVvbBLCx8QI8G5knKWQPwfjNSB-2DnsCBwEkDVwyECkEJWGYBvCdzLWOaKQAGko9afTjAVc5C-YB87iTDQC2XsW3Y8OnqGl_5gWX0OfXRbK0dtRM_On7r-I32B9Y2Jqq55CU38vXKXVDczpZszWfx2IlPTI5ix9U1TBjoTJ34PByF4XCl7VjqRsdf7l06HN33d-IfBM0GyWb7R8S5U1usEKDZJCdgrC8mHN8UI1V1tbhfB99Pt_9T_TD8dwAAAP__WV-S7g). name: Arapahoe Tea Party
subject: URGENT: Special August Meeting with Congressman Louie Gohmert!
body:
Please open this important message about our August meeting of the Arapahoe Tea Party...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xa30vYmVDUtVvW2t6pLLAKrtPLPVc0G1GVPJ-Ajd8y1X8UhMN0k74uKTm8hbOqgz-gclA5faqnLig-Zh3EKxy8f2O_ESRIR0QqfsUNwr9AP32RNm5RS3lItsy90DNKHuIyDSeSC_l-cLpHAh4g35BXRj_xDJS1DLOdIqQuckq8g=&c=Svv1d9gYkIl1vN30XgY_WYc_mDj56fIl0H0TtRBUIi1bz1AAg2mpjg==&ch=4kbIQHgURZt9KR6yIvWGMMldGN6DDMmYcWX2Gmpzf8p9-3dyHuWRiA==)
---
Hey Everyone!
We are thrilled here at Arapahoe Tea Party to announce a special meeting, on a special date and time, with Former Congressman Louie Gohmert of Texas!
Congressman Gohmert is making a special trip to Colorado to meet you all and help invigorate our membership to stay in the fight through 2026.
Thanks to our friends at [Team Imer PAC](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xa30vYmVDUtVvW2t6pLLAKrtPLPVc0G1GVPJ-Ajd8y1X8UhMN0k74tggLVJPTUVIap37w8MW0-HV2--cMyU6_XTG6wXlJFTPvKQfJs6ydo8IKtUefWbVKEwCC6CYolFcXCSfSjg-ZAPxPjcISoct7TIIn26V_f9M&c=Svv1d9gYkIl1vN30XgY_WYc_mDj56fIl0H0TtRBUIi1bz1AAg2mpjg==&ch=4kbIQHgURZt9KR6yIvWGMMldGN6DDMmYcWX2Gmpzf8p9-3dyHuWRiA==), we can have this event with Congressman Gohmert.
While Team Imer is contributing significantly to the Congressman's travel costs and security for this event, we need to contribute to that cost.
Tickets start at just $20, $30 for couples, and you can purchase 10 tickets for $175.
We apologize for not being able to make this event free to our membership, but we hope you understand the reasoning behind it.
If you are unable to afford a ticket, please contact me below, and I will do my best to accommodate you.
As always, click the image or button below to RSVP for our meeting.
---

name: Right Wing Report
subject: You Do Not Have to Be Chained to Sickness!
body:
The power is yours – activate it today!
* * *
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

* * *
The power is yours – activate it today! | | | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021y2favau4g7jsyrad64uz5loqofeli9nhugp3yxbyi1i1z2cmvt5u2muti6g1lj4ppav2lqderwekpoqg648vc5kaqsg7w2f9xxeix0e12tjwd03gxov0lmqk7j7kcort1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h)
---
| | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021y2favau4g7jsyrad64uz5loqofeli9nhugp3yxbyi1i1z2cmvt5u2muti6g1lj4ppav2lqderwekpoqg648vc5kaqsg7w2f9xxeix0e12tjwd03gxov0lmqk7j7kcort1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h)
---
| | | Dear Friend,
---
****You do not have to be chained to sickness any longer!**** God’s promises for healing are real, powerful, and available to you today. The words you speak over your life have the power to bring healing, restoration, and strength. ****Proverbs 18:21**** tells us, __“The tongue has the power of life and death.”__ What are you speaking over your body? One powerful testimony comes from Sarah, who had been battling chronic back pain for years. She tried everything—medications, therapies, even surgery—but nothing brought lasting relief. One day, she felt led to purchase Brenda Kunneman’s book, __[Daily Decrees for Divine Healing](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021y2favau4g7jsyrad64uz5loqofeli9nhugp3yxbyi1i1z2cmvt5u2muti6g1lj4ppav2lqderwekpoqg648vc5kaqsg7w2f9xxeix0e12tjwd03gxov0lmqk7j7kcort1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h)__. She found the decree for Back Pain and began to speak it over her life each day.
| | ****Decree for Back Pain:**** _We decree back and skeletal structures are made whole. We prophesy to your spine, neck, vertebrae, pelvic bone, and hip joints and command them to be correctly aligned. We speak to every nerve muscle and ligament and we declare healing and peace in the name of Jesus. We reject all forms of inflammation, numbness, arthritis, degenerative disorders, tension, and sciatica. We speak healing to fractures, trauma, paralysis, and injuries. We declare cartilage being restored by the power of God. We decree your back and bone structure is strong and healthy. We speak to all pain and command it to abate and be relieved now! We say you walk upright and your posture is corrected. We decree your back is made completely whole in Jesus' name!_
---
| | Every morning and night, she decreed this over herself. Days turned into weeks, and suddenly, she realized the pain was completely gone. No explanation—just ****God’s wonderful working power!**** Just as Sarah saw a breakthrough, ****you too can overcome whatever you are struggling with and walk in divine healing!****
---
| | If you are ready to step into the healing God has promised you, start decreeing His Promises today. In the powerful book, __[Daily Decrees for Divine Healing](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021y2favau4g7jsyrad64uz5loqofeli9nhugp3yxbyi1i1z2cmvt5u2muti6g1lj4ppav2lqderwekpoqg648vc5kaqsg7w2f9xxeix0e12tjwd03gxov0lmqk7j7kcort1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h)__ , we have decrees for every sickness and pain you may be experiencing. Get this book today and watch God’s miraculous power begin to work in your life!
---
| [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021y2favau4g7jsyrad64uz5loqofeli9nhugp3yxbyi1i1z2cmvt5u2muti6g1lj4ppav2lqderwekpoqg648vc5kaqsg7w2f9xxeix0e12tjwd03gxov0lmqk7j7kcort1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h)
---
| | [Get your copy now »](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021y2favau4g7jsyrad64uz5loqofeli9nhugp3yxbyi1i1z2cmvt5u2muti6g1lj4ppav2lqderwekpoqg648vc5kaqsg7w2f9xxeix0e12tjwd03gxov0lmqk7j7kcort1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h)
---
We are standing in faith with you for divine health and healing! ****Blessings,****
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021y2favau4g7jsyrad64uz5loqofeli9nhugp3yxbyi1i1z2cmvt5u2muti6g1lj4ppav2lqderwekpoqg648vc5kaqsg7w2f9xxeix0e12tjwd03gxov0lmqk7j7kcort1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h)
Hank and Brenda Kunneman One Voice Ministries Pastors of Lord of Hosts Church
| | | Hank and Brenda Kunneman have dedicated their lives to connecting people with the Word of the Lord. Known as a ministry team that shares the platform in a unique way, they are seeing lives change through the prophetic word and ministry in the Holy Spirit, coupled with a balanced and relevant message. Traveling worldwide as One Voice Ministries, they are committed to teaching biblical principles and to helping people have a genuine encounter with the Lord. The Kunnemans also pastor Lord of Hosts Church, a thriving church in Omaha, Nebraska.
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vf4l5s88g2sjqxnfam0ezmg1pfika8ybxi5hs83m6npwt80e4qk4ybbgg0i58sl3f4ls3ezptqwfy1em5a&__stmp=t0knys&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021y2favau4g7jsyrad64uz5loqofeli9nhugugxbvzibj12s2ekehoc1f3wv3y79mxhdj7tkj7t6kaqb5v5io3uufz8vbdmxirrbde9srypxdnrd0y0ag0xx7oueow6idjl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=4zp2igrzkq53afoziudbk08s0qk0o01rzn403xslqaz0vu5c6esjbb5z4g7n6yvzu3b2sykrdfvdb1042gn4sjdzjajw765zxsw5lupnc5qrpna3d0txmwvqqmymlopy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0knys&__onlt=h)

# [Big Tech and Media colluding to take down RFK Jr?](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Is Big Tech colluding with the media to censor RFK Jr?
That's the claim behind a massive lawsuit that involves everyone from Google to Facebook and the Washington Post...
But what exactly are these Big Tech conglomerates trying to hide?
We believe it's a **[giant secret](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that could cost them hundreds of billions if exposed. And RFK Jr is in a perfect position to reveal **[the ugly truth](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to the world.
But big tech will stop at nothing to keep him quiet about **[this](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
And they may just succeed...
Which is why we're not waiting around.
We're revealing everything TODAY in the first 5 minutes of **[this uncensored video](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. It's one of **[Big Tech's darkest secrets](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**... and they're desperate to stop you from hearing about it. But learning the truth could just save your life. Get the full facts in **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/863b17ea-0388-49fa-a007-7c32ea546baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's available online.

# AOC slammed for pushing gender pronouns agenda while her district faces crime wave
Residents and shop owners in Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's Queens district are **[slamming her for focusing on issues like passport gender markers](https://substack.com/redirect/c19394ca-6a94-40a1-a39f-a9a72c2fbb9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while ignoring serious crime problems along Roosevelt Avenue, which is plagued by prostitution, illegal vendors, gangs, and sex trafficking.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c19394ca-6a94-40a1-a39f-a9a72c2fbb9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Roosevelt Avenue faces major crime crisis** \- The corridor, nicknamed "The Market of Sweethearts," has been overrun by illegal migrants involved in extortion, drug dealing, and running brothels, with gangs getting a foothold partly due to the city's migrant crisis.
* **Local leaders demand action on public safety** \- Rosa Sanchez, head of the Restore Roosevelt Avenue Coalition, said constituents need their congresswoman's help with "crime, drugs, gangs, sex trafficking" rather than focusing on national attention, calling public safety "the big issue" in the area.
* **AOC's newsletter highlights disconnect** \- While AOC's July newsletter advised constituents on updating passport gender markers to "X" and promoted other initiatives like an FAA air traffic controller program, critics say she's ignoring the urgent quality-of-life issues in her own district, with one Republican leader calling her focus an "example of ultra-liberalism."

# Former Biden FTC head allegedly billed luxury transport to taxpayers
An FTC inspector general probe found Lina Khan, the head of the Federal Trade Commission under former President Joe Biden, billed taxpayers for expensive private chauffeurs instead of cheaper alternatives, amounting to **nearly $19,000 on luxury car services during 16 trips,** including $1,128 for a Denver trip when car rental would have cost $407, with some expenses occurring during apparent campaign events for Democrats before the 2024 election, **[the Daily Wire reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/1fd1a6f5-e53a-4111-8f40-a01726e91cb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Accused of using government position for political campaigning** \- Khan was criticized for "zig-zagging" the country in October 2024 to appear with Democratic politicians at events with "nominal policy themes," including expensive car service trips to Chicago ($1,021) and Wisconsin ($2,215) just weeks before the election.
* **Placed Democratic operative in permanent FTC job without proper process** \- Khan personally overrode staff concerns to hire Nathaniel Segal, a Biden-Harris political appointee, into a non-political FTC position without advertising the job publicly as required, and falsely classified him as non-probationary to make firing more difficult for the incoming Trump administration.
* **Segal hiring now under criminal investigation** \- Federal prosecutors are investigating after Segal allegedly created false, backdated paperwork to try to qualify for Elon Musk's employee buyout offer, with the investigation potentially implicating Khan for illegally "burrowing" political appointees into career civil service positions without proper authorization.

A note from Rebekah:
_The planet is on fire --figuratively, yes, but also literally._
_Floodwaters rise, forests burn, and skies choke with smoke. And just as we need good information most --clear-eyed, science-driven, unflinching--newsrooms are cutting their environmental desks, shuttering the very windows through which we might still glimpse a way forward._
_For years now, I 've stood in the path of disaster, trying to track it, understand it, and--where possible--push back._
_During the COVID-19 pandemic, I defied threats from the state to make data public --because truth is oxygen, and people were suffocating without it._
_Later, when I ran for Congress, it wasn 't to climb a ladder--it was to stand firm for science, community, and the fragile threads of democracy._
_Now I write to you through this newsletter._
_It 's not just commentary; it's an effort to trace the fault lines between people and planet, to explain how those fractures became chasms, and how we might yet build bridges across them._
_I won 't pretend to have all the answers. But I've learned how to read the signals--both the quiet ones whispered in data, and the loud ones shouted by the wind. And I can help you read them too. Because understanding the world is the first step toward changing it._
_Please upgrade to a paid subscription so that I can afford to remove all paywells from my posts and media._
_If only 10% of my free subscribers upgraded to a paid plan, I would be able to continue this important work freely and independently._
_My hope is that you will see the value in this work and upgrade to a paid subscription to help me continue this public service._
_As the media stifles important content in order to "fall in line," we need to support voices who will, without hesitation, be willing to step out of line. That's who I've proven myself to be._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hUgVc7of1nOGGLg7cUonPhNwcedodjVH1-EhnLeHYZc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170263049)
* * *
NASA -- under pressure from the current White House -- has quietly begun planning the destruction of two state-of-the-art sensors whose only crime is helping humanity see the carbon it emits.
Among those in the crosshairs: **[OCO‐2](https://substack.com/redirect/165437d0-39ce-47af-9bc0-7a35db958830?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, the independent Orbiting Carbon Observatory launched in 2014, and **[OCO‐3](https://substack.com/redirect/b8ef7a9d-851f-484b-9c23-7e8c2c6bbfe4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[,](https://substack.com/redirect/b8ef7a9d-851f-484b-9c23-7e8c2c6bbfe4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) its still‐functional counterpart aboard the International Space Station.
Both have delivered the clearest, most detailed global snapshots of atmospheric CO2 ever collected -- maps that tell us, moment by moment, how and where our carbon is piling up on the globe.
Already, Republican-appointed officials at NASA under Acting Administrator Sean Duffy have directed staff to draw up unauthorized plans to terminate both missions -- even though the satellites still function well and have years of life ahead.
The directs reportedly include intentionally crashing the satellite into the atmosphere for it to burn up and be destroyed...

You can continue supporting my work by donating at one of the options below: | Aug 6 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | A note from Rebekah: The planet is on fire --figuratively, yes, but also literally. Floodwaters rise, forests burn, and skies choke with smoke. And just as we need good information most --clear-eyed, science-driven, unflinching--newsrooms are cutting their environmental desks, shuttering the very windows through which we might still glimpse a way forward. For years now, I 've stood in the path of disaster, trying to track it, understand it, and--where possible--push back. During the COVID-19 pandemic, I defied threats from the state to make data public --because truth is oxygen, and people were suffocating without it. Later, when I ran for Congress, it wasn 't to climb a ladder--it was to stand firm for science, community, and the fragile threads of democracy. Now I write to you through this newsletter. It 's not just commentary; it's an effort to trace the fault lines between people and planet, to explain how those fractures became chasms, and how we might yet build bridges across them. I won 't pretend to have all the answers. But I've learned how to read the signals--both the quiet ones whispered in data, and the loud ones shouted by the wind. And I can help you read them too. Because understanding the world is the first step toward changing it. Please upgrade to a paid subscription so that I can afford to remove all paywells from my posts and media. If only 10% of my free subscribers upgraded to a paid plan, I would be able to continue this important work freely and independently. My hope is that you will see the value in this work and upgrade to a paid subscription to help me continue this public service. As the media stifles important content in order to "fall in line," we need to support voices who will, without hesitation, be willing to step out of line. That's who I've proven myself to be. NASA -- under pressure from the current White House -- has quietly begun planning the destruction of two state-of-the-art sensors whose only crime is helping humanity see the carbon it emits. Among those in the crosshairs: , the independent Orbiting Carbon Observatory launched in 2014, and its still‐functional counterpart aboard the International Space Station. Both have delivered the clearest, most detailed global snapshots of atmospheric CO2 ever collected -- maps that tell us, moment by moment, how and where our carbon is piling up on the globe. Already, Republican-appointed officials at NASA under Acting Administrator Sean Duffy have directed staff to draw up unauthorized plans to terminate both missions -- even though the satellites still function well and have years of life ahead. The directs reportedly include intentionally crashing the satellite into the atmosphere for it to burn up and be destroyed... I see through the bullsh*t.

I’m running for Senate to bring a hammer to smash through all the corruption in D.C.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=854df15c6e4d488f98a4d7dc2f19a1bc&_e=YeZ1rSNoNui30OP7N26c-upXg5afA8J9sEb5cZGc2kcbDg6ewUkELKsXrLLc7hCaBZFyroGJRuUQZ5d22y04QzwKECpzO_B3s122z0MuB1g9VeMwN5YODHlQ5tBge2ODC3WGA6IbnclxTHBv-P3lzwHplA2n90sY_uoNiU47hiCvsnE3BGUSf3qiKy2C-TXnAENzlqFV5RZBxmWT3wt45DMt5MegAZx7FFGhhC2CHSPh4B4JDbRwFJ1v-xb75TVIKQybFALYbRdJeVuWO0mY5arnK76pLfJ-8bP6G8tqcs6gZXuu7NJUPOXoT_fxxhLBlAbraPeQl3bNIzPBEKrWU0hAIEJaMquz7zvFyTA-5catNxa1Wkr5vBQACtMxZQ0B8U-_DpwTh5OyDAwBT-8sTyuMROTu8yZknEZkXeL5RZVn_fwYqtLmGsUwDYlrEcbo2wG84YL6lfpS7IiV4h4HS4cKwHEJu_UUNSgAnTW8zZrnY6V0MD75IHHP6rKG_2gQGkkJj9lr5juMldPm9NK-4596pOLWQ_WdtdjBtYGR_X_N-_R4i6pX271QpAKCQOZt)

name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: SEALs walk through fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znrcn91gpn7bru21npgpgum2oe59sna5miuov508_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg68ob1cph2bs)Semper fortis. Always courageous.
Those two words aren't just a motto, they're my way of life. As a retired Navy SEAL, I know firsthand that courage isn't something you can fake. It's something that is earned through adversity. And I'm telling you right now, we are in the fight of our lives.
The radical Left is doing everything it can to DISMANTLE our nation piece by piece. They would love nothing more than to destroy our nation's history, values, and very identity!
This is a crisis of courage, and I won't stand idly by.
I didn't bleed for this nation as a SEAL just to surrender now. I will not see this great nation destroyed from within by crooked swamp dwellers!
It's time for us to stand up together and find the courage to fight for our beliefs. We are a Team, Friend. I can't stay in this fight without help from patriots like YOU.
I'm all in on this fight. Are you?[FIGHT ALONGSIDE DERRICK!
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf7rupivvol4de04bhsds147pqknahp1cjd632co_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg68ob1cph2bs)[Will you join this fight by donating to ensure these radicals can't buy this seat and steal our Republican House Majority?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9npj186flcls9e3jssctmo7odjvqmkio690vctg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg68ob1cph2bs)[<< DONATE NOW >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z62b6insis3aef7g5j1a2e2c983h14gm85tun4pg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg68ob1cph2bs)Thank you, Friend.
-Ret. Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden |

* * *
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq0p3t2miqmi0aq19m72iu3sec1nac2ubto1cmh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg68ob1cph2bs "Thanks to your help, I'm able to work for you every day, but a donation of any amount will go a long way!")

| | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.

| | Paid for by Van Orden for Congress

| Hey, Friend! It's Retired Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden. I'm in the tightest race in the country and I want to make sure I can update my top supporters on where my Team and I stand.

Please add my email, team@email.vanorden4congress.com, to your address book to make sure you receive important messages from me and my Team!

It's something that is earned through adversity. And I'm telling you right now, we are in the fight of our lives. The radical Left is doing everything it can to DISMANTLE our nation piece by piece. They would love nothing more than to destroy our nation's history, values, and very identity! This is a crisis of courage, and I won't stand idly by. I didn't bleed for this nation as a SEAL just to surrender now. I will not see this great nation destroyed from within by crooked swamp dwellers! It's time for us to stand up together and find the courage to fight for our beliefs. We are a Team, Friend. I can't stay in this fight without help from patriots like YOU. I'm all in on this fight. name: They've lost it
subject: Arrested for democracy?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
🚨 Texas Republicans just voted to ARREST dozens of Democratic legislators for one simple “crime”: refusing to hand over our democracy to Donald Trump and the GOP’s rigged redistricting plan] 🚨
Read that again. They’re literally empowering state troopers to hunt down elected officials who dared to defy their power grab. This isn’t law and order — it’s political retaliation.
And the hypocrisy? It’s staggering.
Remember 2021, when millions of Texans froze without water or power during that historic winter storm... and Ted Cruz fled to Cancun ? Not a single warrant was issued then. No outrage. No arrests.
But stand up to Trump’s gerrymandering scam? Suddenly, it’s “arrest them all.” I lived it.
This is what happens when one party treats Trump’s word as law. They’re not just targeting Democrats — they’re setting the stage to punish anyone who defies them next.
This is our fight. And we will not back down.
Chip in now and help us build the movement to end Trump’s stranglehold on our democracy :
👉 Donate to the right fight today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]

If they want to arrest us for defending democracy , they’ll have to arrest millions of us.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin
Texas’s 18th Congressional District
