name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: 🧠 August Update: Latest Reflections
body:
Catch up on my current insights and analyses.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mansharamani/vikram-update-aug2025?e=93b2c2b824)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f6b24768eb&e=93b2c2b824)
| | | | |
# Mansharamani Musings
---
| Immigration, tariffs, and the politics of air-conditioning were some of the topics that I discussed last month. I’d welcome your thoughts...
Happy August!
[ _B_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=608d5641f9&e=93b2c2b824) _est,**
Vikram**_

---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0176e925f2&e=93b2c2b824)
| JULY 5, 2025
In addition to spending time with family, eating some burgers, and watching fireworks, I have always used Independence Day as a time to reflect. Specifically, I can’t help but marvel at the greatness of our country and how lucky I am to have been born here.
While each of us has our own stories, mine really begins half a world away when a retrenching British empire decided to leave the Indian subcontinent. You see, my parents were born in what was then British India, and when London decided to pull back from the region, they separated India into what eventually became three countries – Pakistan, India, and Bangladesh. (It was initially Pakistan and India, and Bangladesh became an independent nation in the 1971 after its nine-month liberation war.) My parents, then children, were on the wrong side...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=84aba90ef9&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e53b7f3657&e=93b2c2b824)
| JULY 11, 2025
Markets were again rattled this week when the on-again, off-again trade war appeared to be once again on. U.S. President Donald Trump [slapped](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8b142d7031&e=93b2c2b824) a number of countries with tariffs, [announced](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8ac6f40f47&e=93b2c2b824) that the August 1st start date was firm, and [threatened](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8a1afd2327&e=93b2c2b824) tariffs on pharmaceuticals and copper as well.
The latter tariff target, copper, is of particular interest to me, because of its role in modern technology and therefore national security. Chile, which accounts for 23% of the world's copper supply, faces a major conundrum, one the United States has imposed on the South American nation. The country is the world’s top producer of the metal for both the U.S. and China. Earlier this year, at a large mining conference in Santiago, I suggested that Chile would have to pick a side. Many Chilean CEOs and government leaders were very uncomfortable with..
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=83be155f17&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=ce32135513&e=93b2c2b824)
|
---
| JULY 18, 2025
As the founder and chief executive of a [frozen pizza manufacturer](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5743d9a4c2&e=93b2c2b824), I closely watch how global events can impact my business. Unsurprisingly, the trade war has been a particular area of my focus. And when the possibility of tomato tariffs arose in April, I did what I have long advised businesses to do when navigating uncertainty: think about scenarios and how the future may unfold, contemplating (before anything happens) how potential developments might impact your business. Then come up with anticipated responses for each scenario....
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=dfe90080eb&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=931a7b9e0e&e=93b2c2b824)
| JULY 27, 2025
In my home state of New Hampshire, July can get hot. While it’s perhaps not as frequent as you might experience in Louisiana, there are lots of days we suffer a wet, sticky kind of hot that makes your clothes stick to you and makes it difficult to breathe. And as anyone from Las Vegas can attest, while heat can be uncomfortable, heat and humidity can be unbearable.
And it’s this humid heat that contributed to my recent decision to install a nitrogen tunnel at the pizza factory I now run. By spraying liquid nitrogen, we’re able to rapidly cool hot products – a functionality that enhances food safety, food quality, and our ability to operate during hot, humid New Hampshire summer days. This has proven especially important (and useful) over the past month when the temperature on the factory floor has soared on several days. If we didn’t have the ability to use liquid nitrogen, we would likely have been forced to shut down...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=49cb9ca145&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5e5bd51667&e=93b2c2b824)
|
# NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
---
| As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos.
If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (**It’s Free**!)
---

| **VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He’s currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, [ _**The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=c6ae234073&e=93b2c2b824) , [ _**Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=ab0c2a46f3&e=93b2c2b824) and [ _**Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5612e422e7&e=93b2c2b824). Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

clean_body: Catch up on my current insights and analyses. | | | | | | | | | | | Mansharamani Musings | Immigration, tariffs, and the politics of air-conditioning were some of the topics that I discussed last month. I’d welcome your thoughts... Happy August! est, Vikram | JULY 5, 2025 In addition to spending time with family, eating some burgers, and watching fireworks, I have always used Independence Day as a time to reflect. Specifically, I can’t help but marvel at the greatness of our country and how lucky I am to have been born here. While each of us has our own stories, mine really begins half a world away when a retrenching British empire decided to leave the Indian subcontinent. You see, my parents were born in what was then British India, and when London decided to pull back from the region, they separated India into what eventually became three countries – Pakistan, India, and Bangladesh. (It was initially Pakistan and India, and Bangladesh became an independent nation in the 1971 after its nine-month liberation war.) My parents, then children, were on the wrong side... | | | JULY 11, 2025 Markets were again rattled this week when the on-again, off-again trade war appeared to be once again on. U.S. President Donald Trump a number of countries with tariffs, that the August 1st start date was firm, and tariffs on pharmaceuticals and copper as well. The latter tariff target, copper, is of particular interest to me, because of its role in modern technology and therefore national security. Chile, which accounts for 23% of the world's copper supply, faces a major conundrum, one the United States has imposed on the South American nation. The country is the world’s top producer of the metal for both the U.S. and China. Earlier this year, at a large mining conference in Santiago, I suggested that Chile would have to pick a side. Many Chilean CEOs and government leaders were very uncomfortable with.. | | | | JULY 18, 2025 As the founder and chief executive of a , I closely watch how global events can impact my business. Unsurprisingly, the trade war has been a particular area of my focus. And when the possibility of tomato tariffs arose in April, I did what I have long advised businesses to do when navigating uncertainty: think about scenarios and how the future may unfold, contemplating (before anything happens) how potential developments might impact your business. Then come up with anticipated responses for each scenario.... | | | JULY 27, 2025 In my home state of New Hampshire, July can get hot. While it’s perhaps not as frequent as you might experience in Louisiana, there are lots of days we suffer a wet, sticky kind of hot that makes your clothes stick to you and makes it difficult to breathe. And as anyone from Las Vegas can attest, while heat can be uncomfortable, heat and humidity can be unbearable. And it’s this humid heat that contributed to my recent decision to install a nitrogen tunnel at the pizza factory I now run. By spraying liquid nitrogen, we’re able to rapidly cool hot products – a functionality that enhances food safety, food quality, and our ability to operate during hot, humid New Hampshire summer days. This has proven especially important (and useful) over the past month when the temperature on the factory floor has soared on several days. If we didn’t have the ability to use liquid nitrogen, we would likely have been forced to shut down... | | | NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY | As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours.
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e12775653/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdnBudHYydTNBZA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDY/LbmNsWE1BU3Jraw/qP2hpZHM9bmM2dndTWUxMUzVsZGFscw/gaJNg0Q/s1vec218401)
| |
---
| |
---
Patriot, I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY** **DAY** at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** just got huge. **[And that’s why I’m sending you this email with a 24-hour deadline.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Patriot, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity.
---
* Hosting **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person.
* The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good.
* And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom.

---
For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. [**Patriot, I hope you’ll rush back your crucial gift in the next 24-hours.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like:
---
| | _A is for Activist._ _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Patriot, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | _A is for Activist_. _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Patriot, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. [**Please help us make SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY a success by rushing back your best emergency gift of $35, $50, or even $500.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And because it’s so critical that you get your **crucial** gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. **[Now we’re at a watershed moment and I’m asking for your support.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.

Thank you!

body:

Those two words aren't just a motto, they're my way of life. As a retired Navy SEAL, I know firsthand that courage isn't something you can fake. It's something that is earned through adversity. And I'm telling you right now, we are in the fight of our lives.
The radical Left is doing everything it can to DISMANTLE our nation piece by piece. They would love nothing more than to destroy our nation's history, values, and very identity!
This is a crisis of courage, and I won't stand idly by.
I didn't bleed for this nation as a SEAL just to surrender now. I will not see this great nation destroyed from within by crooked swamp dwellers!
It's time for us to stand up together and find the courage to fight for our beliefs. We are a Team, Friend. I can't stay in this fight without help from patriots like YOU.
I'm all in on this fight. Are you?[FIGHT ALONGSIDE DERRICK!

HIGH SCHOOL DROPOUT. WAFFLE HOUSE WAITRESS. FIRST WOMAN TO GRADUATE
FROM THE CITADEL. SINGLE MOM. FIGHTER.

NANCY MACE WASN’T BORN INTO POWER. SHE WORKED FOR EVERY INCH OF
GROUND SHE’S GAINED.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash
browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League
connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

BY THE GRACE OF GOD, SHE TURNED THAT STRUGGLE INTO A STORY NO
POLITICIAN CAN TOUCH. She made history as the first woman to graduate
from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She
built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the
Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.

Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire
and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President
Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our
daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

SHE’S NOT HERE TO MAKE FRIENDS. SHE’S HERE TO MAKE HISTORY.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the
Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to
do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and
lead from the front.

SOUTH CAROLINA IS WORTH FIGHTING FOR. AND NANCY MACE IS JUST GETTING
STARTED.

PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186

Charleston, SC 29492

subject: RFK Jr. Just Killed Lifesaving Vaccine Research — Tell Him to Reverse Course Now
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [RFK Jr. Just Killed Lifesaving Vaccine Research. Demand He Reverse Course NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf201cb0f-2a8e-4a6d-958d-03496d7522bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T887efe31-9e54-4b6c-a30f-3def43ef8a1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **This is outrageous.** The Trump administration—under the direction of anti-vaccine wactivist RFK Jr.—just [canceled](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35f484df-1557-4a4e-a46c-28df007b0c72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **more than $500 million in funding for mRNA vaccine research** , including projects that could help fight **bird flu, cancer, HIV, and future pandemics**. mRNA vaccines helped end the COVID-19 pandemic. They've saved millions of lives, and now they're showing promise in treating other deadly diseases. But instead of building on that success, RFK Jr. is [**shutting it down**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T911b5536-ac81-41ff-9260-0b632c568cf7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), based on discredited BS conspiracy theories. [**Sign the petition now and demand the Trump administration reverse this reckless decision. Tell RFK Jr. and HHS: Restore mRNA funding. Let science lead—not science fiction.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64f45cd7-af45-40b9-80ed-8b96fc8ca094/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Urgent: My Deposition is Today – Help Defend the Truth
body:
Today, I'm being deposed in this case. It's a critical step, and the pressure is on.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3p4ko4krtvt1f5prafcv7otjm703dnj0phste38_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg6ao36cjh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znnlr1296qs5q1c2bfn2l0uu6g79illenjfrbrlg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg6ao36cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

Things are intense right now. As you may know, I was ousted from **Project Veritas** , the organization I founded and poured my heart into for over a decade. Now, they're suing me in an ongoing legal battle that's **draining resources and testing my resolve**.

[**Any help you can provide is appreciated.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z858mv30j7t5lb72f3ddp4ffib0om03pm3pm5fo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg6ao36cjh2bs)

**Today, I'm being deposed in this case.** It's a critical step, and the pressure is on. We've already incurred massive costs for attorney's fees and discovery - sifting through thousands of documents, preparing witnesses, and fighting back against baseless claims. And now, we need to start covering trial expenses [**to keep this fight going strong**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmbaubf0qpe299c1ms7sarnah97dnk78hpcplua8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg6ao36cjh2bs).

This isn't just about me; it's about protecting investigative journalism and the right to expose corruption without fear of retaliation. **Support from patriots like you has been my lifeline so far** , and I'm reaching out personally because [**we still need to raise funds urgently to stay in the ring**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo7q2th4k2ie4gsq0acmqjhlg8ccdgt0i14plks8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg6ao36cjh2bs).

[**Will you stand with me today?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9sh6glvbei5luagfuvvev5i9634vii03s73jqoo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg6ao36cjh2bs)

[**A donation of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford will go directly to Liberty Guard's defense fund for my legal battle**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziams49vm4vjjaafvc8moms9bd6f7d2bocf4gg98_rp22sh2s8i6epb1clg6ao36cjh2bs). Every dollar counts in defending the truth.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart for your generosity and belief in this mission. Together, we'll prevail and the truth will win.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

name: Karen Hamilton
subject: Energy Crisis Looming in Virginia
body:
Hamilton for Delegate!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in browser](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/36PWPv_aR/c?w=OIfYDPkuQt_CHA1W4bPkPGPrMEFfLMeXLowqa_BuP0s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYW1pbHRvbmZvcnZpcmdpbmlhLmNvbS9zby8zNlBXUHZfYVI_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/36PWPv_aR/c?w=UPhZz-2DKKvGOiY9Aj3j4WPKPcfNeFq9zmXhC7ptelU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20vbWVldC1rYXJlbiIsInIiOiJmOGVkNGY5Ni1jMmViLTQ5NjQtOTkwMi1iZjNhNGJkZGJhYTQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
---
| | | |
---
| | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
| | The Looming Energy Crisis in the Commonwealth
---
| | | |
---
| | In 2020, while many of us were reeling from the impacts of Covid, Democrats in Richmond passed legislation that put Virginia on the path to expensive and unreliable energy. The Virginia Clean Economy Act requires a steep phase-out and shift from coal and gas toward the supposedly cleaner energy forms of wind and solar. This dramatic phase out led to Virginia becoming the number one importer of electricity in the nation, surpassing CALIFORNIA. Almost half of our energy supply is now coming from outside of Virginia, putting us all at the mercy of policies and legislators in other states. Frankly, we deserve better. Of all the issues being decided in this upcoming election, the future of Virginia energy is perhaps the one issue that will most affect your household and businesses on a daily basis. The importance of electing governing officials in November who lead with practicality and common sense, not shallow promises and nonsense, cannot be overstated. Democrats are hiding the truth about the failure of the Virginia Clean Economy Act. The truth is...it's NOT clean,NOT green,NOT reliable,and NOT affordable. If we remain on the current trajectory, as Democrats intend to, we could see Virginia experience grid failures the likes of which we've never seen. Worst of all, these failures could impact us in times of peak energy demand and dangerous weather, when we need it the most. As Governor Youngkin succinctly stated, "We will be California in the summer and Texas in the winter." Democrats have prioritized carbon reductions above the safety and needs of those they're elected to serve. In June, the Thomas Jefferson Institute for Public Policy shared a chart from PJM regional energy market depicting the fuel breakdown used on a recent day at noon.
---
| |
---
| | As you can see above, five years into the disastrous VCEA, two-thirds of our electricity demand on a hot summer day is produced by coal, oil, and natural gas. Almost one quarter of the energy came from nuclear sources, and the heavily subsidized solar and wind energies fulfilled less than 10% of our electricity needs. Despite the reality of our energy demands, Democrats remain stubbornly devoted to their pipedream of forcing Virginia onto 100% renewables that don't do the job and are costing YOU, the taxpayer, BILLIONS of dollars. Wind is known to be unreliable in both hot and cold extremes, and solar generation only occurs during daylight, leading to inconsistent output from both. Then, there's the issue of energy storage. Solar energy is collected and stored in lithium-ion batteries, which are EXPENSIVE and....go figure....NOT GREEN! Batteries used for solar storage are made from lithium, cobalt, nickel, and graphite. The process of acquiring these minerals requires hard rock mining, consumes significant amounts of water (500,000 gallons/ton), disrupts land, creating more waste than useful material (150 tons of waste/ton), and, IRONICALLY, emits up to 20 tons of CO2/ton. As you can see, solar is anything but "CLEAN" and makes us dependent on other nations to mine toxic minerals for our energy needs. In addition to the VCEA putting us at the mercy of other nations' resources, it has also made us more dependent on other states, mainly West Virginia and Pennsylvania. Since the passage of the VCEA in 2020, nine power plants have shut down across Virginia, and we have become the #1 importer of electricity in the nation, importing an astounding 40% from across state lines. What makes this even more concerning is that in just the last year alone, the cost of imported energy has increased almost TENFOLD. This is financially unsustainable for households and businesses.
---
| | | |
---
| | So just how much is the Democrats' 'Virginia Clean Economy Act' costing you?
---
| |
---
| | Since 2024, the average Dominion residential power bill has increased by 11%. A proposed $631 million rate increase by Dominion is set to be imposed by 2026, further raising bills each month. A study done by the Center of the American Experiment estimated that the VCEA will cost Virginians an additional $203 billion through 2050, or $1,770 per customer EACH YEAR across all ratepayers. This hits low and fixed income households the hardest. Many Virginians are spending up to 10% of their income just to keep the lights on and temperature comfortable in their homes.
---
| | | |
---
| | What is the solution?
---
| | [](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/36PWPv_aR/c?w=4wVMRjxvbaj4A6CacjYewPSVX0y6IwEctctYhARrIZ0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9XV1cuSEFNSUxUT05GT1JWSVJHSU5JQS5DT00iLCJyIjoiOGI3Y2FkZWMtOGE4Ny00YzY5LWFlZWYtYjE4MWMyNWJjOTQwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0)
---
| | Ultimately, we must repeal the VCEA! This is the long-term solution. To do this, common-sense conservatives MUST regain control of the House of Delegates this November AND the Governor's mansion. Then, we must win a majority of seats in the Senate in 2027. Until then, Abigail Spanberger and the rest of the Democrats have shown that they will double down on the failing VCEA and subsidize its shortcomings with your tax dollars. Each year Democrats are in power, your dollar has less power, as you see your electric bill and the cost of goods and services increase. Republicans must propose legislation to:
1. Ensure utility providers are transparent in showing the actual cost breakdown on consumer's bills. Utility rate adjustments tied to state mandates should be reviewed by the legislature.
2. Promote market-based competition and an even playing field (without subsidies), which will ultimately provide the most reliable and affordable energy for Virginians.
3. Protect Virginians from energy rationing and meter control attempted by the state.
4. Prevent the state from overriding local zoning decisions.
5. Require an independent power grid assessment before any source of energy is retired. Energy stability must take precedence over political agendas.

---
| | | |
---
| | I look forward to championing common-sense efforts to make energy more affordable and reliable here in the Commonwealth. As your Delegate, I will be a problem-solver and deliver for the practical needs of Culpeper, Orange, Madison, and Greene. I’m asking you—fellow Patriot and free thinker—to stand with me! Every dollar you contribute directly fuels this fight. Your financial support empowers me to spread this message, rally thousands of like-minded Virginians, and win this crucial battle for our future. Join me. Chip in today, and let’s take our Commonwealth back[!](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/36PWPv_aR/c?w=RQIerq4XaKoOThBx1ypzbBgrVbKGBM_Klrauk9Eu9gA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGFtaWx0b25mb3J2aXJnaW5pYS5jb20vbWVldC1rYXJlbiIsInIiOiI2YWUwZmE0NS1iNDNkLTQxNGUtYjFiOS01MWJlN2VhYjY5MzkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)

If we remain on the current trajectory, as Democrats intend to, we could see Virginia experience grid failures the likes of which we've never seen. Worst of all, these failures could impact us in times of peak energy demand and dangerous weather, when we need it the most. As Governor Youngkin succinctly stated, "We will be California in the summer and Texas in the winter." Democrats have prioritized carbon reductions above the safety and needs of those they're elected to serve. In June, the Thomas Jefferson Institute for Public Policy shared a chart from PJM regional energy market depicting the fuel breakdown used on a recent day at noon. | | | | As you can see above, five years into the disastrous VCEA, two-thirds of our electricity demand on a hot summer day is produced by coal, oil, and natural gas. Almost one quarter of the energy came from nuclear sources, and the heavily subsidized solar and wind energies fulfilled less than 10% of our electricity needs. Despite the reality of our energy demands, Democrats remain stubbornly devoted to their pipedream of forcing Virginia onto 100% renewables that don't do the job and are costing YOU, the taxpayer, BILLIONS of dollars. Wind is known to be unreliable in both hot and cold extremes, and solar generation only occurs during daylight, leading to inconsistent output from both. Then, there's the issue of energy storage. Solar energy is collected and stored in lithium-ion batteries, which are EXPENSIVE and....go figure....NOT GREEN! Batteries used for solar storage are made from lithium, cobalt, nickel, and graphite. The process of acquiring these minerals requires hard rock mining, consumes significant amounts of water (500,000 gallons/ton), disrupts land, creating more waste than useful material (150 tons of waste/ton), and, IRONICALLY, emits up to 20 tons of CO2/ton. As you can see, solar is anything but "CLEAN" and makes us dependent on other nations to mine toxic minerals for our energy needs. In addition to the VCEA putting us at the mercy of other nations' resources, it has also made us more dependent on other states, mainly West Virginia and Pennsylvania. Since the passage of the VCEA in 2020, nine power plants have shut down across Virginia, and we have become the #1 importer of electricity in the nation, importing an astounding 40% from across state lines. What makes this even more concerning is that in just the last year alone, the cost of imported energy has increased almost TENFOLD. This is financially unsustainable for households and businesses. | | | | | | So just how much is the Democrats' 'Virginia Clean Economy Act' costing you? | | | | Since 2024, the average Dominion residential power bill has increased by 11%. A proposed $631 million rate increase by Dominion is set to be imposed by 2026, further raising bills each month. A study done by the Center of the American Experiment estimated that the VCEA will cost Virginians an additional $203 billion through 2050, or $1,770 per customer EACH YEAR across all ratepayers. This hits low and fixed income households the hardest. Many Virginians are spending up to 10% of their income just to keep the lights on and temperature comfortable in their homes. | | | | | | What is the solution? | | | | Ultimately, we must repeal the VCEA! This is the long-term solution. To do this, common-sense conservatives MUST regain control of the House of Delegates this November AND the Governor's mansion. Then, we must win a majority of seats in the Senate in 2027. Until then, Abigail Spanberger and the rest of the Democrats have shown that they will double down on the failing VCEA and subsidize its shortcomings with your tax dollars. Each year Democrats are in power, your dollar has less power, as you see your electric bill and the cost of goods and services increase. Republicans must propose legislation to: 1. Ensure utility providers are transparent in showing the actual cost breakdown on consumer's bills. Utility rate adjustments tied to state mandates should be reviewed by the legislature. 2. Promote market-based competition and an even playing field (without subsidies), which will ultimately provide the most reliable and affordable energy for Virginians. 3. Protect Virginians from energy rationing and meter control attempted by the state. 4. Prevent the state from overriding local zoning decisions. 5. Require an independent power grid assessment before any source of energy is retired. Energy stability must take precedence over political agendas. | | | | | | I look forward to championing common-sense efforts to make energy more affordable and reliable here in the Commonwealth. As your Delegate, I will be a problem-solver and deliver for the practical needs of Culpeper, Orange, Madison, and Greene. I’m asking you—fellow Patriot and free thinker—to stand with me! Every dollar you contribute directly fuels this fight. Your financial support empowers me to spread this message, rally thousands of like-minded Virginians, and win this crucial battle for our future. Join me. Chip in today, and let’s take our Commonwealth back | | | | | | | | | | | | | Resources:Center of the American ExperimentThomas Jefferson Institute | | You can find out more about me at: Member Joe Short, Town of Culpeper | | | | Find me on social media | | | This email was sent from .

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Will you support my friends at GIFFORDS today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need leaders who will fight like hell for commonsense solutions
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=1&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)
---
Hey friend, Governor Gretchen Whitmer here, reaching out on behalf of my friend Gabby Giffords, and we need your help today.
I am asking you to make your first donation to GIFFORDS before midnight tonight. They are working tirelessly to save more lives from gun violence, and your grassroots donations will help power their work across the country.
If that’s all you need to hear, you can pitch in using this link:
**[https://go.giffords.org/go/support-giffords](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=2&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)**
Let me explain why I’m asking.
Gun violence is a uniquely American problem that impacts far too many people. It is the #1 killer of children and teens in our country -- more than car crashes and cancer. But it doesn’t have to be this way.
We have the power to change this: Commonsense gun laws -- including universal background checks, red flag laws, and closing loopholes -- help us keep guns out of the hands of violent criminals.
They are called commonsense gun laws for a reason: It’s because they work. They keep our communities safer and an overwhelming majority of Americans support them.
But Republicans in Congress are going the other way, and their “big beautiful bill” passed last month makes it easier for dangerous people to get their hands on gun silencers.
**That’s unacceptable. We need leaders who will fight like hell to protect Americans from gun violence -- not put their lives in jeopardy. And if they don’t want to support commonsense solutions and save lives, then we need to work together to vote them out of office. **
[**GIFFORDS is leading the gun safety movement. They aren’t afraid to stand up to Republicans and special interest groups to pass commonsense gun safety laws, but they need more help. Will you join me in supporting their work now with a grassroots donation?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=3&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&amount=3&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=22&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-aug25.8KHFUP&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=23&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-aug25.J5-c7V&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=24&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-aug25.DZaPyu&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=25&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-aug25.Yj6wVz&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=26&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=27&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)**
---
****
The time for only thoughts and prayers is over. We need to take action on gun violence and save lives.
Thank you for fighting alongside myself, Gabby, and GIFFORDS.
Gretchen Whitmer
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250806-1-b&t=28&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=10750%2E3935704%2Eg5PoDv) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“The Second World Wars.”](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5c525982c3204bcbb33461ffa13943ce&_e=jO0AYw_JvMs0H6ncV43xte6GtOa7t9PMAUSN7NTQIdzukTYtUjMa8Rrd0oQFG73oz5DZMqxHpFoRyDhxekuX0wFkDXvINuNYM7REayKOz6CmHaA5PLOZeJAzE7dMDBJDSKcR8VFSlUwzW2rpX3hsTjT1U1-AWWTeKW7Gr14U2r_27s1Qf7kSkT-Wq1ctOM-UnD8972cmWWYkuR0_be9SLNBD8Gf_Pf2x81PH5AR6o708mRd8SqqemoKTvzGTaHBXBcc3skieR1tkVJ8SQenKqHUJGxItg5Uww5GZ2G4ZUvsKYHSEDDGLUevHzoDQUCKlbjc6FSBXp5ZAeTMDgZI1d2GKRnvvzPuehxGsk7WU9T94dxzHdSN-rWS7vJmBJYPOPKOgwFmbWcfoILa8bBzMM3CnnSAHJk2f_ocdGqmaJ3bX5CDIXJsdku5pMvdpBA7UVyvenzHl5PezJeXvKVWgyMYNLAck6_jzm7WEUMS58Cj70s1PaoSS6IKlIoFvU7fldTRettUf-HZ475IdUdkfEPuXZhhwSNC3KtDlBLUMou2-NepNBut-3AdxbckffbrMpUFkXAmMVd-fQVUgLz6Znp0YaQbTi1E7QZ2nVZqqR0LCo0sYXqdKjSRWjZVnLjTTn5HTvNhQOhgtHsf8IJaQlvUBNR6aFAeZTJgmdtJ4B0UKuFWZ7kue3UN_4Z4M53oXpJKwQ4FWLJXxbbj6PazFmnDf407JGUlcP-LclNMp7jt_jIHY8_6R7VK1ReXzYFpl) And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax‐deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited‐edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. clean_body: Allied and Axis investments and strategies repeated... A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax‐deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited‐edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

body:
Dear Peter,
After years of courageous support, I was just informed that it's your intention to leave us right before our BIGGEST deadline of the year?
[It’s Mark from House GOP – and I am praying that I can change your mind before you tarnish your perfect record of support.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/JaaoQp-GTiKibXxZwl1ga8-bp6QuaMPmnfaRHZtqMb3PikwXsByejzRFYaWLIgpfzeRZyiaZxmwhNHtzebmgs5tb3_nINPAghi02UGzcaG--7wM-IDxVwYXE3kZxZIbSPsxx5z8nG3Uy8sx5KMsgjzWSTS0jdbelMOLYyO4VlzxUtbByR7hR5MHtyO9nWM_olqcZz0zgqGGjqVMKHPxt7a4pERh6FhLY55SmfNKcWhUjruXxoLp5RrJU3bLNeOE4zfRoq3htrqUlskqTHMr0_NlBODkg5OZGyn6bjtfEUuubmAZA-A6tr8_QbGfPeikclwJe1YytcoUj3dhCwxTVmjHynnF9OrE3UfZvquc80YrLLIpHDJURQQrBpG2s8BDdxoU5lWnvy8jxu-ZFAx-kl-rkh8YGq-5lNvbTRYjx2sjZmOIsEoWq1289U_RAfHk86eY40YX282rwNFijUC1AnxsmRM25S_PeZmIIG7-LcC2kCgE4Q7Tf0exUxoEd1QIY9hMst_q9p0QPWPM64jefuPw4aqD0rn-eAyfH5XopSSxQtCZN_7gGVg-p3Mto1_-Im6zYMUrj95PIgh6pcu0uWlz5bR5_6FfdbYLPEGG3bXvUegUESnxwUdejHKUXJzN2IS5CfmYboiW1pBwFRoksHak3HqENzwwj3UILEkhs5cIOLijK7e-QCF2o8a-HICvqkE9AXQ7F8fdD1TCPR5hum3V6BxCW9rOJaOybZ-BtDUVwDxhiu4jrO6A1MCFhZhsAQ71NETro50pQZuSnmuveBK-C4xJNbJBNZT_gQm3yRRKRqm-0epMN8cZG9A5VS0CktSwGZh1bk1EQ7tSU7KDeEmwC19TF_gsUE6VfVzhEoKhRBPXeYUmn/cAKrQ4KYZpFTbtYMMtc-PsGrWsP1ulPh/11)
Here are 3 reasons why you should renew your House GOP Membership IMMEDIATELY!
1\. Dems are on an all-out, riot-fueled fundraising spree and we're struggling to keep up. 2\. The GOP Trifecta is in GRAVE-DANGER. Lawfare, impeachments, judicial activism, and sanctuary city REVOLTS are slowing down our plans to FULLY ENACT THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA. We need 4 STRAIGHT YEARS of a GOP Trifecta if we want to save our country.
3\. June 30th is the halfway point of 2025 and our most critical End-of-Quarter deadline of 2025. In just a few days, we have to go public with our fundraising numbers and we NEED to come out on top to prove that the Will of the People is still behind House GOP and the America First movement.
After all we've been through together & after everything you've done to defend our country from the radical left, the last thing I want to do is mark your supporter record as "INACTIVE."

The GOP Trifecta is in GRAVE-DANGER. Lawfare, impeachments, judicial activism, and sanctuary city REVOLTS are slowing down our plans to FULLY ENACT THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA. We need 4 STRAIGHT YEARS of a GOP Trifecta if we want to save our country. 3\. June 30th is the halfway point of 2025 and our most critical End-of-Quarter deadline of 2025. subject: One of Trump’s Cruelest Sins Was Preying on Families Who Just Want a Child
body:
Trump promised free IVF treatments to desperate families. He lied.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..rG7pjwr1o5xyekw3tsunAUFCByYF9bHxMS9_bs6z-IY?) for more

# [One of Trump's Cruelest Sins Was Preying on Families Who Just Want a Child](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=170262033&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMjYyMDMzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ0OTMwMjcsImV4cCI6MTc1NzA4NTAyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Gnz_YNTRdL_U_VE0WnGs7w7cAeMQzbl6m8ABNVvKdsE)
### Trump promised free IVF treatments to desperate families. He lied.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Aug 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=170262033&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMjYyMDMzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NDQ5MzAyNywiZXhwIjoxNzU3MDg1MDI3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Iq4Vs2a-bUVS1eOfBTbZzD6keckww3EH3W_EDtw6FIs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=170262033&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwMjYyMDMzLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ0OTMwMjcsImV4cCI6MTc1NzA4NTAyNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Gnz_YNTRdL_U_VE0WnGs7w7cAeMQzbl6m8ABNVvKdsE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/one-of-trumps-cruelest-sins-was-preying?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18762dcc-1fbf-4f05-8ec1-14ab27eb47cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump has committed a hell of a lot of sins since stepping into political life. But one in particular that I carry closest to my heart is how he preyed on people who are desperate to have kids--people fighting through the agony of infertility just to grow a family.
It didn't get the attention it deserved this weekend, but Trump straight-up abandoned his campaign promise to make IVF treatments free for every American. He pitched it during the campaign--something many of us called bullshit on from the start, because it didn't line up ideologically and felt like a stunt--but the media treated it like a serious, good-faith promise. And apparently, a lot of voters in the middle believed him. People in the suburbs, especially women deeply uneasy with Trump, saw that promise and gave him the benefit of the doubt. It moved votes. It made a difference.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..X501UyHfV_cjLZU5CrwpvOjihkdsSKBDpDwmfBg7WWo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170262033)
I write this with a heavy heart because I'm thinking about the four miscarriages my wife endured over the past few years. She went through absolute hell to have the one son we do have through IVF. He's our miracle. We gave him a name that means "gift from God" because that's what he is to us. And I don't think anything in my life has wounded me more than what happened during our second pregnancy--when we went in one week and everything looked good, and the next week there was no heartbeat.
His name was Zeke, by the way.
I've lost people. I've buried family and friends. But nothing compares to that kind of grief. That raw, desperate, powerless grief. And it's that pain that fuels my rage--because I know how many families are carrying that same grief. And I know how cruel it is for someone like Trump to exploit it for votes, knowing full well he never planned to lift a damn finger.
There are so many Americans for whom the dream is simple: buy a home, start a family, build a life that means something. It's a beautiful, deeply human dream. We spend so much time talking about identity and what it means to be a Democrat, and for me, nothing defines me more than being a dad. It's the best thing I've ever done. It's a privilege and a joy and a calling.
And no, parenting isn't for everyone--and that's okay. But for those of us who want it, who fight for it, who endure years of pain and loss for it? It's everything. It's the reason I fight. It's part of who I am.
So yeah, I'm furious. Because Trump used that dream, that pain, that desperation, and he weaponized it. He lied. He made a promise he never meant to keep. He signed one pathetic, performative executive order, and then he walked away. And when the press pushed him on it, they shrugged. They passed a bloated budget that slashed taxes for billionaires, added $4 trillion to the deficit, kicked 20 million people off their health care, and stripped 18 million kids of school food assistance--and somehow couldn't find a damn dime to fund the IVF promise he made.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..X501UyHfV_cjLZU5CrwpvOjihkdsSKBDpDwmfBg7WWo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170262033)
He didn't even try. That's how little he thought of the people who believed him. People who were vulnerable. People who were hurting.
And yeah, I know some of you saw through it. You'll say, "Well, I didn't believe him." Fine. I'm not here to go after you. A lot of Americans are just trying to figure out who's actually going to help them. And to his credit, Trump at least _saw_ those people. He saw their need and made a play for it. In bad faith, sure--but he acknowledged it.
And now? Democrats should pick up that torch. Call out what he did--call it what it was--but don't stop there. Pick up the cause. Make those people feel seen, heard, and loved. Because I promise you, there are a hell of a lot of Americans feeling the same ache I feel right now.
I've got a six-year-old boy at home who lights up my life just by existing. And I know so many people are still waiting for that miracle. They deserve a government that sees them. That fights for them. That doesn't use their pain to score points and then toss them aside.
This is a chance for Democrats to reclaim the narrative. To remember who we're supposed to be fighting for--working people, families, people just trying to build something decent out of this life.
Because the American mythos is breaking. Many people don't believe they'll ever buy a home. Or raise a family. Or retire with dignity. Let alone take a damn vacation. And those basic hopes--those shared dreams--are what could bring us back together.
Politics can be messy. But at its core, it's simple: help people live with purpose and dignity.
Trump saw a real need. He dangled a promise. Then he ghosted the people who needed it most. And we can't let that be the end of the story. We can take that ball and run with it. We can give people something real to believe in again.
And if you're out there right now--struggling with infertility, feeling betrayed, feeling broken--I see you. I'm thinking about you. I love you.
You're not alone.
_I 'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..X501UyHfV_cjLZU5CrwpvOjihkdsSKBDpDwmfBg7WWo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=170262033)

It’s officially been 6 months since President Trump was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States.
**The majority of Republicans have gone**** _SILENT_****on this poll to show their support for President Trump!**

clean_body: | | Just when we thought things in Texas couldn't get more extreme, we've unfortunately got more bad news. Now, they 're trying to erase elected Democrats from office entirely. Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton just announced he 's going to court to have the Democratic lawmakers who broke quorum legally removed from their seats. Let 's be clear: this isn't about procedure. This is about power. These Democrats walked out because they didn't have any other tools left to stop a rigged redistricting map -- one designed by Trump allies to destroy fair representation. And now, the GOP is trying to punish them by wiping them off the political map for good. They issued arrest warrants earlier this week. Now they want to end their careers. If we let this happen in Texas, it won't stop there. Other extremist governors and attorneys general will take notes -- and try it in their own states. That 's why we're not backing down. No Dem Left Behind is doubling our work in Texas. We're organizing in rural areas, getting resources to districts the GOP wants to erase, and standing up for lawmakers who refuse to surrender to authoritarian tactics. They want to kick out the people's representatives so they can redraw democracy in their own image. We won't let them. In solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team | \--FORWARDED EMAIL-- Friends, Did you see our email about Texas? Well, there's an update... This is no longer a drill. The Texas GOP has officially issued arrest warrants for the Democratic lawmakers who walked out to stop their corrupt redistricting plan. These lawmakers are risking everything -- their freedom, their safety, their careers -- to block a Trump-backed power grab that would silence voters across Texas. And now, Republicans are using the power of the state to try to crush them into submission. | This is authoritarian behavior. Plain and simple. No Dem Left Behind is officially shifting focus -- we are going all in to help in Texas. We're standing with these brave Democrats. We're organizing in the rural communities that the GOP thinks they've already locked down. And we're not letting this stand. They're trying to arrest our democracy in real time. We cannot afford to be quiet. Standing together, No Dem Left Behind | \--FORWARDED EMAIL-- Friends, What 's happening in Texas right now should scare the hell out of anyone who cares about democracy. Trump's allies in Texas are forcing through a brutal, corrupt redistricting plan that would hand them almost every congressional seat in the state, even in districts where they lose elections. They're not even pretending to play fair. This isn't about representation. It's about raw power. It's about silencing millions of voters by slicing up their districts until their votes don't count. And because Democrats don 't have the votes to stop it, they made the only move they had left: they walked out. Left the Capitol. Denied the GOP the quorum it needs to force this through. Now, those lawmakers are under active threat from Governor Greg Abbott, who 's made it clear he's willing to punish them for standing up. He's already threatened to treat their absence as a forfeiture of elected office. | All for trying to protect your voice -- and your vote. This is a Trump-backed scheme to rewrite the rules and take control, not just of Texas, but of Congress. If they get away with it in one state, they'll do it everywhere. This isn't left vs. right. It's democracy vs. corruption. And there's no one else coming to save us. In the fight, The No Dem Left Behind Team | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23609794.12300.1.a1c58eda5fa9f1be08fe0aa43085c28d) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23609794.12301.1.be153f711a82535116980187dddf6378)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23609794.12302.1.1558b00adc79a3899253ee096459485f)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23609794.12303.1.7047bd13386ce8e1327633cbfd87ca04). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23609794.12304.1.69bac849af8935b2a680f07cedc39ea3) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23609794.12305.1.c888eb3cf33b7f06c21c38ba6ad542c1) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23609794.12306.1.aa1ada82ca86d442e38352fced83dc67) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

Friend,
---
The Democrats and the Deep State have me caught in their snare.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being **JAILED** for the rest of my life, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the _ONE_ _THING_ that can save me: **_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU_**.
---

subject: They would rather a veteran suffer severely than receive an abortion
body:
URGENT: Tell the VA NOT to ban abortion | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112843055/561795335/2141984067?sourceid=1150842&utm_campaign=26emeus-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTE3NjI0MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psZWPioXiQN-QvzOqu5qQFp3efmoErfXhYCCXhEr-ko=&emci=9cea01a1-6a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a176241-d872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112843056/561795336/2141984067?sourceid=1150842&utm_campaign=26emeus-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTE3NjI0MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psZWPioXiQN-QvzOqu5qQFp3efmoErfXhYCCXhEr-ko=&emci=9cea01a1-6a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a176241-d872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

The Trump administration is trying to ban abortion care for veterans and their families—even in cases of rape, incest, or health emergencies. This dangerous policy would block care for millions who access health care through the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) and would only permit a narrow exception to save the life of a pregnant veteran. These kinds of exceptions to save a person's life often don't work in reality.

[**This proposed rule would be one of the most extreme abortion bans in the country, applying to millions of veterans and their families, even in states where abortion is protected.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112843057/561795337/1426715184?sourceid=1150842&utm_campaign=26emeus-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTE3NjI0MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psZWPioXiQN-QvzOqu5qQFp3efmoErfXhYCCXhEr-ko=&emci=9cea01a1-6a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a176241-d872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [**CONTACT THE VA**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112843058/561795338/1426715184?sourceid=1150842&utm_campaign=26emeus-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTE3NjI0MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psZWPioXiQN-QvzOqu5qQFp3efmoErfXhYCCXhEr-ko=&emci=9cea01a1-6a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a176241-d872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "CONTACT THE VA")
---
If finalized, this policy would restrict access to abortion care and counseling for the people who served our country, many of whom are already navigating trauma, PTSD, and high rates of sexual violence.

The VA is accepting public comments on this proposed change through September 3, 2025. **This is our chance to speak out and stop it before it becomes law.[ Tell the VA: Veterans deserve full access to reproductive health care.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112843059/561795339/1426715184?sourceid=1150842&utm_campaign=26emeus-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTE3NjI0MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psZWPioXiQN-QvzOqu5qQFp3efmoErfXhYCCXhEr-ko=&emci=9cea01a1-6a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a176241-d872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)**
[**SUBMIT YOUR COMMENT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112843060/561795340/1426715184?sourceid=1150842&utm_campaign=26emeus-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTE3NjI0MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psZWPioXiQN-QvzOqu5qQFp3efmoErfXhYCCXhEr-ko=&emci=9cea01a1-6a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a176241-d872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "SUBMIT YOUR COMMENT")
---
More than two million women veterans live in the U.S. today, and there are also thousands of transgender men as well as non-binary veterans who might need abortion care. Additionally, over 700,000 family members of veterans get their care from the VA. They all deserve access to the full range of reproductive health care, including abortion.

[**This rule is the Trump administration's first regulatory move to proactively take away abortion rights from people nationwide, and it's a warning sign of what's to come.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112843061/561795341/1426715184?sourceid=1150842&utm_campaign=26emeus-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=comment&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTE3NjI0MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psZWPioXiQN-QvzOqu5qQFp3efmoErfXhYCCXhEr-ko=&emci=9cea01a1-6a72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6a176241-d872-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)

Thank you for taking action,

Center for Reproductive Rights

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: it’s urgent, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, it’s critically important that I explain to you what’s going on behind the scenes in our fight for the House majority

---
| | [_Peter, I don’t normally send you emails this long. However, it’s critically important that I explain to you what’s going on behind the scenes in our fight for the House majority. If you have a minute, I hope you’ll read my entire message and learn exactly what’s at stake. If you’re short on time, could you rush in $15 right now? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112843398/561796332/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250806_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI1YmY5MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62SIzAtYfu9W0x1yPZBbbxyFxEonoszT-mXE03VTIp0=)
* * *
Peter, Donald Trump just launched an enormous effort to defeat us and grow his MAGA Trifecta. [_I’m calling for a swift and powerful outpouring of grassroots support – 2,537 donations before midnight – to outraise Trump’s billionaire donors, defend every Democrat in our battleground races and flip the House blue. Can I count on your urgent support before midnight? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112843400/561796333/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250806_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI1YmY5MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62SIzAtYfu9W0x1yPZBbbxyFxEonoszT-mXE03VTIp0=)
* * *
[_New York Times: “Trump, Term-Limited, Amasses $200 Million War Chest for Political Ambitions”_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112843402/561796335/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250806_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI1YmY5MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62SIzAtYfu9W0x1yPZBbbxyFxEonoszT-mXE03VTIp0=) Peter, news just broke that Trump raked in nearly $200 million this year to cement his power. Here’s the truth: Trump is putting together a massive war chest to flood battleground districts with misleading ads, defeat our Democratic candidates and expand his MAGA majority. We cannot let him get away with it. [_Peter, it will take an immediate surge of grassroots support – 2,537 donations before midnight – to keep up with his haul and take back the House majority. Could you spare $15 to help us fight back at this critical time? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112843404/561796336/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250806_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI1YmY5MS1kODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62SIzAtYfu9W0x1yPZBbbxyFxEonoszT-mXE03VTIp0=)
* * *

---

_**Redistricting Roulette: **_

**How Texas GOP's Newly Drawn Districts Targets Latino Voters**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 25
| Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid go deep on the **redistricting wars** heating up across the country. Texas Republicans have unveiled **a bold new map designed to create more Latino-majority districts** —but is it a strategic play or a dangerous overreach? Chuck breaks down how **the new lines threaten key Democratic seats** , while Mike warns that **Republicans may be betting too hard on the Latino rightward shift**.

Meanwhile, **California Democrats** are considering a mid-decade redistricting maneuver of their own—**despite the state’s voter-approved safeguards**. Mike sounds the alarm on what he calls a **“triple-bank-shot” power grab** that risks backfiring in both politics and principle.
---
|
---
| | | |

clean_body: Redistricting Roulette: How Texas GOP's Newly Drawn Districts Targets Latino Voters | Season 2025, Episode 25 | | | | | | | | | | | "Redistricting Roulette: How Texas GOP's Newly Drawn Districts Targets Latino Voters" Redistricting Roulette: How Texas GOP's Newly Drawn Districts Targets Latino Voters The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 25 | Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid go deep on the redistricting wars heating up across the country. Texas Republicans have unveiled a bold new map designed to create more Latino-majority districts —but is it a strategic play or a dangerous overreach? Chuck breaks down how the new lines threaten key Democratic seats , while Mike warns that Republicans may be betting too hard on the Latino rightward shift. Meanwhile, California Democrats are considering a mid-decade redistricting maneuver of their own—despite the state’s voter-approved safeguards. Mike sounds the alarm on what he calls a “triple-bank-shot” power grab that risks backfiring in both politics and principle. | | | | | Today's Headlines: By: Punchbowl News By: Politico By: Georgia Recorder By: KQED By: CNN By: CBS News By: The New York Times By: The Guardian By: The Los Angeles Times By: The Guardian By: The Washington Post By: The New York Times By: The Texas Tribune By: Enlace Latino NC By: Axios By: The Guardian By: News From the States By: ABC News By: CBS News By: The Washington Post By: Florida Politics By: The Hill By: The Guardian By: Miami Herald By: Politico By: KOLD 13 News By: Fortune | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ¡Bienvenidos Todos! name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: An update on what’s happening in Texas →
body:
---
Derek, here's the latest on what's happening in Texas: Trump and his allies are worried about their ability to hold the House majority fair and square, so they’ve attempted to rewrite the rules by gerrymandering Texas’ map, giving Republicans FIVE more congressional seats. Democrats are doing everything they can to stop them. **Earlier this week, Texas House Democrats broke quorum, left the state, and stopped the clock on this dangerous gerrymandering attempt.**[But the fight isn’t over. We have to keep doing everything in our power to stop Trump and Republicans from rigging maps to save themselves in the midterms. Please split $10 between the Texas Democratic Party and the DNC to support our efforts:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?refcode=em_20250806_4194_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4194_22930333_5QtuHS&akid=4194%2E22930333%2E5QtuHS)**

Thousands of Texans showed up to hearings to express opposition to the gerrymandered maps. They see the map for what it is: a textbook case of politicians picking their voters so they can ignore the will of the people.
But Derek, this is about more than just one map in one state. It’s about protecting our democracy. And it’s about coming together to stand up to authoritarian tactics _everywhere._
With your help, we will.
Thank you for standing with us on this,
The Democrats

Wow — did you see this?! California Democratic Party Chair Rusty Hicks took the fight directly to the California Republican Party.
Just recently, the California GOP Chair came out and absurdly defended Donald Trump’s chaotic, heartless immigration policies. She even had the nerve to suggest that NOBODY has been deported except convicted criminals.
Rusty went on TV to correct the record . Here’s a snippet of what he said: 📣
“The reality is when Stephen Miller calls for 3,000 deportations a day, masked ICE agents have no choice but to run through the streets and grab anyone and everyone they can find."We are California Strong. We aren’t going to fall for propaganda or blatant misinformation. And when we see it out there — from President Trump, or the California GOP Chair — we are going to call it out every time. But misinformation spreads quickly — getting the facts out takes work. That’s why it’s so important that we keep our Rapid Response Fight Fund fully funded. Will you pitch in a donation today? Friend,
This weekend, the “tolerant left” **once again defaced the front of our building** —etching “MAGA C**KS MUST DIE” into the glass of the Republican Party of Virginia’s headquarters.
Why? Because they’re **desperate.** They know they’re losing ground across the Commonwealth, so they resort to vandalism and intimidation.
Let us be clear: **they will not silence us.**
We’re leaving the graffiti up—for everyone to see exactly who we’re dealing with. These radical leftists don’t debate. They destroy. They lash out because they **can’t defend the policies** that are crushing Virginia families.
But here’s the good news: They**can deface our building, but they can’t stop the movement that’s spreading across Virginia.**
Every sign defaced, every building tagged, every cowardly act of vandalism—they all prove one thing: **we’re winning.**
**Help us fight back.** Stand with us now and show them their intimidation tactics won’t work.

clean_body: | | | | They will not silence us. Friend, This weekend, the “tolerant left” once again defaced the front of our building —etching “MAGA CKS MUST DIE” into the glass of the Republican Party of Virginia’s headquarters. Why? Because they’re desperate. They know they’re losing ground across the Commonwealth, so they resort to vandalism and intimidation. Let us be clear: they will not silence us. We’re leaving the graffiti up—for everyone to see exactly who we’re dealing with. These radical leftists don’t debate. They destroy. They lash out because they can’t defend the policies that are crushing Virginia families. But here’s the good news: Theycan deface our building, but they can’t stop the movement that’s spreading across Virginia. Every sign defaced, every building tagged, every cowardly act of vandalism—they all prove one thing: we’re winning. Help us fight back. Stand with us now and show them their intimidation tactics won’t work. | We’re not backing down. Not now. Not ever. For Virginia, Ken Nunnenkamp Executive Director** Republican Party of Virginia | \- = PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

After 9/11, I joined the Army as an Infantry Officer and spent five years on active duty. I served in Iraq, Afghanistan, and in the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery. **Since 2015, I’ve been at the tip-of-the-spear in the Senate for the America First agenda. ** **I’ve supported every single one of President Trump’s policies** to secure our border, deport illegals, fix inflation, make our country safer and stronger — because they’re good for Arkansas and good for America.

I’ve also got a target on my back: The Democrats are coming after me with everything they have, and they’ll spend millions to defeat me before it’s all over. Keep reading for more: I’m a sixth-generation Arkansan, born and raised on my family’s cattle farm in Yell County. After 9/11, I joined the Army as an Infantry Officer and spent five years on active duty. I served in Iraq, Afghanistan, and in the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery. Since 2015, I’ve been at the tip-of-the-spear in the Senate for the America First agenda. I’ve supported every single one of President Trump’s policies to secure our border, deport illegals, fix inflation, make our country safer and stronger — because they’re good for Arkansas and good for America. So of course the Democrats are coming after me. My opponent is attacking me for being too pro-Trump. For caring too much about putting America First. Seriously. These liberals know that if they defeat me in Arkansas, they’ll take back the Senate. And we know what’ll happen next: — > The border reopened — > Inflation through the roof again — > President Trump impeached for a third time The only way Democrats have a shot at defeating me is if strong conservatives like you sleep on this race. We can’t open the door to Democrats flipping Arkansas and ending our Majority. I’m ready to slam it shut and end this scheme, but I need reinforcements. I need strong conservatives like you.
