name: Picture this
subject: Did we just LOSE Pennsylvania for good!?
body:
This isn’t just about one state. It’s about the rule of law. It’s about free and fair elections. It’s about stopping Trump and his enablers from rigging the system before the next vote is even cast.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014C-j-F3pI3Zf2o13vvwgxp-OtOA3zkLavELUwOohxiJlvtooYz9FOZMChuQIFemwjvKypWD5F8fxmmUhDrr5nGgtpuErWS08EEyFXnUi60Hg1PXjJmi8FpSwzqoCXOyK44lzjxblh-mAR8z2GX36H-4CfjNwd5nSBbyGUpBuk3OSysBfId4xHgp1CIkd5Ii4pmnZGgRf2Fdgko2VqMqUP6cI61ZrdG5LnQysNCvdbaU=&c=cX6FGtGFNi1_TKYIKqMe4upFX1VHjBOWLymiQ2pNIncM3tWRMmNkXA==&ch=fQslJ5HgWPQXxztnP1n17Rcg9joGIJtSkuPgIHl9e2z-zNlJE0GuwQ==)
---
| Peter,
Imagine it's the morning after Election Day -- November 5th, 2025.
You open your phone. The first headline you see: "Democrats Lose Control of Pennsylvania Supreme Court in Low-Turnout Election."
No one really saw it coming. Most voters didn't even know it was happening. And while our side slept, MAGA operatives seized the moment.
Suddenly, everything starts to move in reverse. Pennsylvania's congressional map, once competitive, is redrawn to eliminate Democratic strongholds. Communities that have fought for fair representation for decades wake up to find themselves cracked, carved up, and silenced.
Voting rights advocates try to fight back -- but now they're facing a court stacked with MAGA loyalists. Legal challenges are tossed. Mail-in ballots are thrown out. New restrictions are upheld without hesitation.
Meanwhile, right-wing lawmakers waste no time moving forward on legislation to outlaw abortion in Pennsylvania, knowing full well there's no longer a majority on the bench to stop them.
And as we look toward the 2026 midterms and the 2028 presidential race, one thing becomes painfully clear: the most critical swing state in the country is no longer a battleground. It's a fortress -- and MAGA controls the drawbridge.
That's the world we're fighting to prevent. And make no mistake, we are dangerously close to losing this fight.
Right now, we're just three months out from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election. And while Republicans are flooding the zone with dark money and right-wing operatives, Democrats are sleepwalking into disaster.
This isn't just about one state. It's about the rule of law. It's about free and fair elections. It's about stopping Trump and his enablers from rigging the system before the next vote is even cast.
If we lose this race, we lose so much more than a court. We lose the last line of defense.
We still have time -- but not much. clean_body: This isn’t just about one state. It’s about the rule of law. It’s about free and fair elections. It’s about stopping Trump and his enablers from rigging the system before the next vote is even cast. | | | | | == | Peter, Imagine it's the morning after Election Day -- November 5th, 2025. You open your phone. The first headline you see: "Democrats Lose Control of Pennsylvania Supreme Court in Low-Turnout Election." No one really saw it coming. Most voters didn't even know it was happening. And while our side slept, MAGA operatives seized the moment. Suddenly, everything starts to move in reverse. Pennsylvania's congressional map, once competitive, is redrawn to eliminate Democratic strongholds. Communities that have fought for fair representation for decades wake up to find themselves cracked, carved up, and silenced. Voting rights advocates try to fight back -- but now they're facing a court stacked with MAGA loyalists. Legal challenges are tossed. Mail-in ballots are thrown out. New restrictions are upheld without hesitation. Meanwhile, right-wing lawmakers waste no time moving forward on legislation to outlaw abortion in Pennsylvania, knowing full well there's no longer a majority on the bench to stop them. And as we look toward the 2026 midterms and the 2028 presidential race, one thing becomes painfully clear: the most critical swing state in the country is no longer a battleground. It's a fortress -- and MAGA controls the drawbridge. That's the world we're fighting to prevent. And make no mistake, we are dangerously close to losing this fight. Right now, we're just three months out from the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election. And while Republicans are flooding the zone with dark money and right-wing operatives, Democrats are sleepwalking into disaster. This isn't just about one state. It's about the rule of law. It's about free and fair elections. It's about stopping Trump and his enablers from rigging the system before the next vote is even cast. If we lose this race, we lose so much more than a court. We lose the last line of defense. We still have time -- but not much. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == This is the kind of moment we'll look back on and say, "We saw it coming." The question is whether we did something about it. Let's do something. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: An Economy in Chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-06 [secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-06]
Last week, the U.S. saw an updated jobs report that showed an increase in unemployment and stagnant job growth . It’s certainly something we’ve been feeling in Maryland over the last seven months - and now this crisis is impacting the nation. Did President Trump take this as an opportunity to land on a stable trade policy that works for business owners? No.
Instead, the President doubled down and fired the Senate-confirmed head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics . It is unconscionable that when faced with hard numbers, President Trump made the decision to simply pretend they weren’t real. Shortly after the report became public, markets dived yet again, largely in response to the uncertainty that this administration provoked.
As a member of the Lowering Costs Caucus, I know that it is essential to stabilize the market, and make a place where folks want to start or grow their business and create jobs. We need to reject the Trump Administration’s chaotic tariffs and return to a strategy that works for Maryland’s small businesses and working families.
I’m ready to take a stand for an economy that works for working families. I just want to know: will you stand with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-06]

Dear Peter,
---
We may be back from Canada, but we’re not slowing down. This weekend, we’re resuming our _Revive in 25_ Tour with worship nights in Rochester, NY, and Detroit, MI! The _Revive in 25_ Tour is bringing the Gospel into America’s darkest and most broken cities—places where people have been ignored by their leaders, and where homelessness, crime, drug addiction, and poverty are strangling the population. Politicians may have forgotten or ignored America’s cities, but we haven’t! We expect God to move this weekend—because we’ve seen Him move every step of the way!
---
_**WATCH THE WEEKEND PROMO** ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎_

We just released a very special version of _“Extravagant”_ , a song we recorded in Toronto. This song perfectly captures why we came to Canada—and why we’re coming back! clean_body: The Revive in 25 Tour Continues!!| | | | | Dear Peter, We may be back from Canada, but we’re not slowing down. This weekend, we’re resuming our Revive in 25 Tour with worship nights in Rochester, NY, and Detroit, MI! The Revive in 25 Tour is bringing the Gospel into America’s darkest and most broken cities—places where people have been ignored by their leaders, and where homelessness, crime, drug addiction, and poverty are strangling the population. Politicians may have forgotten or ignored America’s cities, but we haven’t! We expect God to move this weekend—because we’ve seen Him move every step of the way! WATCH THE WEEKEND PROMO ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | WEEKEND AGENDA: REVIVE IN 25 — ROCHESTER August 8 @ 7:00 PM Parcel 5 285 East Main St Rochester, NY REVIVE IN 25 — DETROIT August 9 @ 5:00 PM Tolan Park 601 Mack Ave Detroit, MI We just released a very special version of “Extravagant” , a song we recorded in Toronto. This song perfectly captures why we came to Canada—and why we’re coming back! I have a heart for Canada because God has a heart for Canada, and no government official is going to silence a move of God! LISTEN TO EXTRAVAGENT ON ITUNES ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

* * *
While Trump wants you to think that the people he’s holding at his “Alligator Alcatraz” detention camp are criminals, many who are being detained have legal residency and NO criminal record.
Living conditions at the “detention camp” are unbearable. No legal representation, shackled for hours in the sweltering heat and swarms of mosquitoes, 32 people to a CAGE, no showers, no medications, maggot infested food, and no human rights... for people who have committed no crime. _How unAmerican!_
**We’ve identified a high-visibility billboard there on US41, the Tamiami Trail in Florida, the _only_ road leading to Alligator Alcatraz. We need to raise $3335 to post our billboard there for 4 weeks.**

clean_body: | | | ** We’re planning a billboard DENOUNCING Alligator Alcatraz on US 41 in Florida - the only road leading to ICE’s inhumane camp. While Trump wants you to think that the people he’s holding at his “Alligator Alcatraz” detention camp are criminals, many who are being detained have legal residency and NO criminal record. Living conditions at the “detention camp” are unbearable. No legal representation, shackled for hours in the sweltering heat and swarms of mosquitoes, 32 people to a CAGE, no showers, no medications, maggot infested food, and no human rights... for people who have committed no crime. How unAmerican! We’ve identified a high-visibility billboard there on US41, the Tamiami Trail in Florida, the only road leading to Alligator Alcatraz. We need to raise $3335 to post our billboard there for 4 weeks. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. There is no safety from storms, flooding or hurricanes at Trump’s Alligator Alcatraz. Detainees have been on a hunger strike for at least 10 days and there are reports of ambulances leaving there every day. | 📱Calling Rep. Kiggans! 📱
---
| The phones have been ringing off the hook at Representative Jen Kiggans' office, but no one is picking up. The residents of Virginia's 2nd Congressional District want answers that the congresswoman is unwilling to provide.
---
| | [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z6v2WjNYP2Ugnl63FSJPx5nWGmhL3zDgLmhqchtKMMdsk8-VRWt-hlS1cChVwlZaIFPUNGB8uDlhREUZhTRcL_NuUxAzaAeTrxJvrkMdyszgqBtQGes8fRTDpw05hlPtB9AHH_Ia8vv_Wqf9XFPqZVV2grfMZe2FtFyvj-_QNGwAoTWqYL13SKVHZ8YbHK6krk3BEdPzDwfBiXqMfFlRkoCBPJfCQcpliH-44GF7vE9xGtO1JY8DSr9lm-Z5hE09ZrtmZvxkQ5PjzSgJ2e_qAjHvL3gInIDjN9h1En6O9vTazsmVcms3Y7XuWmmn5pQ4&c=AgxjXkVhtUkRdK_AeuFalxrKRWPgBAATRnBSCDYk1E1a4gJYl3C5jA==&ch=tbaV5qdRj3GGZcIVGDOhlcc3BBfql5DCULGVh0qWACEmVgDwDeHzMQ==)

| This Saturday, we met with Affordable Virginia, Care In Action, the League of Conservation Voters, Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, and special guest, Martin O'Malley, to educate our community about the Republican budget and answer any questions about how these cuts will impact our community. We called on Representative Jen Kiggans-- who voted for the budget and has not held any town halls to listen to her constituents-- to face her community and hear from people whose lives will be negatively impacted by her votes.
---
| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z6v2WjNYP2Ugnl63FSJPx5nWGmhL3zDgLmhqchtKMMdsk8-VRWt-hlS1cChVwlZaIFPUNGB8uDlhREUZhTRcL_NuUxAzaAeTrxJvrkMdyszgqBtQGes8fRTDpw05hlPtB9AHH_Ia8vv_Wqf9XFPqZVV2grfMZe2FtFyvj-_QNGwAoTWqYL13SKVHZ8YbHK6krk3BEdPzDwfBiXqMfFlRkoCBPJfCQcpliH-44GF7vE9xGtO1JY8DSr9lm-Z5hE09ZrtmZvxkQ5PjzSgJ2e_qAjHvL3gInIDjN9h1En6O9vT1xEQKFwPnfKXrIcrQz1Gd&c=AgxjXkVhtUkRdK_AeuFalxrKRWPgBAATRnBSCDYk1E1a4gJYl3C5jA==&ch=tbaV5qdRj3GGZcIVGDOhlcc3BBfql5DCULGVh0qWACEmVgDwDeHzMQ==)
---
| Though invited, Representative Kiggans did not attend the event. So now, we're calling on you to pick up the phone and call Representative Kiggans and demand answers as to why she has been voting against Virginians' best interests. In an email sent out on Friday, Rep. Kiggans said that the budget would provide "real economic relief for hardworking Virginia families" and cut taxes for "every American", claims that we know to be untrue, as Virginians are already beginning to feel the adverse effects of federal policies aimed at lining the pockets of the ultra-wealthy.
---

clean_body: The phones have been ringing off the hook at Representative Jen Kiggans' office, but no one is picking up. The residents of Virginia’s 2nd Congressional District want answers that the congresswoman is | | | | | | 📱Calling Rep. Kiggans! 📱 | The phones have been ringing off the hook at Representative Jen Kiggans' office, but no one is picking up. The residents of Virginia's 2nd Congressional District want answers that the congresswoman is unwilling to provide. | | == | This Saturday, we met with Affordable Virginia, Care In Action, the League of Conservation Voters, Delegate Kelly Convirs-Fowler, and special guest, Martin O'Malley, to educate our community about the Republican budget and answer any questions about how these cuts will impact our community. We called on Representative Jen Kiggans-- who voted for the budget and has not held any town halls to listen to her constituents-- to face her community and hear from people whose lives will be negatively impacted by her votes. | == | Though invited, Representative Kiggans did not attend the event. So now, we're calling on you to pick up the phone and call Representative Kiggans and demand answers as to why she has been voting against Virginians' best interests. In an email sent out on Friday, Rep. Kiggans said that the budget would provide "real economic relief for hardworking Virginia families" and cut taxes for "every American", claims that we know to be untrue, as Virginians are already beginning to feel the adverse effects of federal policies aimed at lining the pockets of the ultra-wealthy. | | == | The people of the 2nd District voted for Representative Kiggans, and she is not representing them. It's time to start calling and hold her accountable. | == == == | | | | Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US | | | | | | |

name: Chair Steve Kerrigan
subject: We Stand With Texas Democrats!

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Hi there, Peter.
This Sunday Afternoon, August 3rd, Texas Democrats hopped on a plane and fled their state to break quorum in order to stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections.
After Donald Trump demanded that Texas Republicans redraw their state maps to ensure Republicans would pick up 5 more congressional seats, Texas Democrats sprung into action to ensure that Trump doesn’t get his way.
These Texas Democrats are doing this at great personal sacrifice. In addition to being away from their family (and jobs) for as long as this may take, they are also being fined $500/day and will be lambasted with negative ads in their district funded by Governor Greg Abbott. If they are going to be able to hold out long enough for this to count, they’re going to need our help.
Massachusetts Democrats want to show these fighters that we have their back! If you make a contribution to this email, it will be split between the Massachusetts and Texas Democratic Parties in order to help the Texas Democrats fund this very expensive fight for all of our sake.
Rush a Donation to Support Texas Democrats! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texasdemsxmassdems]
This is the fight to save democracy that Democrats have been warning about for ten years. It’s going to take all of us to ensure that this bold attempt to steal this republic does not go unchallenged.
In solidarity,
Team MassDems

name: Dash Cam
subject: [Address Needed] Where To Send Your Dash Cam
body:
I’m positive these won’t last long, so claim yours before they run out...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21751/6374453/87e230bc541ea413ec0839f2994f23013994fdff/f08c97a4be74553a30e93afe8c33a5d1852d85be)
---
| | |
---
_August 6th, 2025 at 08:52 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | Hey Reader, I got you a gift for you... Something to help protect you and your family while you’re on the road. And you’re going to want this, especially if you travel with your CCW. Because you don’t want to go to court with nothing but a story... you need solid, indisputable evidence...
**[Which is why I’m giving away 500 of my new Dash Eagle cameras at below wholesale cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21751/6374453/ea2c388d38b447a932c8361ba1806a841304caf9/f08c97a4be74553a30e93afe8c33a5d1852d85be)** Every time you hit the road, you’ll have an HD dashboard camera to record everything that happens on the road, and inside your vehicle... So if you get in an accident, an altercation, or if you get pulled over by the police... You’ll be able to **record every second** with crystal clear video and audio... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... [We’re only giving away 500 Dash Eagles for 80% OFF...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21751/6374453/ea2c388d38b447a932c8361ba1806a841304caf9/f08c97a4be74553a30e93afe8c33a5d1852d85be) And it’s first come, first served... Oh yeah, did I mention that I’m giving you free shipping? I’m positive these won’t last long, so claim yours before they run out...

name: Katie Porter
subject: California won’t stand by while Texas Republicans throw away democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39983%2E3422442%2EmD11km)
Peter,
If Texas changes their congressional maps to give Republicans an advantage, Democrats in California are ready to counteract them.
Watch me explain why here:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250806_1_ak?refcode=em20250806-39983&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39983_3422442_mD11km&akid=39983%2E3422442%2EmD11km)
Instead of helping families, Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans have spent the year giving handouts to billionaires. Now that they’ve realized Americans are unhappy with their policies, Trump is pressuring Republican-led states, like Texas, to redistrict mid-decade in order to “give” them the House majority.
**Trump knows Democrats can flip the House under the current maps. And he knows Democrats will use that power to call him out and investigate his corrupt and incompetent Administration.** So now he’s trying to cheat his way to holding the House.
This is a direct attack on our democracy, and Democrats can’t—and won’t—stand by while Trump and his enablers cheat to win elections.
California legislators are working on a ballot proposal that would ask our voters whether we should respond if the Texas GOP follows through with their plan to erase Democratic-held seats through redistricting.
The reason we’re in this mess is because of Trump. He can stop this today by telling state Republican leaders to knock it off.
**[Public pressure and awareness is a key part of stopping Trump and Texas Republicans. If you appreciated my breakdown of the redistricting news, would you consider chipping in $5 to my campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250806_1_ak?refcode=em20250806-39983&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39983_3422442_mD11km&akid=39983%2E3422442%2EmD11km)** Your donation will help me keep doing this work of communicating with people what’s happening and what’s at stake.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250806_1_ak?refcode=em20250806-39983&refcode2=39983_3422442_mD11km&akid=39983%2E3422442%2EmD11km)
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250806-39983&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39983_3422442_mD11km&akid=39983%2E3422442%2EmD11km)**

subject: Trump just admitted it: the GOP is rigging redistricting maps.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
We must fight back before it's too late >>

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112851526/561823847/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDFmMTA1OS1lODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDvbprMN3MSfkpAIypaBC-RjSrmFwfQm0YepIvTXVEs=)
---
**Recently, Trump revealed his plans to help the GOP pick up more seats in the House by redrawing districts in Texas, giving them an unfair advantage in next year’s midterm elections.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112851527/561823848/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDFmMTA1OS1lODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDvbprMN3MSfkpAIypaBC-RjSrmFwfQm0YepIvTXVEs=)** | **[CHIP IN $10 TO HELP ELECT A NEW DEM MAJORITY AND PROTECT FREE AND FAIR ELECTIONS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112851528/561823849/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDFmMTA1OS1lODcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDvbprMN3MSfkpAIypaBC-RjSrmFwfQm0YepIvTXVEs=)**
---
Republicans are barely holding onto their razor-thin 220-212 majority in the House, with three vacancies in strongly Democratic districts.

And historically, the party in the White House loses seats in the midterms.

Now, with Trump’s “Big Ugly Bill” tanking his approval ratings, **Republicans are looking for any advantage they can get — including manipulating maps to hold onto power.**_We can’t let that happen!_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Reaching out as a man without options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:

This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7mv0fe9ev5n42m7v63eefv2dl9u9bpr3c190v30_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cli62p71c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9vntt3vtjt4vnfg4m7f383pn0ko729p2jlvaf1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cli62p71c9h2bs)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because i**t locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you.

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ....Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Tariffs shouldn’t make it harder for kids to learn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Families are facing higher costs at the worst possible time. |
#
---
Team, Back-to-school shopping is becoming unaffordable for too many Michigan families. **Pencils, backpacks, laptops,_even juice boxes,_ are all getting more expensive — driven by a new wave of harmful tariffs.** These outrageous tariffs are making it harder for parents and teachers to provide kids with the tools they need to succeed. One school district in Midland had to cancel laptop upgrades altogether because vendors nearly doubled their prices. While Republicans in Washington continue to ram through an unpopular, costly agenda, students are the ones getting left behind. That’s unacceptable, and Governor Gretchen Whitmer is calling them out. She won’t stop fighting to lower costs for working families and fix the fundamentals. **Now, we need your help to make sure these damaging tariffs don’t continue unchecked.** **[It’s time to raise your voice. name: Mark Warner
subject: Donald Trump doesn’t want us to pay attention to this…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Changing the messenger doesn’t change the facts.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112853063/561828967/1668162259?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Firing_250806_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjg4ZjU4Yi1lYzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fPz7BWmbpPfm4ayHOcP-P_hMSD0GgcwLDmIi-AnmqYA=) Derek,

Donald Trump doesn’t want us to pay attention to this headline, but I won’t let him get off the hook: **NBC: “Trump fires labor statistics boss hours after the release of weak jobs report”** Last Friday, the latest in a string of weak jobs reports was released, showing the reality that too many Americans know firsthand – job growth has stalled, at a time when prices are rising and uncertainty is paralyzing American businesses.

**Donald Trump didn’t like the numbers. But rather than do literally anything to stabilize our economy and spur job growth, he fired the person responsible for reporting the numbers.**

Cooking the books won’t hide the truth: The American economy is struggling, and it’s a direct result of Trump’s policies. Quite frankly, this is another corrupt attack on independent data and a dangerous attempt to politicize a nonpartisan agency that Americans – and the world – rely on for critical information.

Trump has shown he’s willing to sacrifice American workers, families, and now even the integrity of our economic data in order to cover up the consequences of his disastrous policies. But I’m not going to stand by and let him get away with it.

[_**We must flip the Senate blue, and that starts with holding this seat. So I’m asking, if you are in a position to donate right now, will you pitch in to help me win reelection, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put an end to Trump’s dangerous For months now, experts and economists have been warning that Trump’s chaotic trade war and will-they-won’t-they tariff policies have left businesses reeling.

And who’s left holding the bag? American families. Prices on groceries, health care premiums, and everyday goods are higher, even as Trump and the GOP pay for tax cuts for the wealthy by gutting Medicaid and slashing food assistance for those who need it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33518?t=1011&refcode=email-20250806v_v&akid=9134%2E5885482%2E3kYfES ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

AIPAC and other dark money groups are already targeting Reps. Ilhan Omar
and Summer Lee for 2026 – gearing up to spend MILLIONS in Democratic
primaries to try to unseat our top progressive champions in Congress.
Their aim: drown out grassroots, working-class voices and tip the scales
in favor of candidates who’ll protect billionaires’ hold on our democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33518?source=email-20250806v&t=1061&akid=9134%2E5885482%2E3kYfES ]Headline: Is AIPAC testing the waters to primary Rep. Summer Lee?

Here’s the truth: if we don’t act to get dark money out of our democracy,
the oligarchs will just keep using their millions to win. But right now,
we have a chance to *change the rules* and stop billionaire interference
in Democratic Primaries.

DNC Chair Ken Martin has vowed to bring the resolution to ban super PACs
from Democratic Primaries to a vote in the coming weeks. Our Revolution
has been working on this for years – and right now we’re putting
everything we have into getting this win.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33518?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250806vnd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9134%2E5885482%2E3kYfES ]This is it. primaries as we are, chip in $7 – or whatever you can – to fuel Our
Revolution’s fight to get dark money OUT of democratic primaries NOW!

We’ve been on the frontlines of this battle for years. Our Revolution’s
Chair, Larry Cohen – a lifelong labor leader and veteran DNC member – has
been pushing for one simple, radical idea: “Voters should actually
determine who the candidates are. Not big money. Not billionaires.
Voters.”

Now, because of that work, we have a major opportunity.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33518?source=email-20250806v&t=1060&akid=9134%2E5885482%2E3kYfES ]Bernie tweet about the danger PAC money presents to democracy

Bernie and 7 other Senators have joined us, demanding the DNC ban dark
money like super PACs from primaries. And now DNC Chair Ken Martin has
promised a vote at the DNC to finally BLOCK these dirty money
interventions. That means stopping AIPAC and billionaire super PACs from
swamping working-class candidates with attack ads and big-money
endorsements.

This is not just an inside fight. We’ve *already* shaped the debate.
Earlier this year, thanks to pressure from thousands of Our Revolution
members, the new DNC leadership committed to banning billionaire money as
a core principle.

But here’s the catch: Every time we go up against corporate power, they
outspend us. Which is why we’re urgently raising the funds we need to
unleash a massive push before the DNC vote, overwhelming DNC members with
public pressure and making this massive in the media.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33518?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250806vnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9134%2E5885482%2E3kYfES ]This is an opportunity we’ve been building towards for YEARS and right now
we need everyone to stand with us. Chip in today, and help build a
Democratic Party that answers to ALL of us – not billionaires.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Blue Amp Action
subject: Will you support the No Kings Act today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Our democracy is at stake, and we cannot stand by while Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies turn our country into a dictatorship!
| | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T572ae5bd-4036-47ba-84e6-ddc1c02e5e8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2764764-a69c-449e-be39-a29bf055f404/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter – Our democracy is at stake, and we cannot stand by while Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies turn our country into a dictatorship! [**We're fired up and want to fight back by DEMANDING that our senators support the No Kings Act. Our petition needs 7,000 names before 11:59 PM so we can send it to the Hill. Will you be one of the many champions who continue to fight for our democracy?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T250ddfb1-bc74-4392-86fa-9c3e72f0832e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4603c10e-d6a9-46b2-8f6e-8facef31059c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2794cf4d-f967-41c3-9742-dfe8b5c12ce4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| People are TIRED of Trump's MAGA disaster, and reintroducing the No Kings Act would mean: ❌ Trump would be convicted of all of his crimes, including his 34 felonies. ❌ The 6-3 conservative majority Supreme Court would be held accountable for any activities involving corruption. ❌ We would protect our democracy by STOPPING the MAGA agenda once and for all. ❌ Trump would never be allowed in the White House again!! It's critical that we act _now_ and fight for our democracy before Trump completely destroys it! Peter, there are no kings in our country, and we're going to keep it that way. **[Please, will you be one of the 7,000 people that step up and demand that our senators put an end to Trump's tyranny by supporting the No Kings Act? Hurry, before the petition closes at midnight!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec60f057-f2c7-406f-add6-3486c4d62995/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

---
| Thank you for taking action, Blue Amp Action

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d508d4a-7e8c-4cc6-a6c4-d5154ac0ada8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: Right place, right time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Peter,
“You are at the right place at the right time, with the right skills and the right talent to do the right thing.” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs]
Our founder, Cori Bush, said it best. And she’s right. If you’re reading this, you are exactly where you’re supposed to be.
This is the time. Not for silence. Not for waiting. But for action.
Though the midterm elections are in a little over a year—candidates are running for local offices, state offices, and even Congress right now . That means every day we waste not building is a day Republicans are winning.
Watch Cori’s powerful message here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs]
In our newest campaign, Movement for Freedom [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home] , we’re working to help communities organize their neighbors, push policy, pressure elected officials, and build a movement that keeps us heard and represented, because we do not have the option to stand idly by while systems continue to fail our people.
It’s not just a campaign. It’s a political awakening.
It’s training the next generation of leaders.
It’s about meeting people where they are.
It’s uniting communities to push back against harmful policies and actions to build something grounded in justice, solidarity, and truth.
Our goal is to give you the tools to turn your voice into action while uplifting your community. Because your voice matters, and this is the moment to use it.
If you believe this work matters, support it. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs]
You’re in the right place. At the right time. Let’s do the right thing, together.
In solidarity,
Movement for Freedom
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap-m4fvideo?refcode=x_250806_m4fvideo_actrs] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .

name: Voter Action Project Petitions
subject: Crucial to defend the 2026 elections from interference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
With all the accusations, the attacks on our elections, on our ballots, how we submit them, plus all the rumors about the last election, the voter purges, and everything that's been happening -- we can't just assume next year's elections will happen and go off without a hitch.
Stand up now and make your voice heard loud and clear: Tell your state election officials to keep your voter data secure, say no to Trump and his corrupt DOJ's demands, and protect our elections! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump and the MAGA movement are already plotting to rig the 2026 elections, and Trump’s using his Justice Department takeover to do it.
Trump’s DOJ is demanding that states and counties hand over sensitive voter rolls, voting histories, private data, and even physical access to voting machines.
They claim it’s about security. It’s not. It’s about seizing control of our election systems and setting the stage to challenge or even overturn results he doesn’t like.
Tell election officials in all 50 states: Defend our democracy against Trump’s scheme to steal the midterms. Block all attempts to gain access to private election data and voting machines without a court order >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
We’ve seen this before. In 2020, Trump tried to bully his way to victory by spreading lies about voter fraud. Now he’s at it again, laying the groundwork for chaos and manipulation long before a single vote is cast.
This is a test of our democracy. If state officials give in, they open the door to a federal takeover of local elections and a flood of political interference. But if they stand firm, they can block Trump’s power grab before it gains ground.
We have the power to stop this. Public outcry can give state leaders the courage to resist. But we must act fast—before the pressure campaign succeeds.
Tell your state election officials: Say NO to Trump’s demands. Keep voter data secure. Protect the 2026 elections from political sabotage! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/stop-trumps-plot-to-steal-the-2026-elections?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fsecure.actblue.com%2fdonate%2fifvap-actions%3frefcode%3d0725trumpsteal]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080625_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080625_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=1cBvDOjGcaq42blIjHjuA3lqXFzsHGCg3kaknXktf0aeZ9ptZEqUwJSFQoFEdYuCpZM67DWr%2BTisGLVEijbVH4Tv8f1DtNrB6hiDi2yGIRQwJywLNTYQM%2F6YVXahGSeC6BmPX4vaCOD9RBOVE4t7BLXDbNxyinFXbjDISHveQHU7VmernzvmKA5a5ex%2FP2na76kcASq1S7IWOCDz6iScu%2F7ADM3p64Nlz1TlgpLG%2BN83xGAmKSzqJngbCNR%2FMIfn8yKduWvsHA5tFK7q0ncoK3UbiCntzv3SQn%2FYoDfeRfsfmWSvnlDtJwoL54fXnPt%2BCA1gT9WKsX6P%2BF4yxwdt6kCTHTN1ztRE02%2B5Irok3FwXn0JDZGZiovKp2bZVqTlXl6D%2Bjwk1NbP54Z9O0%2FcVHk36ZH6E9sCu4%2FwDXorweRg%3D .

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112855089/561836537/-1257954842?refcode=BLU_EM_BIRD_2025-08-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTY0NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTAwMGI2OTUtZjE3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_244DY_W1sUYWAkSAvApH9fihEZBmIBCuFxm7ZWhb-Q=)

| | | Below is a longer email from Shannon. We hope you’ll read to the end, but if you don’t have time, you can [_**contribute here:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112855090/561836538/-1257954842?refcode=BLU_EM_BIRD_2025-08-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTY0NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTAwMGI2OTUtZjE3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_244DY_W1sUYWAkSAvApH9fihEZBmIBCuFxm7ZWhb-Q=)

| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112855091/561836539/-1257954842?refcode=BLU_EM_BIRD_2025-08-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTY0NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTAwMGI2OTUtZjE3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_244DY_W1sUYWAkSAvApH9fihEZBmIBCuFxm7ZWhb-Q=)
---
Peter,

My love for public service started when I was just a mom volunteering in my kids’ classrooms. I saw how much more needed to be done, and I acted.

When I first ran for the State House, I wanted to continue fighting for a better future for our children, families, and seniors. Once again, I stepped up.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112855092/561836540/-1257954842?refcode=BLU_EM_BIRD_2025-08-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTY0NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTAwMGI2OTUtZjE3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_244DY_W1sUYWAkSAvApH9fihEZBmIBCuFxm7ZWhb-Q=)
I’m proud of what we’ve been able to get done together in these past few years.

We successfully fully funded our public schools for the first time in a decade. I’ve worked to make housing more affordable, support our small businesses, and protect abortion rights. I’ve held over 90 town halls because I believe in listening to my community. I’ve done all this because I believe government and elected officials should be a force for good.

I didn’t come from a wealthy family or a political background. I was raised by a single mom and a grandmother who worked as a blackjack dealer. They taught me how to work hard, give back, and fight for what’s right – even when it’s not easy.

Right now, the road ahead is far from easy. Trump, Gabe Evans, and their allies are attacking our democracy and making life more expensive for families across Colorado.

I’ve seen what happens when people in power stop listening to the needs of their communities. That’s why I’m running for Congress.

I know what it takes to bring people together, deliver tangible results, and fight back against extremist attacks when it matters most.

[_**Will you chip in to my campaign today so we can continue building a movement that puts Coloradans first?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112855093/561836541/-1257954842?refcode=BLU_EM_BIRD_2025-08-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTY0NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTAwMGI2OTUtZjE3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_244DY_W1sUYWAkSAvApH9fihEZBmIBCuFxm7ZWhb-Q=)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m sick and tired of this
body:
| | | | |
---
Peter,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/etLLVpMsZpha7X1ajKLNw0uoNPMUT882jw-CBHy8Ux2fkBYVDip_0L-ijzlDHgZcEMBK5E3lkACgx_RuPwuTrSn0FGdvKLsDgW0uq6NI2_46i7iH4ZEgHwpFeN2GJmEfp4MandRImjqZvxVSTLSVs3tsk-xQUxXMuXWJJO4q_CQujbJsjEoCrq6Vku8Ll1LqB3IFuX3PBbBctD4BsI7B67UxA4aU3yyNP6m7bETeDMzKEXWD6ZAR7alqpWvo01Zowpf6S8iH9_pYd_FlB1Yv7Jp1-rAGhg-qCL-Dg15QPFPSLh_dZI0D07MU487Zzh6CJ_3ZsDbjgQ2Bt9c9HRaI-zcviARNmnUIiVAe6udv-TydsHUC9ZdplDHLGp8QthxkDnuUNOujfDsmkgw9Yq580HWTOgag0LXmJbDZztruF9wt2uwCTcog7gEcDE6uxG_4E6gJ5lP42ZcSkrk3Yv6J9bP5Nrj92EkZEI1mb4BbNe0uo8Cl92OD_5787Ql73x0nkWTRaHqmYMEy8WR6JT4zWGarlsV6GG1ODj_qZYXE1fRX6Owb9PyAoE3OC4o2cKlQ1KZ82Ds6PRhGiTywnklvwnS8muKasQRnld5w7p4l5P3yqeBb4SJbjNy1fvnqPp2gFuufO0rkVdp_3dSoW_9CPJrLDm4onuG-YYXhKIJDYnJOXUTvYrbstybqHP5W8A-Lh-bFl3LQ0MMXNE_98PioHVlYM5fbDnVU2cU7vTlZOSpLL85GM5OZ4i2Buf2lRFAL8hE9dmrhH4SvYwoITgcUlEiUeDrBunk/9EzDCeJQFDLpPkzzxwYR9AsXx4mj0Hr9/11)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: **
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, and $50 at a time from patriots across this country like you who are sick and tired of the status quo](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/W4sL_rOoK1FqyZUHcZeiARwgZRinwkAlQa2JFZRTg1jSVsDTtJFADPT3bRF3FPUB_J8JaMOJb0QPB3NnPTDNwUtnnEw8E9KFMmAO5IPFWEJeKS0NlqkJtQxcOzfgLp2isTa52eSNEu43NdTn-Geu3IARU1Jp_SrJ90u8pSZyh5iY4oqmdZEahOfFMSItJ2QULtgh3S8KjxvWumOPy33JbS8xSAeQAg6xF4b4cs21Df6BIu8w1BY3nhIy3Qurw6h-f3RXlMXq-KNPyM_VlCOG4rPUM8K2UOgWGGzxQLgw3Sdbu7waxbQRqAkc0Lof6U1uDIxzu4QAkjDjckcMnSTIEGHPrgrqUVkqZ9RKSDRinKAcvSI5sWyHW_8MP-YKeBLRgmmzIpFh8Zf-t1BzMXV4O04UCVVAdxwB8UfZjdR2QPA3zsjSRPHkzOUcV56IsxpYydlIercjM_btiJ6Xsd1yqj0LTaQIVxaeWaLEQ34raD1GyuieaWBuP81RF3Koe_Ie4ng8tlm5xaW1sBJDd7B7nXzCkgSjCExTGtd5_yqTZnimVXT6iD5x4Lek2-gMQgd5m9CSBBZ4UaM6nozrPd-ErYtLhtuoA8yiBxLbkyuPOow3cATGvtxPRkF6ILx_ub8BwXAdi6yIQDU-M56iWLzWZkjmP5pmqFZExYeNdxTHsM0xzqxcfuERBFTuQ3rL9mWEEpnhLMd0ViTzcsVKK0pYYaQFDncgDTbO5qTvvqWyg9ymbOXwKlxgAXt_jmRXie1CT-cpuETXTbOAxYArh_JuFCtsIxJH7QM/YW0y4i6xE1LpwrLCM9CMqW2cr2pXsTxb/11)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here.
I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.
**_[And that’s exactly what I’m doing](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/4TAL7u63MTvwpCrK0svo-U4kZE5DeGSZYORNL8LlE9Tbk2THmiwhcgwcJG2wyL_UzQEnl2TN3vYnPtEWecBkwy2RPGwvHBAJAtKqVK_GZsOfrwDLOvSU586k6JcS6STqZqx3qy_vKEMKBol_7R8MIzfe3AmiXZl_qhqAiFHJecAsNjQxlNvZFParnjv8Xw_lznfo_ShBjHrz-elgIkduOhAAiir7vBrGZ1e4xgrX7OA18KTsJ2C8tMpboybAvp50M5Q9ghnhs8aEbFDG-epaKL5kHskrdenQC1F3GV8ApoyTkWz1diGy76pZVSDRn2Lm-ouQ2_4dRjcBKiEAOC9dSk6TvIISS4QIqt2srvbixQ-fNnkCvJhgFbM6pNj7VwiMND1S1ruLx4SCSZ-Vxs-6h3wB9hIXAHgT5ZNLQnMvN2g6DlXl0GAgafjjUQii_sPe1ZLbi54i6uHpRFMaV9erWrRQtFRUtE5tIBtLh9d8Qq31ChJeb4bZCCMry_Tnn0exinTkwYsbWhiyy3rzofCMEPyN7mi6zHh_egUx-8FA9zq6b6Fw-NHhAe3raDO-dOpbUqz6IkEhxtg1Ot_wvY2kZGTiwTo1Td_vl8XaO4aKxYe6YIe_-iN5nTSudHRrly7gn5OTmIJyYtkAkzdZyxAj-1L0Y0T5kw2XWggNoYq_1xVntY8ZZHrsKEjX6XiqB_ihV3y04AqXFVdD9vtKSixT6cQOaVaazjwcTN8tImR8MydZOyhfO6oig6A4wih2eOHdIqnOC1nwXMak9PS6Pneel9zcXfsyLRU/zrrN4JRvXiWLXsbQZm2UclOVgd0vB5lH/11)_.**

It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action. Republicans need to get serious about: Making the DOGE cuts permanent. Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children. Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies. Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine. Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable. Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security. Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary. If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections. I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: When MTG is upset, the base is upset. We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election. That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda. The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. I work for YOU. . I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here. I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of We The People. . With urgency, Marjorie Taylor Greene ** %unsubscribeurl% |

# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1717%2E582294%2Ercu8eJ)
In Congress Chris Pappas has always focused on what matters most to the people of New Hampshire — cutting costs, protecting health care, and defending our freedoms.
Now as we gear up for one of the most consequential Senate races in the country, we want to hear directly from you.
We’re launching our 2025 Team Pappas Priorities Survey to better understand what issues matter most to you and your community.
Whether it’s lowering prescription drug prices; protecting Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security; or standing up to extremism in Washington — we’re listening.

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: MAGA Republicans like to call us “extreme.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250806-628&t=1001&akid=672%2E251025%2ECfybtN ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250806-628&t=1002&akid=672%2E251025%2ECfybtN ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

MAGA Republicans like to call us “extreme.”

But what’s so extreme about caring for one another?

Believing that no one should have to work multiple jobs just to make ends
meet?

Believing that no parent should have to choose between buying groceries
and paying for their child’s medication?

Believing that our tax dollars should be spent improving life here at
home, not ending life overseas?

None of that is extreme.

What is extreme is a system where billionaires take the whole pie and
leave working people to fight over the crumbs.

That’s what we’re up against, and it’s why we’re building a movement
rooted in compassion, not greed.

If they want to call that extreme, let’s show them just how strong we are
together: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250806-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250806-628&refcode2=672_251025_CfybtN&akid=672%2E251025%2ECfybtN ]Pitch in $10 to power our fight.

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: NEW: Phones and Field That Build Power, and Win Campaigns
body:
Take a look at our new services | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
# **NEW: Phones and Field That Win Campaigns**
---
| **Hi friends,** As a Latino-owned, award-winning firm rooted in immigrant experiences, we know how to reach communities that are too often overlooked. Whether we’re on the phones, at the doors, or on screens and airwaves, our work is grounded in culture, connection, and building trust. In addition to our long-standing expertise in TV, digital, radio, and mail, we’re excited to share that we’re expanding our services to offer **phones** and**field programs**. From live calls to paid canvassing, we’re strengthening our outreach to meet voters wherever they are, with trusted voices and culturally competent strategies that win campaigns. **Our Phones Program Delivers:**
* Live calls for voter ID, persuasion, and GOTV
* Patch-through calls that connect supporters to decision-makers
* Robocalls and texting for quick, scalable outreach
* Bilingual scripts and culturally competent messaging
* Daily reporting, message testing, and real-time adjustments

---
|
---
---
| **Our Field Program Shows Up:**
* Paid, bilingual canvassers trained in culturally competent, values-based outreach
* Door-to-door canvassing designed to engage, persuade, and mobilize voters through meaningful conversations
* Signature gathering, voter registration, ballot curing, and ballot collection programs built for compliance and accuracy
* Digital outreach paired with community-driven organizing strategies
* Field-tested quality control and validation systems that ensure clean data and program integrity
* End-to-end field operations built for scale, efficiency, and impact

---
|
---
| We work fast. We work smart. And we work with purpose. If you're looking to build real relationships, move voters, and win, we’re ready when you are. **Let’s talk.**
Solidarity Team
**info@solidaritystrategies.com**
**[solidaritystrategies.com](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=36b0856009&e=b8f90417f9)**
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Solidarity Strategies, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Solidarity StrategiesP.O. Box 15260Washington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&e=b8f90417f9&c=1b419af7dc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&t=b&e=b8f90417f9&c=1b419af7dc).

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Netanyahu wants to “fully occupy” Gaza
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It should come as no surprise, but Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin
Netanyahu is now proposing the full occupation of Gaza.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250806-block-the-bombs/?source=em20250806-36908&akid=36908%2E1203867%2Eoy3QM_ ]NBC News: Israel’s Netanyahu expected to push for plan to ‘occupy’
Gaza. There has been growing global alarm over Israel’s actions in the
Palestinian enclave and strict restrictions on the entry of aid, marked by
a rise in deaths from starvation.

As Justice Democrats’ Congresswoman Delia Ramirez pointed out, this was
always the plan.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250806-block-the-bombs/?source=em20250806-36908&akid=36908%2E1203867%2Eoy3QM_ ]Congresswoman Delia C. Ramirez: The plan has always been the occupation
of Gaza and the death and displacement of the Palestinian people.
Netanyahu pursues this path even in the face of pressure from every
direction to end his siege, negotiate the release of the hostages, and
seek peace and safety for Israelis and Palestinians. Congress can stop the
delivery of weapons that support Netanyahu’s genocidal campaign. Let’s
pass my Block the Bombs Act and save lives!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250806-block-the-bombs/?source=em20250806-36908&akid=36908%2E1203867%2Eoy3QM_ ]Will you add your name to urge every House Democrat to fight back by
supporting Delia’s Block the Bombs Act?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250806-block-the-bombs/?source=em20250806-36908&akid=36908%2E1203867%2Eoy3QM_ ]Add Your Name

Instead of ending its ongoing blockade and preventing a full-blown famine,
the Netanyahu administration is now revealing that it plans to make things
even worse.

Millions of Palestinians have already been displaced from their homes,
with entire neighborhoods flattened. Tens of thousands have been killed,
and even more injured, with additional lives being taken each day, whether
by starvation or being shot by Israeli forces while seeking aid.

And the whole time, the United States has remained the largest supplier of
weapons and bombs to Israel. We can’t let our government continue to
enable this genocide and ethnic cleansing.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250806-block-the-bombs/?source=em20250806-36908&akid=36908%2E1203867%2Eoy3QM_ ]It’s time for Congress to use its leverage and withhold the transfer of
weapons to Israel, which they can do through the Block the Bombs Act. Sign
on to demand House Democrats stand up to Netanyahu by passing this bill
ASAP!

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250806-36908-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36908_1203867_oy3QM_&akid=36908%2E1203867%2Eoy3QM_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36908%2E1203867%2Eoy3QM_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: My race is a complete toss-up, making my opponent one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the House. | RATINGS CHANGE FROM COOK POLITICAL REPORT: “Republican-controlled AZ-06 Shifts to Toss-up” = Peter, I’m Jo Mendoza. I’m a single mother, Marine veteran, and Democrat running to flip AZ-06 blue. Emily said I could reach out because the stakes are so high. The Cook Political Report just sounded the alarm for my race! My race is a complete toss-up, making my opponent one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the House. Now, all eyes are going to be on our grassroots campaign – because we are going to be the team that flips AZ-06 AND the House blue. But the Washington establishment knows that. They’re going to spend every penny they have to keep this seat and stay in power, just so they can keep working folks like us in their place. Well Peter, they’re about to find out what happens when you go up against a grassroots team led by a single mom and U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor – and it’s not going to be pretty for them. I know that this race is ours to win, and I’m ready to give my all to flip AZ-06 blue. But I can’t win this fight without a team to back me up. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between JoAnna Mendoza and Emily Randall: = = = = = Thank you, Jo Mendoza = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: Ya'll keep showing up, and I'm beyond grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
As we close out July, I just wanted to take a second to express my gratitude, Peter.

To the folks who show up, speak up, and keep this work going — _even when it gets tough_ — I just want to say thank you for believing in the power of honest, people-first leadership, and thank you for always having our backs.

Look, I know this work is anything but easy. But when we stand together, we have what it takes to ensure that commonsense leadership will always win in the end. And because of this team, we’re building something that matters and electing leaders who lead with dignity, respect, and a commitment to the folks they serve.

We've got real momentum heading into August, and if we keep pushing, keep organizing, and keep investing in this work — we can get ahead and stay ahead all month long. So let's kick this month off on the right foot: [**Can I count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can, to help In This Together PAC fuel the fight ahead, all the way through August? clean_body: As we close out July, I just wanted to take a second to express my gratitude, Peter. To the folks who show up, speak up, and keep this work going — even when it gets tough — I just want to say thank you for believing in the power of honest, people-first leadership, and thank you for always having our backs. Look, I know this work is anything but easy. But when we stand together, we have what it takes to ensure that commonsense leadership will always win in the end. And because of this team, we’re building something that matters and electing leaders who lead with dignity, respect, and a commitment to the folks they serve. We've got real momentum heading into August, and if we keep pushing, keep organizing, and keep investing in this work — we can get ahead and stay ahead all month long. So let's kick this month off on the right foot: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for all that you do, Andy | Kentucky Gov. name: Binkley for Congress
subject: I’m running for Congress — and I need you with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ryan Binkley for Congress
body:
Let’s restore the American Dream in North Texas

| | | | | |
---
|
,
Seven months ago, our country was lost in the wilderness — open borders, runaway spending, and extreme policies completely out of touch with everyday Americans.

That’s why today, I’m proud to announce my campaign for Congress in Texas’s 32nd District. I’m running to be a strong voice for President Trump’s America First agenda — securing our border, unleashing American energy, and restoring the economic prosperity our families deserve.

For over two decades, I’ve lived, worked, built businesses, and pastored here in North Texas. As President and CEO of Generational Group, I’ve created jobs and helped small businesses grow. As a pastor, I’ve worked to bring people together around faith, family, and service.
But our district is represented by someone whose extreme liberal votes are out of touch with our values. Julie Johnson voted against tax relief for working families, against protecting girls’ sports, and even against stopping illegal immigrants from voting. That’s not who we are — and it’s time for a change.

This campaign is about restoring the American Dream and returning a common-sense Texas voice to Washington. **But to win, I need your help right now.**

[**Will you chip in $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can today to help us launch strong?**](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=6129e58fc8&e=a4fe331f26)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=0ad1278fe7&e=a4fe331f26)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Every dollar you give will go directly toward reaching North Texas voters, fighting against the radical left, and delivering a pro-family, pro-growth, pro-freedom agenda.

Let’s do this together.
Thank you,
Ryan Binkley
Candidate for Congress – TX-32

clean_body: Let’s restore the American Dream in North Texas | | | | | | | , Seven months ago, our country was lost in the wilderness — open borders, runaway spending, and extreme policies completely out of touch with everyday Americans. That’s why today, I’m proud to announce my campaign for Congress in Texas’s 32nd District. I’m running to be a strong voice for President Trump’s America First agenda — securing our border, unleashing American energy, and restoring the economic prosperity our families deserve. For over two decades, I’ve lived, worked, built businesses, and pastored here in North Texas. As President and CEO of Generational Group, I’ve created jobs and helped small businesses grow. As a pastor, I’ve worked to bring people together around faith, family, and service. But our district is represented by someone whose extreme liberal votes are out of touch with our values. Julie Johnson voted against tax relief for working families, against protecting girls’ sports, and even against stopping illegal immigrants from voting. That’s not who we are — and it’s time for a change. This campaign is about restoring the American Dream and returning a common-sense Texas voice to Washington. But to win, I need your help right now. | | | | | | | | | | | | Every dollar you give will go directly toward reaching North Texas voters, fighting against the radical left, and delivering a pro-family, pro-growth, pro-freedom agenda. Let’s do this together. Thank you, Ryan Binkley Candidate for Congress – TX-32 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Ryan Binkley for Congress | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Binkley for Congress. All rights reserved.
