subject: Your opinion on the courts needed
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch is urgently requested.

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/fD6YXm24tQGKi-RdsP1x5LJ3AtzdHv6SiycPZG7PcB3u2qPl6jxWuq6LlNhkvhcpWAyN9JvSaUqHBYTRSbM3e9BeFaj_jOGuQYOTuOiEjbn7cd1dx-0WJ9qyfTXMNfoxPfvqpHeL9uJtQM0aPlFZVXc50HhVKh5VJq5-QbelVMYcAfAZ5iq6kTyW/osaoGZVaizXNKbFcVzlUJFFJZFLjssUt/11)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/gfT9ifLzkMvb34m8gUKM0nlk_N5AfVxeFbn_OQVUIx7CBgn8d_TxEunYLpuPsDPvP3T8n-9OvNVmu2UFP2IAz8P-n46DS8GLNOSojIFfP5zW5YOS9WbbnZRwzPpl9M-0fiQdCNUT6mGirTmrTjYHWxSQ4WU_Nv8RUCjE2qQcOVCqWITP5Xy4MqZqpbv2EQKmFEd3xdaMswzRKgW5NciDZOXVfPuU29zY9qYGe6UfTZjIBXHxsM0Cd6qKTZSDfD3QrA5VqAeVhSME5X7iaF2dSGdnnB-ATjlx1bl-HvZuz3BGEJzuF6GXWgIfX3ntJvtVYHfMRb2ZeFO3w1ZXu0VDlmhtTPQxN2v8LDT2gyeo08n-2dUN9RaRMKigedeKxGGMJkAFgTKfEgv3dNPkmnc9rlrOzb26Z2oU7aDPTx0Bq9utr7h7SIF0qaNzPLJ8OyoSOoolEZQ3zI1Yx4msG_e7RhreuyANbo_hgMR25sdMim1J4q_B1i14wuoS0-wtTdLY5K2Y--wvHENuIi_Aqi9hrBaxEdO-No5fzCY6OfyDll-maYlGFsLkFWBfK-jbYhi3eGFp7n2ntmu9rcOpWpV3W4fCCasa6fIvZo225kfkisI0QIFt1Q6H0Nwnan6_aw0a1EZDDVFvsLxQCYzZ3uL7_Ne5UcsEN90Qb7YYhcSRsL6nQ4ElO7xFBXZIlhmkDtjAFnVQqjhNlhnilfnKuxfrWvQ4GH2gAmbnoHYFPEzSjhL5uDUVIGLiA3SnmtHSQ0R61bpx_K8je-wr1FL_Mn-2/w46c0m1ir9Pd-my4YsCbe_Xf4_3DDAva/11) Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **[National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/1yiDszs5dM_CQ57qQmlF-tqsxb23O2lhJ15GqA_eMvFAsIiMC6KhKiBsor7dVzV3jNdrXjgfEt7jmW-06le87WGVpgI3mLqBxznwx8oATVMwVue0-WqVFAvthgV4LCHpAjLaexTp5zZ4oWZtoUjmGPStkAVEf4OvX7vT8z53msuTX0NuvxSDVaPTH7bFrmpXEWJY6gLxpiwjXeTPJCJQ4xkbGuAFCbjTx8fLVL1xmhE99MEADKCJL0dFCp0AN4BCRxOh-xea5dm0_7d9Xpw6MsCvBAl5FDQYXqepNlSD9ncxtCOle4zX2PD10E3pGjUFdonP0piAECOgi3XPW48LIPrizmpDY-6cPKmCO47KzFH0V0Xh8ydTvlEirfuze1b7DEh6BgmWUGtojoTQAFWB9qDGbjwLVwPsWczJSFcBzS-orPR8ZuRSf1hAbr6P2jQm-PuET2j7KdW1VxFPQUQ4iaHfuwbQEMcMJ-JVl780av-5ZmZ3uWoUjdTf7-LvG8BnhDXYuE9X135Y00YM1HGliF_rCoGe0tCJZcC2ltqMyf3Z0YD-IWgYsiRsLp2PtBvm3WI6YPYza4r8PRcdcVpFV4EFbQvwzTZE1rDLgWSA50vesKRWP86D3jlilSRGZxJK1gzWhoZOYqVBJ3qyj05GBF2Y6fzZbVOMWOuAXs4TlcGerRj1FuzNHQvAYp92j-vpxHI400yXNusXmQXxJMB00pl4BdlddqcMwrW_Q4LbHW4zsUIrlPM-zBBZsU_fpku_huFh9B2K-dc8UutbQOTj/De7plEICsbaMlHKx3olMCjfHIJA7Dh2u/11)** is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans.

To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following...
* An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending

* The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong

* An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state

* An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty

* An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions

The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists.

**If we don 't fix this crisis ...**

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people.

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms.

**And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic?_

Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Mh_GcZOWxlBY-0xdiVu68xoNjhCv9Q96Wyliwf2TuQsviReBYZu8KX28XCYedqYAUqika14qAV_vFRcpX0zeQvZTomKPNeOxPFl-fjMOx_JPzinV8qmhQlEspQPwL4UBBH-vfGdNcrzOqLYLKNzra3x-9VfSoE8efaFJ4yM-KqAgAlYSNr0owRIEBb8pIWq8lCIh6A7A6VAPkI0Z2h3BB0urCksnnDAGG9gitLA8nunAjwx0AUE6oLyztzcpeOzND6Zgumcrc6ogl3x1u5M6zAFm8Tq-hC7soT20VmpspOD44kKugKPW9rhJWdoPPrxxjOwBUZuUlGKOBMy0ixAom4atoe_JotBfbdzoHANxM9WE9bNjKlQmGMhuK5__JUTIZDZ32Orbg-tOZw3Ky8quwsRtkEGzppzexUIupgn8N4FK5ThnjEQ-VTJbeBoDBo2lm_GCmOAPHsSvM3i3iEnDfdqaoZO34OCBjgNmilZb1LCVyuXacyCrEN-XFBna8mirh2gZlIq69QIJbPBwOvKLh-o4IC2HUsXbHgF3p3pGoeZCiFJTJ7Sbg0Lr8uAglgVknRJkUi40Zt_2Z7qBkVlM6UeitH0Dg7D3mSoEGRpY3i8zPXVb3rtfB7zEcl74fOiBdOh54qZGgifZkS0J56RZZGls3vcgdAYl1XkxQzjuK0n02wkcivTbE66B0xdmhcr8EpDNcghbFImsb27wLInOwZije38LE4qcapxbBAXQE8tGnZeL-6YMVdHoxVguboj9IKJRAhQr247hLve6-tP6/-vsbhfNL87zzU_dlEyKr15Vq_fRzSzV9/11)

And after you complete your survey, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of so many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for far-Left activists to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the proper role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of the anti-American ideologies that are being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Founding and guiding additional classical K-12 schools nationwide.** In addition to expanding the number of Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools, you will help us restore love for our country among young Americans by distributing _The Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_ free of charge to thousands more parents, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens.

* **Expanding the circulation of _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is currently mailed free of charge to more than 6.7 million American households and businesses ten times per year.

* **Producing and promoting additional free online courses** on topics such as "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," and "The Presidency and the Constitution." Your generosity will help us expand this education on behalf of liberty to millions more Americans.

* **Sending FREE copies of the U.S. Constitution and Declaration of Independence** to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Since last year's election, the number of requests for our pocket Constitutions has increased significantly. You will help us meet this rising demand.

We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale by filling out the College's **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** --the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/1o0dezqCz-Wt6YHPeOWG1u0FS-3PK35hsAK6wWYUuacBFYccwBCRdZlvmA8XZynfe41tYiEH29QhwF9zkyepgfGQdQSGZYFcMTaal2IqhXJftt-RK3B-E2NKySzhercK7ReMooSz8Hcq5WIiBPAsNq5eFtB0wS5u98iDkGNlj67jSB2PmhcZAQfL90zxnzMbxNcLbuN8MYeKbNgfCe4SP69YpC3yaF16QWcnMXFJlGoSwG30riAa9Z0ovU5pfusa3E2_dggVXiCw3c5--uCQ_ZYBzfm3jUXjY3PdBGdGWJQ3B80hZHEIJ8do8PhUBDwvfaQsGN6aOT3R-urs0OhDNIbARyAdyT9jtzVacLEIHSvsCz1btvXKjNgtDrihYv4Yi2qfUUP28wDr-Auc5UHwSc1PooE_5VBbiSjOM2cDPaKiJsNz2Qk050VmNfyKVkXf3excd3G7-kemUZg2ymbc3f-wZyLSngbrryJbQ7aWUVWZ8qkgD7cjpD3WLevM78JDGv8QzRdTA5MVussMLzOmnjCr-iHGHoH1FMh7HKjeZ8qFVqIUfk3rV56xgCV2swXaw5QFVkXmhkBavt40_z8zWM3cuPrXXC2KO4uUdwzV3CXeZISNjV8OJhNMMjJ5rVmRZEfm-z97YS4n8ceX9jPmMvW73dAuhvo0pPm971N1xmNaAtzSwK7Sj2upLtxHkctQTZQY8RItr1WX59LRpp_jjhSbooADAooq3vmQSdaZ8q7cgqBHKeo9w4BwgTckUiA3BFkgXKft2avwwCaakdLp/to-13EfrBbrPeA8o-7X3Zj_CIK_B7oGf/11)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to help us preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/sDOp_BcbWtxSpgnbIijaJMR6Zf9GNyKuE8A6jqgNASgdAApF9F69kSDPJK_YduswtAEwYq1SIoRJhSOsT6sjgT5p52Szy9VC6nFPTa04KuiCMoIIxB44hphLKcOw3tTCHv-54mOnXSZF4LVgjaNfNCL8Lsca_jvoaMOk5FwKUwsiOXVBDPIpHflF1yqEVaLeImnEjkKNPJH6HU0N5RJu4_SRHtOBuXjpIA/TKb0nbmcroaV_gNLpm6C2prn-AGhymzS/11)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/fD6YXm24tQGKi-RdsP1x5LJ3AtzdHv6SiycPZG7PcB3u2qPl6jxWuq6LlNhkvhcpWAyN9JvSaUqHBYTRSbM3e9BeFaj_jOGuQYOTuOiEjbn7cd1dx-0WJ9qyfTXMNfoxPfvqpHeL9uJtQM0aPlFZVXc50HhVKh5VJq5-QbelVMYcAfAZ5iq6kTyW/osaoGZVaizXNKbFcVzlUJFFJZFLjssUt/11).

subject: Texas Democrats broke quorum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-pxp-em-lwd-20250806-1?refcode=em20250806-2484&amount=5&refcode2=2484_587540_Cu2hkr&akid=2484%2E587540%2ECu2hkr ]Beto O'Rourke

Peter, it’s Beto
O’Rourke here.

Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five
Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by
manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm
elections.

But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. They just broke quorum
to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.

And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just
like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders.

They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for.

Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Only
if we all contribute what we can will they have the resources to keep up
the fight.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-pxp-em-lwd-20250806-1?refcode=em20250806-2484&amount=5&refcode2=2484_587540_Cu2hkr&akid=2484%2E587540%2ECu2hkr ]Will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can to
Powered by People and Leaders We Deserve to support these brave lawmakers?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-pxp-em-lwd-20250806-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250806-2484&refcode2=2484_587540_Cu2hkr&akid=2484%2E587540%2ECu2hkr ]Donate $5 »

Let’s make sure they know we’ve got their backs—and that they’re not in
this fight alone.

With gratitude,

Beto

[ ]Donate $5 » Let’s make sure they know we’ve got their backs—and that they’re not in this fight alone. With gratitude, Beto

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: re: Democratic strategy in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
I’ve introduced several pieces of legislation this year that I feel very strongly about — from last month’s LEGACY Act and the re-introduction of the My Body, My Data Act to the Delete DOGE Act and the Protect U.S. National Security Act — and I’ve been grateful for your support on these initiatives.
Today I want to take a moment to address a question I sometimes get when talking about new legislation, which is... Why? With Democrats in the triple minority, what’s the point?
Well, there are a few reasons, but I’ll start here:
Just because my party is in the minority doesn’t mean I abandon my responsibility to introduce, sponsor, and champion legislation that would help my constituents and people all across the country. We need to be able to walk and chew gum at the same time. Yes, we’ve been fighting tooth and nail against the bad faith actions of Trump and House Republicans, but we also need to preempt their attacks on our most basic rights with good legislation.
Not only that, but legislation like the Protect U.S. National Security Act and the My Body, My Data Act ought to enjoy bipartisan support! They likely won’t – we know today’s GOP isn’t exactly eager to govern at all, let alone work across the aisle – but that doesn’t mean we shouldn’t try. Introducing good legislation points out Republicans’ hypocrisy directly and holds them accountable in real time. Moderate Republicans can’t claim to support foreign aid or data privacy (in the case of my two bills) in theory but fail to support legislation that would protect it in reality.
But one of the other important reasons to do this work *now* is so we’ll be ready to hit the ground running as soon as we regain the majority . Putting in the work now – thinking creatively about the issues we’re facing, coming up with solutions and drafting the legislation, working to get buy-in from our colleagues, constituents, and advocates – will pay off after the midterms.
So that’s what I’m doing. But the other piece is, of course, making sure we actually DO retake the majority. That’s where you come in – can you pitch in today to support our Democratic efforts to flip the House next year? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Every cent you contribute will go directly towards my work supporting great Democrats and pushing to get us into the majority.
Thanks for reading and for your support!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Coward's Note
subject: This “unsigned masterpiece” is going on my wall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Here’s a snippet of a note that was left on my desk:
“ Isaiah, Isaiah, Isaiah... The childlike performance you put on... had Padilla beat by a mile... If the people of Texas vote for you, they deserve all the stupidity you can supply. Thank you .”
And you know what was at the bottom?
NOTHING.
No signature. No name. No courage.
Here’s the full thing (WARNING: you might lose brain cells reading it). ⬇️⬇️⬇️
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/Screenshot%202025-08-06%20114331.png]
If you’re going to insult me, at least have the guts to own it. But that’s the GOP and MAGA Republicans in a nutshell: big talk, empty threats, and no accountability.
Here’s the truth: they’re scared . They’re scared because we’re calling out Trump’s rigged maps. They’re scared because our movement is growing. They’re scared because when people like you and me fight back, they can’t win .
So they leave little anonymous tantrums on my desk.
I’ll tell you what I told my team when I read it: Good. Let them be afraid.
Now let’s make them regret ever underestimating us.
👉 Donate here to prove them wrong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Let’s keep rattling them.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin
Texas’s 18th Congressional District
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/29828EEA-D82D-4108-A24F-779E47077C54.png]
PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
Isaiah Martin for Congress
PO Box 654
Houston TX, 77001
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/M9mREXebf0euD0qIO-DIDw2?unsubscribedata=ewiqBVl479Q149D0dsFKUOXOmN5TTVoSooJZvcDE2QKuxooIIa56fSGBAFllKaXZlNMo0N4ZyvmguJsZon32L7w6rMBK3CrSeuSs9YZIPj0Ns%2Bl2B24yG0rc7HMzCd9S2EiNvfxbtstE%2BDn3JfIjGXpFKRn9LrguD6%2BxechkRlI4pv%2Fz0aLUkCFmPlCo7eAoipkBQQKZABP8YlDf%2FZWUbKACQ3C7L0R06ENzve9pR74GzLsYbJhywJBX3Gori1Y5w%2BnbeaugrxQrzT2wVhLwjsQjyL9lC1sFHGGj0AB6NKntAyhGiASzpmeVhxPfSmEMVboQLlmCT7geVE%2B0P7FXCrbZEWX649%2FkCj4DlrhC9fVoQ8JgXnErNxPVJJLSNYC6lSV8fHNfMGyEnoPfhwzzQ5pPVcndb1Ry7GKMPOgskFyw50XciyNExzStq%2Bbvda7B .

name: Team Simon
subject: A dangerous precedent
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112858992/561849770/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNkNTgzZDAtZmE3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3uMcTxfU2F9_FKZQRZErxd6VowLlayunSEN7ZKEfCCo=) | **_Let’s be clear:_ last week’s court ruling doesn’t just affect one group of voters; it’s a test balloon for rolling back major portions of the Voting Rights Act. ** The court says voters with disabilities or limited English proficiency can no longer sue if their rights are violated. Only the Department of Justice can bring those cases now. That’s not how democracy should work. And if they can get away with this, **what’s next?** Steve’s office used this exact provision of the law to reach a settlement protecting Minnesota voters just a few years ago. If this latest ruling had been in force back then, **we wouldn’t have been able to help.** Steve is standing up and calling this out. But the work ahead will take serious resources. **[With today being the 60th anniversary of the VRA, we need to fight back even harder. We’re asking our grassroots supporters to step up and help us build the war chest we need for what’s coming next. Will you make a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112858993/561849771/-1037734492?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250806&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNkNTgzZDAtZmE3Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3uMcTxfU2F9_FKZQRZErxd6VowLlayunSEN7ZKEfCCo=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now.

clean_body: = | Let’s be clear: last week’s court ruling doesn’t just affect one group of voters; it’s a test balloon for rolling back major portions of the Voting Rights Act. The court says voters with disabilities or limited English proficiency can no longer sue if their rights are violated. Only the Department of Justice can bring those cases now. That’s not how democracy should work. And if they can get away with this, what’s next? Steve’s office used this exact provision of the law to reach a settlement protecting Minnesota voters just a few years ago. If this latest ruling had been in force back then, we wouldn’t have been able to help. Steve is standing up and calling this out. But the work ahead will take serious resources. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | ****************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** Thank you, Team Simon | = | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. subject: NYT: White House Pushes Texas to Redistrict, Hoping to Blunt Democratic Gains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Don’t mess with Texas
#
Y’all, as if all the destruction Donald Trump has caused nationally isn’t enough, **_now he’s messing with Texas._**
The latest reports just revealed that he’s pressuring Texas Republicans to gerrymander new congressional districts that could DESTROY all the progress Democrats have made here over the past few years:

**NOT on my watch.** I’ll fight to protect my home state from Trump’s schemes if it’s the last thing I do.
But this ultimately isn’t just about Texas. **This is about our democracy.**
Republicans know they can’t win an election without lying and cheating. So ahead of the 2026 midterm elections, they’re trying to rig the game in their favor by gerrymandering their way into another term in the majority.
**[I REFUSE to let that happen, but I need your help to fight back and stop them before it’s too late. subject: TX Democrats are refusing to give in to Republicans

body:
Texas Republicans are full steam ahead trying to pass Trump’s power grab — they’re even calling for the arrest of their colleagues.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112859491/561851416/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhZWQ2YmM2LWZiNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=89H1IXlL1yAlpHp7Lmzxa1ZRmD4_7Sc-z1v98s6uj_8=&emci=bdfe2789-df72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0aed6bc6-fb72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Several Democratic legislators have left the state of Texas. Why? To prevent the legislature from having the quorum it needs to vote on their egregious, gerrymandered map. Republicans drew up this map in a back-room deal to deliver Trump his demand of five additional congressional seats. This is an emergency moment for our democracy — and this is an emergency maneuver to stop a partisan power grab. So far, Texas Republicans are full steam ahead — even suggesting _these Democrats should be arrested or thrown out of office_ for leaving the state. **Kowtowing to Trump’s orders to steal five votes, then threatening to arrest lawmakers who refuse to play along — it’s something out of an authoritarian playbook. That’s why what we do next matters tremendously and will have ripple effects far beyond Texas.** [**Fight back against this brazen attack on our democracy by making a donation to the NDRC. You can fight back and fund our efforts to hold Texas Republicans accountable, fight for fair maps, and stop authoritarian attacks on our democracy — anywhere and everywhere they arise.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112859493/561851418/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_DemsTexas_email_20250806-NDRC-Tier1-DemsTexas_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250806-NDRC-Tier1-DemsTexas_&utm_campaign=DemsTexas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhZWQ2YmM2LWZiNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=89H1IXlL1yAlpHp7Lmzxa1ZRmD4_7Sc-z1v98s6uj_8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We know that this radically gerrymandered map in Texas is only the beginning of Trump’s siege on our democracy. They’re already considering pulling the same move in Missouri, Florida, New Hampshire, and beyond.
What all of this comes down to is that Republicans know that their policies are deeply unpopular. Trump knows his approval rankings are tanking. Republicans from the Texas state legislature to the White House know that they’re in for a shellacking in the 2026 midterms. So instead of playing by the rules, they’re going to change them to give themselves an unearned advantage.
And all of it takes power away from voters. They’re packing voters of color into a couple of districts to silence the will of the people.
[**This is a five-alarm fire for our democracy. We’re fighting back by supporting our partners on the ground in Texas, raising the alarm in the media, and organizing grassroots supporters to fight back. clean_body: Texas Republicans are full steam ahead trying to pass Trump’s power grab — they’re even calling for the arrest of their colleagues. | Peter, Several Democratic legislators have left the state of Texas. Why? To prevent the legislature from having the quorum it needs to vote on their egregious, gerrymandered map. Republicans drew up this map in a back-room deal to deliver Trump his demand of five additional congressional seats. This is an emergency moment for our democracy — and this is an emergency maneuver to stop a partisan power grab. So far, Texas Republicans are full steam ahead — even suggesting these Democrats should be arrested or thrown out of office for leaving the state. Kowtowing to Trump’s orders to steal five votes, then threatening to arrest lawmakers who refuse to play along — it’s something out of an authoritarian playbook. That’s why what we do next matters tremendously and will have ripple effects far beyond Texas. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We know that this radically gerrymandered map in Texas is only the beginning of Trump’s siege on our democracy. They’re already considering pulling the same move in Missouri, Florida, New Hampshire, and beyond. What all of this comes down to is that Republicans know that their policies are deeply unpopular. Trump knows his approval rankings are tanking. Republicans from the Texas state legislature to the White House know that they’re in for a shellacking in the 2026 midterms. So instead of playing by the rules, they’re going to change them to give themselves an unearned advantage. And all of it takes power away from voters. They’re packing voters of color into a couple of districts to silence the will of the people. = Thank you for your commitment to the fight against partisan gerrymandering, especially in this critical moment. — Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Hi Peter, it’s Andy Beshear here – Governor of Kentucky.

At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to join me in supporting George Whitesides with a **[$3 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112859521/561851450/-1384072709?refcode=em-8.6.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjQ2ODU2Mi1mYzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQBGP8KBL-fj-XuIhm4t0Zg-b9SoVRR3uWuHxd26zcY=)**. But before I do, I want to explain exactly what makes our fight so important.

I’m criss-crossing the country, meeting with folks across the political spectrum.

One thing that I’m noticing? People are tired. Tired of being cast aside in our political system, tired of broken promises in Washington.

It’s what makes the actions of the Trump White House so infuriating. This administration doesn’t care about getting results for working families, they only care about furthering a harmful political agenda.

Here’s the good news: _There are folks in Washington who are fighting back and standing up to the constant attacks._ Leaders like George Whitesides who are putting the working people of this country first – not the special interests.

Another piece of good news is that Democrats are a stone’s throw away from taking control of the House majority – giving them the ability to stop the current circus in its tracks and provide accountability on Trump.

Only three seats stand in the way. Keeping seats like George’s in CA-27 in our column is the ONLY way it works.

**[So today, I’m asking you to contribute $3 or any amount you’re comfortable with to keep George in Congress. He was one of the few Democrats who flipped a red seat back in November, and it put a target on his back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112859522/561851451/-1384072709?refcode=em-8.6.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjQ2ODU2Mi1mYzcyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQBGP8KBL-fj-XuIhm4t0Zg-b9SoVRR3uWuHxd26zcY=)**

body:
Deb is the only candidate in this race who’s prepared to defend New Mexico from Donald Trump.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3635%2E400544%2E64-sCf)
Most Democrats can agree on this:
Right now is *NOT* the time to elect passive players or defenders of the status quo.
As Donald Trump and his MAGA allies auction off our public lands, blatantly ignore the Constitution, and rip away health care from millions of our neighbors, we must elect bold leaders who are _actually willing_ to stand up to Trump, the far-right, and entrenched systems of power.
**The time is now for fierce leaders like Deb Haaland, who will take on the status quo and deliver for hardworking families across New Mexico.**
**[If you agree, would you donate your first $5 to Deb's campaign? Every contribution, big or small, will make an important difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250806_1_fiercefold?amount=5&refcode=em20250806-3635&refcode2=3635_400544_64-sCf&akid=3635%2E400544%2E64-sCf)**
Deb doesn’t fold under pressure. She fights fiercely for what’s right.
It’s what she’s always done, and it’s exactly what she’ll do as the next governor of New Mexico.
**Deb ran for Congress and won during Trump’s first term, so she’s the _only_ candidate in this race who’s prepared to defend New Mexico from his chaotic and dangerous MAGA agenda.**
**[Can you chip in $5 right now? Together, we will elect Deb Haaland as a fierce fighter for working New Mexicans.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250806_1_fiercefold?amount=5&refcode=em20250806-3635&refcode2=3635_400544_64-sCf&akid=3635%2E400544%2E64-sCf)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250806_1_fiercefold?amount=5&refcode=em20250806-3635&refcode2=3635_400544_64-sCf&akid=3635%2E400544%2E64-sCf)**
— Team Haaland HQ
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250806-1&t=2&refcode2=3635_400544_64-sCf&akid=3635%2E400544%2E64-sCf)**

clean_body: | | Is this the best way to reach Peter? It's Speaker Mike Johnson. I've been working around the clock to put the MAGA agenda into action. And we've had some incredible successes so far - just look at what we've recently accomplished! But trust me, we 're just getting started - and before I make my next move, I wanted your opinion. ** This is not your grandfather's Democrat party. They have become so radical. These people really don't care about hardworking Americans like you. But I promise you, I will never abandon you! Thank you so much for your support. For freedom, Speaker Mike Johnson Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: 📆 Save the date: August 20th with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Don't miss your chance to join our quarterly debrief call.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112860018/561852954/1328794144?refcode=ea.d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1NzJhNGVlLWZlNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lxPZdNeXA7JD3-QK-n_I19Y5d5hSlRy55aOEmcqEPis=&emci=38deca4c-ea72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
I have something special to share with you: On **Wednesday, August 20th** , I'm hosting our quarterly debrief call for my Grassroots Cabinet, and I really hope you'll be there. This virtual call is an opportunity to connect directly with the people who make this work possible. We'll pull back the curtain on everything from how we select candidates to endorse to what’s at stake in this November’s elections in Virginia. **But the real highlight? We'll also be joined by two JanePAC-endorsed candidates you’ve helped support:**

👉 **Jay Jones** , running to become Virginia’s next Attorney General
👉 **Kimberly Pope Adams** , who came within _55 votes_ of flipping her district in 2023 These calls have become some of my favorite conversations. There's something powerful about gathering with people who are just as committed as I am to turning climate anxiety into climate action. **This is your chance to hear directly from the frontlines — how your support is making a difference and what comes next. But here’s the catch: The call is exclusively for Jane's Grassroots Cabinet members, our community of dedicated monthly donors, and there's still time to join us!** **[A monthly contribution of just $10 gets you a seat at the table for these quarterly calls, plus exclusive updates from me throughout the year, merch discounts, early access to events, and the chance for a personal thank you call from me.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112860022/561852958/1824087006?recurring=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1NzJhNGVlLWZlNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lxPZdNeXA7JD3-QK-n_I19Y5d5hSlRy55aOEmcqEPis=)** Most importantly, your monthly contribution will power our mission to elect climate leaders who can't be bought by Big Oil. With so much on the line this year, we need sustained support to identify and back the candidates who will fight like hell for our communities. **So what do you say?[Will you join Jane's Grassroots Cabinet today and join our call on August 20th?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112860029/561852963/1824087006?refcode=ea.d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1NzJhNGVlLWZlNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lxPZdNeXA7JD3-QK-n_I19Y5d5hSlRy55aOEmcqEPis=)** | [**Join Jane’s Grassroots Cabinet →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112860038/561852970/1824087006?recurring=true&refcode=ea.d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.d572a4ee-fe72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1NzJhNGVlLWZlNzItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lxPZdNeXA7JD3-QK-n_I19Y5d5hSlRy55aOEmcqEPis=)
---
I hope to see you there.
xx Jane

clean_body: Don't miss your chance to join our quarterly debrief call. | I have something special to share with you: On Wednesday, August 20th , I'm hosting our quarterly debrief call for my Grassroots Cabinet, and I really hope you'll be there. This virtual call is an opportunity to connect directly with the people who make this work possible. We'll pull back the curtain on everything from how we select candidates to endorse to what’s at stake in this November’s elections in Virginia. But the real highlight? We'll also be joined by two JanePAC-endorsed candidates you’ve helped support: 👉 Jay Jones , running to become Virginia’s next Attorney General 👉 Kimberly Pope Adams , who came within 55 votes of flipping her district in 2023 These calls have become some of my favorite conversations. There's something powerful about gathering with people who are just as committed as I am to turning climate anxiety into climate action. This is your chance to hear directly from the frontlines — how your support is making a difference and what comes next. But here’s the catch: The call is exclusively for Jane's Grassroots Cabinet members, our community of dedicated monthly donors, and there's still time to join us! = Most importantly, your monthly contribution will power our mission to elect climate leaders who can't be bought by Big Oil. With so much on the line this year, we need sustained support to identify and back the candidates who will fight like hell for our communities. So what do you say?= | = I hope to see you there. xx Jane | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Rob Bonta
subject: This fight is personal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250806&t=1001&akid=1908%2E1088799%2EyYrZHY ]Rob Bonta

When Donald Trump returned
to office in January, his first big move was to attack our constitutional
rights — including birthright citizenship.

Within 24 hours, I took him to court.

As California’s Attorney General, I unapologetically fight against every
one of Trump’s violations of our Constitution — but this one is personal
for me:

My parents left behind their lives as social justice workers in the
Philippines and brought my family to California when I was just two months
old. At that time, the Philippines was on the brink of martial law with a
dictator rising to power, and my parents wanted to raise me and my
siblings in a country with rule of law, civil rights, and democracy.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250806-pet/?t=1002&akid=1908%2E1088799%2EyYrZHY ][IMG]

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250806-pet/?t=1003&akid=1908%2E1088799%2EyYrZHY ]Decades later, I’m fighting to protect the rights and values they came
here for — from a federal administration determined to dismantle them.

When Trump attacks our basic constitutional rights, whether it’s
birthright citizenship or the right to vote or freedom of speech, it’s not
a legal theory or a headline — it’s about whether people get to fully
participate in our country. Whether all kids born here have the same
protections and opportunities as anyone else. Whether America and
California live up to the promise and dream that so many come here to
pursue.

That’s why I do this work. I’ve filed 37 lawsuits in the past 28 weeks to
stop Trump’s illegal actions and defend the rights of every Californian.

I will use the full power of my office and every bit of platform I have to
protect those most vulnerable and safeguard the California Dream for every
person who seeks it.

But this fight doesn’t just happen in court. It happens when we raise our
voices, together — so I need to know you’re with me.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250806-pet/?t=1004&akid=1908%2E1088799%2EyYrZHY ]Will you sign on today to stand with me in this important fight to
defend our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms?

ADD MY NAME

Thanks for speaking out. Having you on this team means the world to me.

-Rob

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/1015?t=1005&akid=1908%2E1088799%2EyYrZHY ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1006&akid=1908%2E1088799%2EyYrZHY
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=1908%2E1088799%2EyYrZHY

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112861233/561856692/1286950077?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.06_Cooper-Post-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjVmZDJhOS0wMDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8kruhGSU0jlUSaiStAUI0e6Npa7qaRDSqTWrPXJCNpw=) Folks, this is Roy Cooper, and I’m reaching out with exciting news that I wanted to make sure you heard from me:

**I’m officially running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina.** We launched our campaign on last Monday, and we’ve been overwhelmed by the response from Democratic supporters across the country. I never take running for office lightly, but more than ever, I _know_ that we can win together. [**I’m grateful to have Lisa Blunt Rochester's support in these critical first few days, and I need yours, too. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: AIPAC is pouring millions into the 2026 elections…and it’s only 2025
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250806-1465-foote&t=1001&akid=1465%2E342411%2EaRtMvY ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Did you see this?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250806-movement.v2GThO&refcode=em20250806-1465&t=1002&akid=1465%2E342411%2EaRtMvY ]Sludge: AIPAC Gives Millions in PAC Donations to House Allies, Senators
in 2026 Races.

We need to be blunt: AIPAC has already poured more than $12.7 million into
federal candidates and members of Congress through PAC contributions — all
to shape the outcome of the 2026 elections.^1

Why? To lobby for and push their own agenda while silencing the
progressive movement that stands in their way.

This isn’t about policy nuance. It’s about right-wing money being used to
interfere in Democratic campaigns, buy seats, and tilt the playing field
toward candidates who won’t challenge the status quo.

We saw this playbook last cycle, and now they're breaking it out again. If
we don’t fight back now, AIPAC and its billionaire donors could decide who
gets to represent us in Congress.

That’s why we’re building grassroots power — to stand toe-to-toe with
dark-money PACs and corporate influence, and to protect a democracy that
represents working people.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250806-movement.v2GThO&refcode=em20250806-1465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1465%2E342411%2EaRtMvY ]Will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund to fight
back and show AIPAC that our democracy is not for sale?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250806-movement.v2GThO&refcode=em20250806-1465&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1465%2E342411%2EaRtMvY ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

^1 — [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19987?t=1023&akid=1465%2E342411%2EaRtMvY ]Sludge

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1465%2E342411%2EaRtMvY

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Bruna, United We Dream
subject: It takes people power to change our future! ✊
body:
Solidarity is not just an idea, it’s an action. Get trained and connected with people ready to protect our future! | | | Hey Peter, It takes people power to change the future. In a moment of escalating attacks against immigrants and working-class communities, we must show up with clarity, courage, and discipline to protect one another. **🤝Ready sign the Solidarity Pledge? Join the growing number of people who have committed to defending our future through collective and strategic action:** **[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMUdr7FKT71i2S49KPrpmS1pa_ZY1ogaxt6AnAz-kHBZqyUNipWmCRALjuUUuuqyVq81cqNcCP3wSf3DF7vaw100VTQsXa7vJ-7IJ6x4_Ox21KjPM2cJkcp1fP_yXMJsCmKqHABaYCnEsQUrNqL5VdLpI3-jWf5wR8AQ7IJQtjKiYiTA-Q6uMu5B3y4crOWnVNFSx__67kh02BAal_P22fZCt50zuKIzp_-mUbqeosP_n/4it/aLAx1IksT4KK3CvOxuot_w/h0/h001.9ULtlCWoztS1rWMRGTuAL1rw6wz2mP2AJBFPLuLTzNY)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMUdr7FKT71i2S49KPrpmS1pa_ZY1ogaxt6AnAz-kHBZqFCkwVAiV8lKhk84GWwMOYyexVnw2MZ__tNLlmVBTwQy23hmdMCbw_nLarKCbVeD93NYYE--bC3pMv0g_uaRlUOO8Jyzp85hsLrgss-_0y-3mG6z8gxdD19TMrQnD6s9ZIpP3L-4qsHeVWBr94YhwK1GRnM1jYKwh6ntxbYfMo-6t7ObBV3cdfk8Mc7N8fi1J/4it/aLAx1IksT4KK3CvOxuot_w/h1/h001._awGXf0UWqmL9V516lVGJYycHDkyAYpO6H3c3opgpOM) In this moment of crisis, we need to come together to fight for a future that puts us, the people, first. Not through family separation and mass abductions, but through investing in the needs of working-class families. **We must choose to take care of each other. Solidarity is our roadmap to a future rooted in love, freedom, and community.** When you sign our Solidarity Pledge today, you’ll receive the next steps on how to build your leadership and protect our immigrant communities. We’ll guide you through training, coaching, and resources you can use to empower your community to take action. clean_body: Solidarity is not just an idea, it’s an action. Get trained and connected with people ready to protect our future! | | | Hey Peter, It takes people power to change the future. In a moment of escalating attacks against immigrants and working-class communities, we must show up with clarity, courage, and discipline to protect one another. 🤝Ready sign the Solidarity Pledge? Join the growing number of people who have committed to defending our future through collective and strategic action: In this moment of crisis, we need to come together to fight for a future that puts us, the people, first. Not through family separation and mass abductions, but through investing in the needs of working-class families. We must choose to take care of each other. Solidarity is our roadmap to a future rooted in love, freedom, and community. When you sign our Solidarity Pledge today, you’ll receive the next steps on how to build your leadership and protect our immigrant communities. We’ll guide you through training, coaching, and resources you can use to empower your community to take action. Every pledge counts towards making a difference and protecting the communities, loved ones, and neighbors who power us. In solidarity, Bruna and the United We Dream team | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We’ve got news for Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Texas Democrats are putting everything on the line to stop Trump’s power grab. Now, we have to step up and have their backs.
#
Donald Trump is demanding that Texas redraw our congressional map mid-decade — before the midterm elections.
He told reporters yesterday that he’s “entitled to five more seats” in Texas. He clearly thinks nobody will stand in the way of his authoritarian power grab.
But we’ve got news for Donald Trump: **We are a free people. No kings, no tyrants.**
That’s why Texas House Democrats left the state: to deny Republicans the quorum they need to ram through this rigged map. Breaking quorum is the most powerful tool they have, and they’re using it to defend our democracy when it matters most.
**These Texas House Democrats aren’t just taking a stand for our state, but for everyone in every state.**
Trump knows his cruel, corrupt, chaotic agenda is wildly unpopular. He knows the midterms won’t go his way. He knows he’s going to lose the House of Representatives. So he’s trying to rig the system to hold onto power.
Texas Democrats are putting everything on the line to stop him. Now, we have to step up and have their backs.
[**Can you chip in $3 or more to support these brave lawmakers and make sure we have the financial resources needed to keep them in this fight as long as it takes?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250806-1.pLjbWU&refcode=ema20250806-240285&t=2&akid=240285%2E444211%2E3Yc2TK)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250806-1.pLjbWU&refcode=ema20250806-240285&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=240285%2E444211%2E3Yc2TK)**
Thank you,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025-07-support-house-dems-em?refcode=em20250806-240285-footer&t=22&refcode2=240285_444211_3Yc2TK&akid=240285%2E444211%2E3Yc2TK)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=240285%2E444211%2E3Yc2TK).

name: Governor Kathy Hochul
subject: I say bring it on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team — This is Governor Kathy Hochul.

Right now, Texas Republicans are rewriting the rules to give themselves an advantage.

But I have a news flash for Republicans in Texas: **_This is no longer the Wild West._** We're not going to tolerate our democracy being stolen by a bunch of self-serving politicians.

**Americans don't want a system that's stacked against them. They believe in fairness — it's fundamental.**

That is why I welcomed the courageous Democratic Texas legislators to the New York State Capitol. These leaders have taken a bold stand against extreme Republican efforts to gerrymander their state to silence the voices of millions, especially Black and Latino communities in Texas.

[Join me and the Voter Protection Project in fighting back against Republicans’ attempts to silence our voices and erode our democracy. Split a donation today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92737?t=6&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92738?t=7&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92739?t=8&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92740?t=9&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92741?t=10&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92737?t=11&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo)
History will judge us and how we respond to this moment.

Republicans are willing to rewrite these rules to give themselves an advantage.

**The gloves are off, and I say, bring it on.**

Across the country, our democracy is under attack by Republicans who want to make it harder for people to be heard. **But we won’t go down without a fight.**

[Please chip in to the Voter Protection Project and my work to fight back against these anti-democratic schemes. The more of us who join this movement, the harder it is for anyone to silence our voices.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92737?t=12&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo)

Democracy is not a spectator sport — it’s up to all of us to protect it. I won’t back down, and neither should you.

Thank you for standing with me and with those fighting on the frontlines in Texas.

Ever Upward,

Governor Kathy Hochul
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20818%2E878179%2EeL2iUo)

Greg Abbott asks Texas Supreme Court to expel House Democratic leader who left state," **Texas Tribune's**Eleanor Klibanoff** \-- "Gov. **Greg Abbott** on Tuesday asked the Texas Supreme Court to remove Houston Rep. **Gene Wu** , chair of the House Democratic Caucus, from office, an unprecedented escalation in Republicans' efforts to resume business in the Legislature and advance new congressional maps.

At least 50 House Democrats have left the state to prevent the chamber from obtaining a quorum -- the minimum number of members necessary to undertake legislative business -- in an effort to delay the passage of new congressional lines that could net five more seats for Republicans. The unusual mid-decade redistricting effort comes at the behest of President **Donald Trump** and his political team, despite [initial reluctance](https://substack.com/redirect/977632c2-25bc-446a-82fd-6605d030a900?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Abbott and the majority of Texas' GOP congressional delegation.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/824ee482-8819-4bfd-be22-7dae57a915b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democrats left the state Sunday afternoon, ahead of a Monday vote to advance the bill. Wu, as leader of the House Democrats, announced that "this corrupt special session is over" and vowed to stay out of the state long enough to allow the session's remaining two weeks to run out.

In his legal filing, Abbott argued that amounts to an abandonment of office and is sufficient grounds to have Wu's seat vacated.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/824ee482-8819-4bfd-be22-7dae57a915b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What is at stake here? Nothing less than the future of Texas," Abbott wrote. "If a small fraction of recalcitrant lawmakers choose to run out the clock today, they can do so for any, and every, Regular or Special Session, potentially bankrupting the State in an attempt to get their way."

Wu argued that denying a quorum "was not an abandonment of my office," but "a fulfillment of my oath" of office to abide by the Constitution.

"When a governor conspires with a disgraced president to ram through a racist gerrymandered map, my constitutional duty is to not be a willing participant," Wu said in a statement, in which he accused Abbott of seeking to "silence my dissent by removing a duly-elected official from office."

Attorney General **Ken Paxton** , who threatened to file similar legal actions earlier in the day against multiple House Democrats, followed Abbott's emergency petition by sending his own letter to the state Supreme Court hours later, in which he argued that Abbott lacked the authority to request the removal.

Paxton wrote that while he "appreciates the Governor's passion" for restoring a quorum, state law permits only the attorney general or a local county or district attorney to bring what's known as [a quo warranto proceeding](https://substack.com/redirect/ffbd7da7-b850-4099-a1b1-f7d853b73d05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which seeks a member's removal on the grounds that they have abandoned their office.

In the letter, Paxton said he would take action against the absent legislators if the House continued to lack a quorum on Friday, the deadline set by House Speaker **Dustin Burrows**.

Abbott clarified in a [social media post](https://substack.com/redirect/fe364726-c936-4aa6-a8de-6099c1dc4791?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) later in the night that his filing sought quo warranto through a provision in the Texas Constitution and a separate portion of government code, which he said would give his office the proper authority. He also attached a letter addressed to the state Supreme Court in the post that stated "at least 500 years of common law" made it clear the governor's office could make the filing.

Paxton has previously acknowledged that this would likely be a lengthy and complicated process, telling conservative podcaster Benny Johnson that they'd have to bring individual lawsuits in each district.

"We'd have to go through a court process, and we'd have to file that maybe in districts that are not friendly to Republicans," Paxton said on Monday. "So it's a challenge because every district would be different."

If a judge were to find that the seats were vacant, they would be filled through a special election.

The Supreme Court of Texas is entirely Republican, and Chief Justice **Jimmy Blacklock** , [appointed in January](https://substack.com/redirect/1554d382-3dab-4c0b-b038-53ead62bba92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), was formerly Abbott's general counsel. When he appointed Blacklock to the bench in 2018, [Abbott said](https://substack.com/redirect/b41b2d42-4164-42a1-a936-6402ccf78887?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he "wanted to make sure that the person I appointed was going to make decisions that I know how they are going to decide." Blacklock has said that was more a reflection of their shared judicial philosophy.

In 2021, Blacklock [authored an opinion](https://substack.com/redirect/39f3451e-eb8f-4067-8a92-eb409feab64c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the court that said the Texas Constitution enables the possibility of a so-called "quorum break," although it also allows for consequences to bring members back." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/e4cd8808-dc29-4bd2-ad1a-3c0083f5bccf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . TOP NEWS " Gov. Greg Abbott asks Texas Supreme Court to expel House Democratic leader who left state," Texas Tribune'sEleanor Klibanoff \-- "Gov. Greg Abbott on Tuesday asked the Texas Supreme Court to remove Houston Rep. Gene Wu , chair of the House Democratic Caucus, from office, an unprecedented escalation in Republicans' efforts to resume business in the Legislature and advance new congressional maps. At least 50 House Democrats have left the state to prevent the chamber from obtaining a quorum -- the minimum number of members necessary to undertake legislative business -- in an effort to delay the passage of new congressional lines that could net five more seats for Republicans. The unusual mid-decade redistricting effort comes at the behest of President Donald Trump and his political team, despite from Abbott and the majority of Texas' GOP congressional delegation. Democrats left the state Sunday afternoon, ahead of a Monday vote to advance the bill. Wu, as leader of the House Democrats, announced that "this corrupt special session is over" and vowed to stay out of the state long enough to allow the session's remaining two weeks to run out. In his legal filing, Abbott argued that amounts to an abandonment of office and is sufficient grounds to have Wu's seat vacated. "What is at stake here? Nothing less than the future of Texas," Abbott wrote. "If a small fraction of recalcitrant lawmakers choose to run out the clock today, they can do so for any, and every, Regular or Special Session, potentially bankrupting the State in an attempt to get their way." Wu argued that denying a quorum "was not an abandonment of my office," but "a fulfillment of my oath" of office to abide by the Constitution. "When a governor conspires with a disgraced president to ram through a racist gerrymandered map, my constitutional duty is to not be a willing participant," Wu said in a statement, in which he accused Abbott of seeking to "silence my dissent by removing a duly-elected official from office." Attorney General Ken Paxton , who threatened to file similar legal actions earlier in the day against multiple House Democrats, followed Abbott's emergency petition by sending his own letter to the state Supreme Court hours later, in which he argued that Abbott lacked the authority to request the removal. Paxton wrote that while he "appreciates the Governor's passion" for restoring a quorum, state law permits only the attorney general or a local county or district attorney to bring what's known as , which seeks a member's removal on the grounds that they have abandoned their office. In the letter, Paxton said he would take action against the absent legislators if the House continued to lack a quorum on Friday, the deadline set by House Speaker Dustin Burrows. Abbott clarified in a later in the night that his filing sought quo warranto through a provision in the Texas Constitution and a separate portion of government code, which he said would give his office the proper authority. He also attached a letter addressed to the state Supreme Court in the post that stated "at least 500 years of common law" made it clear the governor's office could make the filing. Paxton has previously acknowledged that this would likely be a lengthy and complicated process, telling conservative podcaster Benny Johnson that they'd have to bring individual lawsuits in each district. "We'd have to go through a court process, and we'd have to file that maybe in districts that are not friendly to Republicans," Paxton said on Monday. "So it's a challenge because every district would be different." If a judge were to find that the seats were vacant, they would be filled through a special election. The Supreme Court of Texas is entirely Republican, and Chief Justice Jimmy Blacklock , , was formerly Abbott's general counsel. When he appointed Blacklock to the bench in 2018, he "wanted to make sure that the person I appointed was going to make decisions that I know how they are going to decide." Blacklock has said that was more a reflection of their shared judicial philosophy. In 2021, Blacklock for the court that said the Texas Constitution enables the possibility of a so-called "quorum break," although it also allows for consequences to bring members back." The most dangerous attacks on reproductive freedom are happening at the state level. |
---

We're fighting back by recruiting, training, and electing pro-choice champions nationwide — and we need your insight! | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112862231/561860370/-1791718928?refcode=WUENE811_2025806_ContraceptionSurvey_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056737&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDU3MTYxZS0wNTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fB4GQ8zoPqjfsYbEIF-ea2TZ6iWWDoe2aRwsaOvU33I=&emci=e39fe917-0573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1d57161e-0573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5177934)
---
Hi Peter,

**121 million Americans — that's nearly one in three — now live in states that are actively restricting access to birth control.**

From rolling back contraception protections to coordinated misinformation campaigns about medical data, anti-choice extremists are working state by state to chip away at reproductive freedom. The Republican agenda isn't just being carried out in Washington – governors, attorneys general, state legislators, and local officials are also in on the cruelty.

**That's why state and local elections matter so much** — and why our team continues to heavily recruit and support candidates across the country for races up and down the ballot. Democratic pro-choice women are the leaders we need to block dangerous legislation, protect access to reproductive health care, and stop these attacks at every level.

Our support to candidates includes message crafting with help from our community, so we're asking for your voice in this critical moment.
[**This is your chance to help shape the fight against Republicans rolling back reproductive health care, Peter. Please complete the survey by 11:59 p.m. tonight to make sure your voice is heard:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112862232/561860371/-1791718928?refcode=WUENE811_2025806_ContraceptionSurvey_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056737&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDU3MTYxZS0wNTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fB4GQ8zoPqjfsYbEIF-ea2TZ6iWWDoe2aRwsaOvU33I=&emci=e39fe917-0573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=1d57161e-0573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5177934)

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Communication is the foundation of a good relationship
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112862256/561860511/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE0Y2U2Ni0wNTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylcsuRX_6oojy1-eqAaUi3TIlb6zpjQMIt5FhzlMXao=)

Peter,

They say the foundation of any strong relationship is good communication. And I’ve been thinking about that a lot lately, because here in Iowa’s 1st District, that communication has completely broken down.

It’s August recess, a time when members of Congress are supposed to come home, listen to the people they represent, and answer questions about what they’ve been doing in Washington. But Mariannette Miller-Meeks is nowhere to be found. I have seen zero effort to check in with the folks she was elected to serve.

_Her silence says a lot._ How are you supposed to be held accountable if you never show up? How can anyone feel heard if there’s no one listening?

**That’s not the kind of representation I believe in and not the kind of representative I want to be. I’m running for Congress because I believe leadership should be a two-way street, and I want to be a voice for you in Washington.**

This summer, I’ve been doing just that by making stops at county fairs, visiting rural hospitals, meeting with farmers, and having honest conversations with people across this district.

And now, I’d love to hear from _you_ directly. **[I want to know what you’re talking about around your kitchen table, what you wish Washington would finally pay attention to, and what kind of leadership you think Iowa deserves. Will you take a few minutes to fill out my Priorities Survey and let me know what’s on your mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112862257/561860512/-160717506?ms=em25_250806_surv1_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em25_250806_surv1_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em25_250806_surv1_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250806_surv1_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=UN99crR+GYbgD3Iqu+JG/IlMfngsrZJ1OvmY3cszsfUvFOIfK5EZ45/iw92LUC4IqjWaqtggnijFSG3cTJ67d1AIFGrBatNSNZ2QgD1FE1N86rsXLmQCBp9BjvDjlqltqnpHXeDGLFypXE1pCTrCIg3N2TE+BYXDhjBj94z8KKc=&refcode2=7014ce66-0573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE0Y2U2Ni0wNTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylcsuRX_6oojy1-eqAaUi3TIlb6zpjQMIt5FhzlMXao=&emci=761f2005-dc72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7014ce66-0573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891890)** **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112862258/561860513/-160717506?ms=em25_250806_surv1_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em25_250806_surv1_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em25_250806_surv1_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250806_surv1_esrv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=UN99crR+GYbgD3Iqu+JG/IlMfngsrZJ1OvmY3cszsfUvFOIfK5EZ45/iw92LUC4IqjWaqtggnijFSG3cTJ67d1AIFGrBatNSNZ2QgD1FE1N86rsXLmQCBp9BjvDjlqltqnpHXeDGLFypXE1pCTrCIg3N2TE+BYXDhjBj94z8KKc=&refcode2=7014ce66-0573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE0Y2U2Ni0wNTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylcsuRX_6oojy1-eqAaUi3TIlb6zpjQMIt5FhzlMXao=&emci=761f2005-dc72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7014ce66-0573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891890)**

name: Leslie Mehta
subject: Why I’m here, and why I want to hear from you
body:
It’s about listening as much as leading. Here’s why.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112862512/561861478/-1649556068?refcode=20250806_TestB_1st&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjk4MGFiODgtMDY3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0rrJ0a4_BLQ9yDO5elp8_GgrHHHQCpxfh_JA1nlP5XA=&emci=9662ea45-f76e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f980ab88-0673-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=10020268)

| | Hi Peter, **My favorite thing about campaigning is going door to door in our community.** I love talking with our neighbors, hearing their concerns, and having an actual conversation about what they need. These conversations help inform me on what I need to do when I reach Richmond, but they also strengthen my bond with our community. **Each conversation renews my dedication to the advocacy that brought me to politics in the first place.** But I can't knock on every door. So, I'd like to tell you a little more about me over the coming weeks, and I'd love to hear more about you. **Want to know how I got into politics? Let me tell you:**

Now it's your turn - what keeps you up at night? What changes do you want to see? [**Let me know**](mailto:lesliemehta@lesliemehta.com)**.** Thank you for listening, and I look forward to learning more about you! Leslie

body:
Support rational conservative leadership.| | | Glenn's opponents are lining up to try and beat him, friend.
---

body:
I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Donald Trump won in 2024. That makes me the GOP’s top target.

| Hi there, it’s Jon Ossoff. I’m writing to ask, directly, if you’ll split a $10 donation between my re-election campaign and Linda Sánchez today.

I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Donald Trump won in 2024. That makes me the GOP’s top target.

To win, and win big, we’re building the most ambitious statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. That means more organizers, more rallies, and more direct outreach to voters in every corner of the state.

If everyone reading this chipped in just $10, we’d hit our weekly fundraising goal tonight. But the reality is: not everyone gives. That’s why your early support matters so much.
