name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/6/2025
body:
“We absolutely back the badge”: Mesa County defends deputy in federal suit
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Rural counties are pushing back against progressive overreach. Mesa County is [standing behind a sheriff’s deputy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) targeted by Phil Weiser’s politicized federal lawsuit. Meanwhile, Colorado is facing [legal blowback for taxing overtime pay](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) that Trump’s new tax law exempted—critics say it’s a $500 million TABOR violation. In a rare win for fiscal restraint, a federal judge [blocked Colorado’s ban on abortion pill reversal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), citing constitutional violations. Meanwhile, Colorado received federal approval to [ban sugary soda purchases with SNAP benefits](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) starting in 2026, a move critics say could hurt low-income families while doing little to curb obesity.
On the energy front, local [momentum is building for nuclear power](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as Xcel’s exit from coal threatens higher costs for consumers. Denver’s [biggest-ever infrastructure bond](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is headed to voters in November, but nearly [half the $40B state budget is now exempt from TABOR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—raising alarms over accountability. And in bipartisan fashion, Colorado’s congressional delegation is demanding the [release of $140M in frozen water project funds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to address drought challenges in the Colorado River Basin.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Cory Gaines takes aim at Colorado’s so-called “harm reduction” efforts, exposing how state-funded programs are [handing out instructions for smoking meth and crack](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). He argues this isn’t public health—it’s taxpayer-funded drug normalization.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, August 6, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[“We absolutely back the badge”: Mesa County defends deputy in federal suit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Mesa County is taking Colorado’s top political figures to court.
On Tuesday, commissioners unanimously voted to authorize a federal lawsuit against Governor Jared Polis and Attorney General Phil Weiser over what they called “politically motivated litigation” targeting local law enforcement under a controversial new state law. The board’s action followed a detailed legal presentation from County Attorney Todd Starr and remarks from all three commissioners defending Sheriff Todd Rowell and other named deputies.
“This action is necessary to protect the constitutional rights of our employees at the Mesa County Sheriff’s Office,” Starr said. “They’re facing imminent threats of civil liability and penalties.”
At issue is Senate Bill 276, which changed how law enforcement can share information—especially when it comes to immigration. Mesa County leaders say the language is murky and that it’s being weaponized to punish a deputy for following his training.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Going nuclear: Local support grows for Colorado’s next energy chapter](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A June 2025 report shows that over 88% of surveyed residents in Northwest Colorado support including nuclear energy in the state's long-term energy strategy, with strong backing for reprocessing spent fuel—provided safety, transparency, and local control are prioritized.
* The region is considering participation in the federal consent-based siting (CBS) program, with no commitments yet—just public engagement to explore interest in nuclear solutions and storage facilities.
* While Colorado recently passed HB25-1040, recognizing nuclear as a clean energy resource, other legislative efforts stalled due to budget concerns. Nonetheless, regional and state-level interest in nuclear energy is growing amid failures to meet emission reduction goals.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[TABOR Undermined as Almost Half of Colorado Budget Now Exempt](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Nearly three-fourths of Colorado’s state budget—over $9,000 per resident—is now exempt from TABOR limits, up from 46% in 1996, according to the Common Sense Institute.

* Fee-based “enterprise” revenue has surged 3,369% since 1994, with programs like higher education, unemployment compensation, and CHASE generating the bulk of TABOR-exempt income.

* Despite voter approval of Prop 117 to limit new enterprises, the state created 10 new ones since 2020, costing over $124 million, and recent legislation is projected to generate $300 million more in exempt revenue.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Daniel: Colorado’s political ruling class has turned common sense upside down](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BOBBIE DANIEL****| COMMENTARY | AUGUST 5** _There was a time when Colorado ran on common sense. We valued hard work, local control, and the idea that if you played by the rules, you’d get a fair shake. But somewhere along the way, the folks running this state traded those values for political theater and personal ambition._
__

**[Gaines: Is CDPHE’s harm reduction program normalizing meth and crack on the taxpayer’s dime?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY CORY GAINES | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 5** _The Colorado Politics article linked first below is about a meth flyer that was circulating in Denver and causing some heartburn. It’s a flyer which offers tips on how to smoke not only meth but also crack cocaine. The flyer was produced and distributed by Access Point Denver._
__

**[Russia hoax was the strategy: Clinton greenlit Trump smear to deflect from her email scandal during 2016 run](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SHAINA COLE | NATIONAL | AUGUST 4** _Newly declassified documents and insider testimony has started to change how people view the whole Trump–Russia narrative. At the heart of it all is a 2017 intelligence report that claimed Vladimir Putin meddled in the 2016 election to help Donald Trump win._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---
**🦃 DID YOU KNOW?** **Turkeys can blush—literally.** When excited, nervous, or trying to impress a mate, the skin on their head and neck shifts color, turning red, blue, or white. Even the snood—the fleshy flap over their beak—flushes bright red.
|

**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "There is danger from all men. The only maxim of a free government ought to be to trust no man living with power to endanger the public liberty." – John Adams

Mesa County leaders say the language is murky and that it’s being weaponized to punish a deputy for following his training. | A June 2025 report shows that over 88% of surveyed residents in Northwest Colorado support including nuclear energy in the state's long-term energy strategy, with strong backing for reprocessing spent fuel—provided safety, transparency, and local control are prioritized. The region is considering participation in the federal consent-based siting (CBS) program, with no commitments yet—just public engagement to explore interest in nuclear solutions and storage facilities. While Colorado recently passed HB25-1040, recognizing nuclear as a clean energy resource, other legislative efforts stalled due to budget concerns. Nonetheless, regional and state-level interest in nuclear energy is growing amid failures to meet emission reduction goals. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Nearly three-fourths of Colorado’s state budget—over $9,000 per resident—is now exempt from TABOR limits, up from 46% in 1996, according to the Common Sense Institute. Fee-based “enterprise” revenue has surged 3,369% since 1994, with programs like higher education, unemployment compensation, and CHASE generating the bulk of TABOR-exempt income. Despite voter approval of Prop 117 to limit new enterprises, the state created 10 new ones since 2020, costing over $124 million, and recent legislation is projected to generate $300 million more in exempt revenue. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ BOBBIE DANIEL| COMMENTARY | AUGUST 5 There was a time when Colorado ran on common sense. We valued hard work, local control, and the idea that if you played by the rules, you’d get a fair shake. But somewhere along the way, the folks running this state traded those values for political theater and personal ambition. CORY GAINES | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 5 The Colorado Politics article linked first below is about a meth flyer that was circulating in Denver and causing some heartburn. It’s a flyer which offers tips on how to smoke not only meth but also crack cocaine. The flyer was produced and distributed by Access Point Denver. SHAINA COLE | NATIONAL | AUGUST 4 Newly declassified documents and insider testimony has started to change how people view the whole Trump–Russia narrative. At the heart of it all is a 2017 intelligence report that claimed Vladimir Putin meddled in the 2016 election to help Donald Trump win. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat | | 🦃 DID YOU KNOW? Turkeys can blush—literally. When excited, nervous, or trying to impress a mate, the skin on their head and neck shifts color, turning red, blue, or white. Even the snood—the fleshy flap over their beak—flushes bright red. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "There is danger from all men. The only maxim of a free government ought to be to trust no man living with power to endanger the public liberty." – John Adams | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Team Indiana Democrats
subject: Stand with Texas Democrats, Don’t Let GOP Rig 2026 Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter,

On Sunday, Texas Democrats hopped on a plane and fled their state to break quorum in order to stop Republicans from stealing the 2026 midterm elections. After Donald Trump demanded that Texas Republicans redraw their state maps to ensure Republicans would pick up 5 more congressional seats, Texas Democrats sprung into action to ensure that Trump doesn’t get his way. These Texas Democrats are doing this at great personal sacrifice. In addition to being away from their family (and jobs) for as long as this may take, they are also being fined $500/day and will be lambasted with negative ads in their district funded by Governor Greg Abbott. **If they are going to be able to hold out long enough for this to count, they’re going to need our help.** **[If you make a contribution from this email, it will be split between the Indiana Democratic Party and Texas Democratic Party in order to help the Texas Democrats fund this very expensive fight for all of our sake.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112863630/561865156/1935785635?refcode=250806texas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZkOTNkMS0wODczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r70W80m_BEiSuJhRukPmaDETbA7UYI5irVof3TfwZeo=#)** **[[Rush Donation to Support Indiana and Texas Democrats!]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112863631/561865158/1935785635?refcode=250806texas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZkOTNkMS0wODczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r70W80m_BEiSuJhRukPmaDETbA7UYI5irVof3TfwZeo=#)** Indiana is well-acquainted with Republican gerrymandering. Following the 2010 census, they gerrymandered control of the Indiana House, ensuring their majority. Following the 2020 census, their continued blatant gerrymandering to ensure themselves a super-majority. **_Now, we see[reporting from Punchbowl News](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112863633/561865159/53834431?refcode=250806texas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZkOTNkMS0wODczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r70W80m_BEiSuJhRukPmaDETbA7UYI5irVof3TfwZeo=&emci=0f6b6b08-0773-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=92fd93d1-0873-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) that Vice President JD Vance is planning a trip to Indianapolis this week to pressure Indiana Republicans into cutting Indiana’s two remaining Democratic Congressional seats._** Hoosiers must show Texas Democrats that we have their back! We’ll need their support if the redistricting wars come to Indiana next. **[[Rush a Donation]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112863634/561865161/1935785635?refcode=250806texas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmZkOTNkMS0wODczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r70W80m_BEiSuJhRukPmaDETbA7UYI5irVof3TfwZeo=#)** This is the fight to save democracy that Democrats have been warning about for ten years. It’s going to take all of us to ensure that this bold attempt to steal this republic does not go unchallenged. In solidarity,
Indiana Democrats

They’re acting like a terrorist force, with masked men jumping out of unmarked cars to kidnap, detain, and disappear people without explanation.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250806-5311-footer&t=1&akid=5311%2E420207%2EAZnLmt)
Peter, I went on CNN to tell the truth about ICE: They’re acting like a terrorist force, with masked men jumping out of unmarked cars to kidnap, detain, and disappear people without explanation.
It’s unconstitutional, illegal, and they’re terrorizing innocent people.
**What I said is the truth, and it clearly struck a nerve. Because the White House called me “deranged” for standing up for immigrants:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250806-1?refcode=em20250806-5311&amount=3&refcode2=5311_420207_AZnLmt&akid=5311%2E420207%2EAZnLmt)
Let me be clear: I will not be intimidated, and I am never going to stop fighting for the rights and dignity of every person, everywhere, regardless of their immigration status.
The White House can come after me all they want, but if they don’t want ICE to be compared to a terrorist force, they should stop acting like one. Period.
**Republicans are trying to silence me, but with your support, they won’t succeed.[Will you pitch in now to help me keep standing up against Trump’s radical right-wing immigration policy?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250806-1?refcode=em20250806-5311&amount=3&refcode2=5311_420207_AZnLmt&akid=5311%2E420207%2EAZnLmt)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250806-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250806-5311&refcode2=5311_420207_AZnLmt&akid=5311%2E420207%2EAZnLmt)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250806-5311-footer&t=2&refcode2=5311_420207_AZnLmt&akid=5311%2E420207%2EAZnLmt)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

## `Folks, do we Want Independent Media or Corporate Control? THIS IS YOUR CHANCE. Please Consider a Paid Subscription to the Soundcheck Fund to Support Independent Media!`
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.liWHmiPTAHxm5SKr8SMO5l5rP4GmLWDlU_9aJX0w--4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170280208)
### **In This Letter!**
**😁 David Shuster's Great video**
**👊 My Column**
**💪** **The Soundcheck Fund!**
**🥃 NYT Pitchbot's Hilarious Pitches**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb524555-2fa3-4442-8456-f1874038e392?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Opinion | Releasing the Epstein files could have a chilling effect on
future presidents' affiliation with known sex-traffickers.
### **DAVID SHUSTER VIDEO, EXCLUSIVELY FOR YOU!**
_**WATCH as David Shuster brings us[Trump's attack on numbers](https://substack.com/redirect/55c63f18-21ad-4641-b657-fe2187706438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Dementia on numbers (bringing prices down 1200%??). And why one should beware of charging bears! That applies doubly to GOP Congress members holding town halls...**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/89edfbd5-6c73-46f3-aaab-28f25b76d818?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **Cliff 's Note: A President, a Party and a Pool of Predatory Actors**
This isn't your grandpa's GOP. Hell, it's not even your crazy uncle's. It's a motley crew of Trumpist damnation.
The so-called "Grand Old Party" has upped the ante when it comes the kind of spine-tingling spider monkeys from whom they take their _getting-winded-while-shuffling_ orders. Vicious dictators, billionaires who see us as an algorithmic experiment or [a sex trafficking ring](https://substack.com/redirect/c451c78c-67f7-49f0-b9db-d793edd60092?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) like Jeffrey Epstein's, _[they're all of a kind](https://substack.com/redirect/7f0a4b8e-b31a-4055-97b7-a1b4940e2a88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
**They 're Predators.**
No, not the hideous, pincer-laden chaps from those fun films. Not including Kash Patel, of course.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2da19f88-ffe4-4726-88ec-855b70c4e50f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c859e9f5-30af-496f-b3e3-6151badd629b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_I think we can all spot a common ancestor here ...But I digress._
We're talking about a Trumpian lot, who exploit children, women, workers, consumers, our environment, the impoverished, the middle class. The need for a college degree, healthcare, childcare, prescription drugs and, ya know, food and water.
Be they the sex traffickers, debt inculcators, violent insurrectionists, [white supremacists](https://substack.com/redirect/6a98012c-7602-4d51-b060-a400ef674f5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), professional grifters, [ICE sadists](https://substack.com/redirect/96534e55-97cb-4aee-90b6-539957e0d49f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), super-lobbyists and worst of all? Creepy, right-wing billionaires who see us as a resource to exploit at their whim, then discard like trash.
Or what Marjorie Taylor Greene would call "my family tree."
None would know the Constitution if it walked up and subpoenaed them.
From [Trump's](https://substack.com/redirect/70d6060a-e081-4e8f-8f3d-7d035fc1254b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) decades-long friendship with Epstein to Matt Gaetz's looming allegations and the MAGA cult's embrace of men like Roy Moore. [To Musk, Zuckerberg et al ](https://substack.com/redirect/e15570f4-9ae7-4cda-a005-88ab24296bf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)whose origin stories are rife with stolen ideas, ripped off partners, screwed workers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8a16a4a9-29f9-4a51-8470-8a63ee197a79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb524555-2fa3-4442-8456-f1874038e392?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Whether it's conservatives assassinating State Senators in Minnesota
or liberals refusing to sell Alan Dershowitz pierogis in Martha's
Vineyard, both sides have taken incivility to an extreme.
**This isn 't a coincidence. It's a culture of exploitation.** And it rots from the head down, like a fish, as the saying goes. Or sharks and batteries, as Trump would riff about for two hours making you wish you'd overdosed on melatonin.
Predators protect their own. Con men cover for con men. And the modern GOP has [become a safe haven for all of them](https://substack.com/redirect/40c05175-4365-4720-b194-943c9226e6ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Democracy can survive this--but not without fighters.
Including independent media exposing it every damn day. And that's why Blue Amp is here. We are literally about amplifying what needs to be in the conversation--it's in our name!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8fbe665d-c981-4d95-878b-f83d341ab863?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And why we need you with us--loud, proud, relentless. [Authentic voices that are needed at this moment](https://substack.com/redirect/57a2cfdb-d7dc-4a76-8751-2a65654bb674?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**Which brings us to the Soundcheck Fund ....**
We've talked about it. Explained why [we need you to sign up for paid subscriptions](https://substack.com/redirect/9a77e4d3-6371-4d19-b5fe-6448eb327fe0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to add to _our five-figure investment_ this effort: **to fund an independent-media ecosystem**.
**AND IT 'S LAUNCH TIME!**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb524555-2fa3-4442-8456-f1874038e392?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump has fired the commissioner of the Bureau of Labor
Statistics in a rambling Truth Social post where he put his own name
in quotation marks, raising new questions about Biden's mental
fortitude.
## **Soundcheck: A Mic for the Next Generation of Political Influencers**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/abe74ca9-0ba4-4728-b0ff-01f6d03747fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**What if the next superstar 's trapped in anonymity by right-wing algorithms? Burning out at a 9-to-5 without the time to use skills to save our democracy? Worse, if institutions, donors, and those with big platforms refused to help, so we lost this generational talent to corporate PR...After all, we all must feed our families.**
_**What if you could be the one to help them break through?**_
Welcome to the **Soundcheck Fund** --a Blue Amp initiative designed to discover, amplify, and support emerging voices. Think of it as a launchpad for political messaging--_scrappy, independent, and built to amplify what corporate media ignores._
* * *
### **🎧 Why We Built This**
The loudest voices in politics aren't always the smartest--just the best-funded.
Sadly, it's often not talent that wins attention anymore. It's ad spends. Insider access. Algorithms attuned to outrage.
The result?
* Authentic voices get drowned out.
* Smart commentary is hidden.
* New leaders never make it past the loading screen.

**We 're here to change that.**
* * *
### **The Premise Is Simple**
We're seeding a new generation of creators--those who speak with clarity, urgency, humor, and fire. Those who'd go viral _if they had time, funding, and support._
With the Soundcheck Fund, we give talented independent media purveyors:
* A platform.
* A payment.
* A push.

You don't need to be polished--it's often better if you're not. You don't need perfect lighting or expensive gear. You just need something _real_ to say, and the guts to say it.
* * *
### **Who Should Apply?**
If this hits home, we're probably talking to you:
* You've been ranting to your friends about politics for years.
* You've got a take that _makes sense_ --and nobody says it quite the way you do.
* You've got an audience, or the bones of one, but no time/money to build it out.
* You've never been invited to the table--but you've been building your own.

We'll help you turn that into a _micro-platform_ --fast.
You'll publish your own content. We'll feature your work. You'll get a micro-grant. And we'll send readers and allies your way.
Apply [HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/37898d57-bdd1-41a1-9dfd-a1e9c2453d02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
* * *
### **💡 Who Should Fund This?**
If you've ever said:
> _" Why don't we have our own Joe Rogan, Theo Von or Ben Shapiro?"_
> _" Why are we always playing catch-up in the messaging war?"_
> _" Where are the new voices who actually get it?"_
**... then this fund is your answer.**
Supporters of the Soundcheck Fund aren't just donors--they're _talent scouts for a more democratic and better future_. The ones who can say:
> _" Yeah, I backed them before anyone knew their name."_
You don't need to bankroll a media empire. You just need to help one person speak up.
* * *
### **📣 First Cohort: Already Making Noise**
We've already picked the first few recipients -- and they've been doing exactly what we hoped before we even announced them!
* Calling out corporate candidates in plain language.
* Writing essays that feel like a slap in the face (in a good way).
* Podcasting with the urgency of people who know this moment matters.

They're not polished. **They 're **_**real**_**.** And that's exactly what this moment demands.
* * *
### **🫵 What You Can Do Right Now**
* **Apply** to join the next cohort -> [Right Here](https://substack.com/redirect/37898d57-bdd1-41a1-9dfd-a1e9c2453d02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Donate** to fund the next voice -> [Right Here](https://substack.com/redirect/9a77e4d3-6371-4d19-b5fe-6448eb327fe0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Forward** this to someone who _needs_ to hear it.

* * *
The best voices in politics aren't waiting for permission. They're waiting for a _mic_.
This is that mic.
Let's turn it on.

DAVID SHUSTER VIDEO, EXCLUSIVELY FOR YOU! WATCH as David Shuster brings us. Dementia on numbers (bringing prices down 1200%??). And why one should beware of charging bears! That applies doubly to GOP Congress members holding town halls... Cliff 's Note: A President, a Party and a Pool of Predatory Actors This isn't your grandpa's GOP. Hell, it's not even your crazy uncle's. It's a motley crew of Trumpist damnation. The so-called "Grand Old Party" has upped the ante when it comes the kind of spine-tingling spider monkeys from whom they take their getting-winded-while-shuffling orders. Vicious dictators, billionaires who see us as an algorithmic experiment or like Jeffrey Epstein's, . They 're Predators. No, not the hideous, pincer-laden chaps from those fun films. Not including Kash Patel, of course. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- I think we can all spot a common ancestor here ...But I digress. We're talking about a Trumpian lot, who exploit children, women, workers, consumers, our environment, the impoverished, the middle class. The need for a college degree, healthcare, childcare, prescription drugs and, ya know, food and water. Be they the sex traffickers, debt inculcators, violent insurrectionists, , professional grifters, , super-lobbyists and worst of all? Creepy, right-wing billionaires who see us as a resource to exploit at their whim, then discard like trash. Or what Marjorie Taylor Greene would call "my family tree." None would know the Constitution if it walked up and subpoenaed them. From decades-long friendship with Epstein to Matt Gaetz's looming allegations and the MAGA cult's embrace of men like Roy Moore. origin stories are rife with stolen ideas, ripped off partners, screwed workers. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Whether it's conservatives assassinating State Senators in Minnesota or liberals refusing to sell Alan Dershowitz pierogis in Martha's Vineyard, both sides have taken incivility to an extreme. This isn 't a coincidence. It's a culture of exploitation. And it rots from the head down, like a fish, as the saying goes. Or sharks and batteries, as Trump would riff about for two hours making you wish you'd overdosed on melatonin. Predators protect their own. Con men cover for con men. And the modern GOP has . Democracy can survive this--but not without fighters. Including independent media exposing it every damn day. And that's why Blue Amp is here. We are literally about amplifying what needs to be in the conversation--it's in our name! | | ---|---|--- And why we need you with us--loud, proud, relentless. . Which brings us to the Soundcheck Fund .... We've talked about it. Explained why to add to our five-figure investment this effort: to fund an independent-media ecosystem. AND IT 'S LAUNCH TIME! | | ---|---|--- Donald Trump has fired the commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics in a rambling Truth Social post where he put his own name in quotation marks, raising new questions about Biden's mental fortitude. Soundcheck: A Mic for the Next Generation of Political Influencers | | ---|---|--- What if the next superstar 's trapped in anonymity by right-wing algorithms? Burning out at a 9-to-5 without the time to use skills to save our democracy? Worse, if institutions, donors, and those with big platforms refused to help, so we lost this generational talent to corporate PR...After all, we all must feed our families. What if you could be the one to help them break through? Welcome to the Soundcheck Fund --a Blue Amp initiative designed to discover, amplify, and support emerging voices. Think of it as a launchpad for political messaging--scrappy, independent, and built to amplify what corporate media ignores. 🎧 Why We Built This The loudest voices in politics aren't always the smartest--just the best-funded. Sadly, it's often not talent that wins attention anymore. It's ad spends. Insider access. Algorithms attuned to outrage. The result? Authentic voices get drowned out. Smart commentary is hidden. New leaders never make it past the loading screen. We 're here to change that. The Premise Is Simple We're seeding a new generation of creators--those who speak with clarity, urgency, humor, and fire. Those who'd go viral if they had time, funding, and support. With the Soundcheck Fund, we give talented independent media purveyors: A platform. A payment. A push. You don't need to be polished--it's often better if you're not. You don't need perfect lighting or expensive gear. You just need something real to say, and the guts to say it. Who Should Apply? If this hits home, we're probably talking to you: You've been ranting to your friends about politics for years. You've got a take that makes sense --and nobody says it quite the way you do. You've got an audience, or the bones of one, but no time/money to build it out. You've never been invited to the table--but you've been building your own. We'll help you turn that into a micro-platform --fast. You'll publish your own content. We'll feature your work. You'll get a micro-grant. And we'll send readers and allies your way. Apply ! 💡 Who Should Fund This? If you've ever said: " Why don't we have our own Joe Rogan, Theo Von or Ben Shapiro?" " Why are we always playing catch-up in the messaging war?" " Where are the new voices who actually get it?" ... then this fund is your answer. Supporters of the Soundcheck Fund aren't just donors--they're talent scouts for a more democratic and better future. The ones who can say: " Yeah, I backed them before anyone knew their name." You don't need to bankroll a media empire. You just need to help one person speak up. 📣 First Cohort: Already Making Noise We've already picked the first few recipients -- and they've been doing exactly what we hoped before we even announced them! Calling out corporate candidates in plain language. Writing essays that feel like a slap in the face (in a good way). Podcasting with the urgency of people who know this moment matters. They're not polished. They 're real. And that's exactly what this moment demands. 🫵 What You Can Do Right Now Apply to join the next cohort -> Donate to fund the next voice -> Forward this to someone who needs to hear it. * The best voices in politics aren't waiting for permission. They're waiting for a mic. This is that mic. Let's turn it on. `Folks, do we Want Independent Media or Corporate Control? THIS IS YOUR CHANCE. | | Peter, As expected, the media's been in full-on attack mode. _So I 'm going to cut through the media's noise and give you the cold hard facts about President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill (BBB)._ _First off, the BBB introduces a NEW deduction for seniors: $6,000 EXTRA for single filers and $12,000 for married couples._ That means **_88% of seniors_** who receive Social Security benefits will now see _NO TAX_ on Social Security. The BBB also creates a new, tax-advantaged investment account prefunded with $1,000 for each child born from the beginning of 2025 through the end of 2028._ _ _I was proud to lead the original bill in the Senate._ **And speaking of the next generation of Americans** , the BBB also introduces the first-ever federal school choice program to empower parents over left-wing bureaucratic teachers. _But, Peter - President Trump and our Senate Majority are only getting started. We're just six months into our new unified Republican government._ **_That 's why I want to hear YOUR top priorities for the second half of 2025 to ensure your elected officials keep working for YOU._**** ** **[Please take my quick priorities survey to ensure your top concerns are heard loud and clear as we set the agenda for the remainder of 2025 clean_body: And other important information What do you want our next big win to be? | | | | | Peter, As expected, the media's been in full-on attack mode. So I 'm going to cut through the media's noise and give you the cold hard facts about President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill (BBB). First off, the BBB introduces a NEW deduction for seniors: $6,000 EXTRA for single filers and $12,000 for married couples. That means 88% of seniors who receive Social Security benefits will now see NO TAX on Social Security. The BBB also creates a new, tax-advantaged investment account prefunded with $1,000 for each child born from the beginning of 2025 through the end of 2028. I was proud to lead the original bill in the Senate. And speaking of the next generation of Americans , the BBB also introduces the first-ever federal school choice program to empower parents over left-wing bureaucratic teachers. But, Peter - President Trump and our Senate Majority are only getting started. We're just six months into our new unified Republican government. That 's why I want to hear YOUR top priorities for the second half of 2025 to ensure your elected officials keep working for YOU. [[TAKE THE SURVEY]]( Thank you, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | |

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Transparency and accountability are essential
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’ve watched unelected, outside groups set the priorities of Congress, with devastating consequences

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864030/561866543/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQzMjFlMi0wOTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0wZHqo0eaIZy1nQnIgQOI1vAFJpR3Gwkz4M2O5i7Pk=) It’s no big secret that so many Americans have lost faith in the federal government to do what’s right, even before this new Trump administration. I hear from so many folks who are fed up with the system, who feel like Congress is only working for themselves, not the American people. And it’s not particularly difficult to see why. For years, we’ve watched unelected, outside groups set the priorities of Congress, with devastating consequences. Transparency and accountability are essential to a well-functioning, trustworthy government. That’s why I’ve been one of the most vocal advocates to ban stock trading by members of Congress. I even co-sponsored a bill that would shine a light on dark money in politics, break special interests’ stranglehold on Congress, and close loopholes for lobbyists. **Because we deserve a government that works for _us_ — not billionaires, not special interests.** But if we want to restore trust in our government for good, we need to start by supporting real leaders in Congress, not more self-serving extremists. clean_body: We’ve watched unelected, outside groups set the priorities of Congress, with devastating consequences = It’s no big secret that so many Americans have lost faith in the federal government to do what’s right, even before this new Trump administration. I hear from so many folks who are fed up with the system, who feel like Congress is only working for themselves, not the American people. And it’s not particularly difficult to see why. For years, we’ve watched unelected, outside groups set the priorities of Congress, with devastating consequences. Transparency and accountability are essential to a well-functioning, trustworthy government. That’s why I’ve been one of the most vocal advocates to ban stock trading by members of Congress. I even co-sponsored a bill that would shine a light on dark money in politics, break special interests’ stranglehold on Congress, and close loopholes for lobbyists. Because we deserve a government that works for us — not billionaires, not special interests. But if we want to restore trust in our government for good, we need to start by supporting real leaders in Congress, not more self-serving extremists. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: Texas Democrats risked everything for our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for.
| It's Beto O’Rourke here.

Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.

But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. **They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.**

And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders. They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for.

Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Only if we all contribute what we can will they have the resources to keep up the fight.

[_**Will you split a donation of $25 or whatever you can to Powered by People and The Long Run to support these brave lawmakers?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4339?t=1&akid=5585%2E196590%2EC73l5O)
---

---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4344?t=10&akid=5585%2E196590%2EC73l5O)
---
Let’s make sure they know we’ve got their backs—and that they’re not in this fight alone.

With gratitude,

Beto

body:

**🗺️** If your state has a Democratic governor and legislature: Tell them to **START PLANNING REDISTRICTING NOW** in response to Texas.

This is how we fight back. This is how we win.

—Team Emerge

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Summer on the Great Lakes
body:
No one fights harder for our Great Lakes region than Marcy.

| |
---
Friend, Our Great Lakes are a national treasure. They're the largest source of freshwater on the surface of the earth, and there's no better time to be on the Great Lakes than the summer. **Tourism and recreation on the Great Lakes generate more than $52 billion for our region every year!** It's impossible to overstate how important it is to keep these waters clean and healthy. They're the source of drinking water for 40 million people, and the lifeblood of ecosystems throughout the Midwest. She's the Co-Chair of the House Great Lakes Task Force and has won hundreds of millions in federal funding for the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative. **[We need a Great Lakes champion like Marcy in Congress. clean_body: No one fights harder for our Great Lakes region than Marcy. | | Friend, Our Great Lakes are a national treasure. They're the largest source of freshwater on the surface of the earth, and there's no better time to be on the Great Lakes than the summer. Tourism and recreation on the Great Lakes generate more than $52 billion for our region every year! It's impossible to overstate how important it is to keep these waters clean and healthy. They're the source of drinking water for 40 million people, and the lifeblood of ecosystems throughout the Midwest. = No one fights harder for the Great Lakes than Marcy. name: VoteVets
subject: They are trying to ban abortion at the VA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Doug Collins, no doubt at the urging of Trump and his MAGA White House, is pursuing a plan to ban abortions at all VA facilities.
#
Peter, we need all hands on deck:
**Doug Collins, no doubt at the urging of Trump and his MAGA White House, is pursuing a plan to ban abortions at all VA facilities.**
Not some abortions — ALL abortions. Even in cases of rape or incest. There’s no point being delicate here: This will cost people their lives, and not only Veterans. It impacts their spouses, their children, and their survivors, too.
We can’t let them do this.
VoteVets is pulling together our team as we speak, and putting together a plan to combat this from every possible angle. It’s going to take efforts on Capitol Hill, in the court room, and in towns and cities across the county. And Peter, it’s going to take work from you, too.
The first step is getting organized so we can start ringing the alarm and spreading the word. So:
**[What we need from you at this moment is to sign on to this petition and tell Doug Collins and Donald Trump you completely oppose this effort to restrict reproductive health care through the VA. And then, once you’ve signed, we’re asking you to tell your friends and family what’s happening. Can we count on you?**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250806_vv_reproductive_rights/?source=em250806-1-120&akid=34503%2E3013755%2EP_CuOr)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250806_vv_reproductive_rights/?source=em250806-1-120&akid=34503%2E3013755%2EP_CuOr)
---
Thank you. More soon.
The team at VoteVets

name: Hickenlooper HQ
subject: Trump just decimated the EPA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
The EPA just announced plans to repeal a 15-year-old policy that allows it to regulate greenhouse gases

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864475/561867920/1435897075?refcode=email_080625_epa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk2NzkzZS0wYzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rmX-JwJlHLkQ37-nFpshKVa1EQS_Fru18DaX1KRSzbs=&emci=6a317689-e772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5996793e-0c73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) Folks, Trump’s attacks on science and the fundamental functions of our federal government are getting worse and worse. **_NPR: Trump EPA moves to end regulation of greenhouse gases that fuel climate change_** **Trump’s Environmental Protection Agency just announced plans to deregulate greenhouse gases by repealing the scientific finding that fossil fuels contribute to climate change — _effectively stripping the federal government of its most powerful tool to fight the climate crisis._** Look, John has been a leader on this issue for years. Whether it’s capping orphan wells, reforming gas pipelines, or curbing methane emissions, John’s fought tooth and nail to reduce air pollution and tackle the climate crisis head on — _and he won’t let Republicans surrender our progress without a fight._ **[If you’re with us, please, add your name to our petition and stand with John to demand the EPA do its job and protect Americans — _and the environment_ — from climate-fueled disasters. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864476/561867921/-1685418934?refcode=email_080625_epa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk2NzkzZS0wYzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rmX-JwJlHLkQ37-nFpshKVa1EQS_Fru18DaX1KRSzbs=&emci=6a317689-e772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5996793e-0c73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864477/561867922/-1685418934?refcode=email_080625_epa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk2NzkzZS0wYzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rmX-JwJlHLkQ37-nFpshKVa1EQS_Fru18DaX1KRSzbs=&emci=6a317689-e772-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=5996793e-0c73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715)

name: PA Dems
subject: 60 years since the Voting Rights Act. We’re not done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

**60 years ago, the Voting Rights Act changed this country.**

It was the product of organizing. Of sacrifice. Of people marching through tear gas and beatings to protect a right we’re still fighting for to this day. **And here in Pennsylvania, that fight is happening in real time.**

Republicans have **_spent years_** attacking our voting systems, spreading conspiracy theories, and trying to make it harder for people to vote. From voter ID laws to threats against election workers, they’re not even trying to hide it anymore.

We need a court that protects free and fair elections. That won’t roll over when the far-right comes knocking. That understands what’s at stake and rules with the people in mind. That’s why this year’s elections matter so much.

**We have three critical seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court on the line. If we want to stop the far-right from dismantling our voting rights piece by piece, we need to show up with organizers, with outreach, and yes, with resources.**

**_[Can you make a donation right now to help us win these races and protect the right to vote in Pennsylvania?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864480/561867981/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250806_FR_VRA_0_1MO_PADems_NA_NA_PASCOTUS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGM2M2Q2OS0wYzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sVDKsdFK4PWGIz7TFvHcmI3dQM9zcUVcc_yAp-2blTA=)_** | | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864481/561867982/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250806_FR_VRA_0_1MO_PADems_NA_NA_PASCOTUS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGM2M2Q2OS0wYzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sVDKsdFK4PWGIz7TFvHcmI3dQM9zcUVcc_yAp-2blTA=)
---
If we want to honor the legacy of the Voting Rights Act, we need to win, we need to organize, we need to outwork MAGA at every level.

Because this isn’t just about November. It’s about every year after that. It’s about making sure the next 60 years move us forward, not back.

— PA Dems

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: My number one priority
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
I ran for Congress to make life a bit easier for working families and improve our quality of life, and my number one priority has always been to lower costs.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864659/561868595/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDlhMGE1YWQtMGM3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YcGxQCZFPSIOJecyORsrJVjrSSowlxLPb_jFrU_RWAs=) When I go grocery shopping for my family, I’m shocked by the prices I’m seeing. So trust me, I hear you: _prices are way too high._ That’s why I introduced the Protecting Families From Inflation Act — and I’m calling on Speaker Mike Johnson to finally put up a vote to lower costs. **[If you’re with me, please sign my petition today to urge House Republicans to bring a cost-fighting bill to the floor and make life easier and less expensive for hard working Americans →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864660/561868596/-1670127246?refcode=email_080625_lowercosts&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDlhMGE1YWQtMGM3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YcGxQCZFPSIOJecyORsrJVjrSSowlxLPb_jFrU_RWAs=&emci=60f5f79a-4b6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d9a0a5ad-0c73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14434323)** | | [Sign The Petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864661/561868597/-1670127246?refcode=email_080625_lowercosts&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDlhMGE1YWQtMGM3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YcGxQCZFPSIOJecyORsrJVjrSSowlxLPb_jFrU_RWAs=&emci=60f5f79a-4b6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d9a0a5ad-0c73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14434323)
---
Over the last few months, we’ve seen costs continue to rise — and Americans are feeling it in their pocketbooks.
**I ran for Congress to make life a bit easier for working families and improve our quality of life, and my number one priority has always been to lower costs.**
So I’m fighting back to ensure Oregonians’ voices are being heard in Washington, and demanding the House finally bring this cost-fighting bill to the floor to put hard working people first — and I need you with me in this fight.

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: 60 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, On August 6, 1965, the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ was signed into law to secure the right to vote for racial minorities. **60 years later, Republicans are dead-set on restricting voting access all across the country.** Since losing the 2020 presidential election, Donald Trump has manufactured and promoted baseless claims about widespread voter fraud, demanded that GOP state legislatures redraw their congressional maps to lock Republicans into power, and signed executive orders that attempt to make it harder for people to vote. His Republican allies have followed his lead. Not only have several GOP-led states across the country passed laws restricting voting rights, but Republicans in Congress continue to push bills that attack the right to vote. As politicians attack your rights and undermine faith in our elections, our democracy faces serious threats this year. It’s more important than ever that we renew our commitment to fighting to protect access to the ballot box. **[Republicans want to silence you, Peter, but I won’t let them. If you believe that we should make voting in America more accessible, not less, will you chip in to join me in renewing the vow to defend our democracy and voting access?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864832/561869202/-1381597145?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDYxMDI1NC0wZDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5dgJhk6TAqeW4mRjrMl7ZIJyHnul4UXSm5SsZHq30Co=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112864833/561869206/2142146037?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDYxMDI1NC0wZDczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5dgJhk6TAqeW4mRjrMl7ZIJyHnul4UXSm5SsZHq30Co=)

name: Griswold For CO
subject: 60 years ago today…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250806-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250806-email]
Peter,
Today marks the 60th anniversary of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 being signed into law—a landmark achievement in the long struggle for civil rights and democracy in America. The law has been watered down since its original passing and its protections are under threat.
In 2013, a Supreme Court decision loosened requirements on states with a history of discrimination in voting. Trump’s Big Lie justified more voter suppression laws across the nation, and the Supreme Court is preparing to hear a case that could roll back the VRA once again.
The fight to protect the right to vote is far from over. As Secretary of State, Jena has been on the frontlines of this fight. She expanded voter access, secured our elections, and defended the right of every eligible Coloradan—Republican, Democrat, and Unaffiliated—to have their voice heard. And earlier this year, she worked with the Colorado legislature to pass the Colorado Voting Rights Act - so that the state of Colorado can protect the right to vote for all eligible people.
Now, Jena is running for Attorney General to continue this fight.
Donald Trump and his allies are determined to roll back voting rights and undermine our democracy. We need a pro-democracy Attorney General who will protect the fundamental right to vote and ensure every citizen can participate in free and fair elections.
Jena has never backed down from defending democracy—and she won’t start now.
Will you chip in today to help elect Jena as Colorado’s next Attorney General? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250806-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: The Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=582%2E181023%2ERmooxF)
Hi there:
60 years ago today, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the _Voting Rights Act_ into law.
The act banned the use of literacy tests, provided federal oversight of voter registration, and authorized the U.S. attorney general to investigate the use of poll taxes in state and local elections. **The act also vastly improved voter turnout.**
For me, this anniversary is both inspiring and deeply personal. I started my career in Montgomery, Alabama, investigating white supremacist and neo-Nazi extremist groups that were committing hate crimes around the country. Being there — spending time in Selma — I was instilled with a deep sense of responsibility to continue the work of those who stood at the foot of the Edmund Pettus Bridge 60 years ago, facing down violence, tear gas, and billy clubs simply because they believed the promise of one person, one vote should be real for everyone.
**They fought for the same reasons we fight: because we know that our best chance for everyone having a fair shot to succeed and thrive begins and ends with equal access to the vote, educational opportunity, and economic prosperity.**
**[In honor of their legacy, and on the anniversary of the passage of the Voting Rights Act, will you add your name alongside mine as a recommitment to the fight for our democracy?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2508-right-to-vote?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=582%2E181023%2ERmooxF)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2508-right-to-vote?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=582%2E181023%2ERmooxF)
---
Today, as Michigan’s Secretary of State and now as a candidate for governor, I work to honor their legacy by ensuring our elections are secure, accessible, and transparent.
We’ve expanded voting access, protected poll workers from harassment, and made it possible for citizens in every corner of Michigan to participate in our democracy — no matter who they are or where they live.
Today, I’m asking you to recognize the power we all have to stand up, right now, and be warriors in defense of the promises of freedom that those who came before us fought to protect.
Do not think for one minute that the chaos and the division and the lies and the hate of the moment have to define who we are. We have the power to define who we are. And we have the power to decide the future of our state and our nation.
**[Will you add your name to support my fight for voting rights and a stronger democracy?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2508-right-to-vote?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=582%2E181023%2ERmooxF)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2508-right-to-vote?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=582%2E181023%2ERmooxF)
---
I’m honored to follow in the footsteps of voting rights heroes who made a difference for our democracy. Thanks for your support.
Let’s go,
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-jbmi/?t=2&akid=582%2E181023%2ERmooxF)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information-jbmi/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=3&akid=582%2E181023%2ERmooxF)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

I started my career in Montgomery, Alabama, investigating white supremacist and neo-Nazi extremist groups that were committing hate crimes around the country. Being there — spending time in Selma — I was instilled with a deep sense of responsibility to continue the work of those who stood at the foot of the Edmund Pettus Bridge 60 years ago, facing down violence, tear gas, and billy clubs simply because they believed the promise of one person, one vote should be real for everyone. Hi there, null, it’s Haley – writing to you from somewhere on I-94 on Day Six of my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I’ve been driving across the state, meeting incredible Michiganders – every one of them has reminded me why I’m in this race: to fight for working people, lower costs, protect Michigan jobs, and stand up to Trump’s chaos agenda.
But here’s the truth: None of that will happen if we don’t all get out and VOTE. That’s why I’m asking: **[Will you take five seconds and pledge to vote in 2026?](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/4387?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=528%2E49239%2E9fWvq7)**
| | [PLEDGE TO VOTE](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/4387?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=528%2E49239%2E9fWvq7)
---
The stakes couldn’t be higher, null. _The Hill_ ranked Michigan’s Senate seat as one of the top five most likely to flip. And a Republican super PAC has already raised $5 million to support my opponent, Trump-endorsed Mike Rogers.
**We can win this race.** Polling shows I’m the best Democrat to beat MAGA Mike Rogers – but we need every grassroots supporter to commit to voting in 2026. And it starts with you, null.
**[We’re aiming for 15,000 responses before midnight tonight – will you add your name now?](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/4387?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=528%2E49239%2E9fWvq7)**

Haley Stevens
|

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4405?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=528%2E49239%2E9fWvq7) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4386?t=9&akid=528%2E49239%2E9fWvq7)

name: Wendy Davis
subject: We need to stand together now to keep people safe.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The average bail for the same level of charges is $36,000. Maria’s was set at $1.4 million. | |
---
Dear Peter, Twelve years ago, I filibustered a sweeping abortion ban in the Texas Senate because I knew the bill would push access to abortion care out of reach for many people in my state. Texas anti-abortion politicians tried everything to end my filibuster, but they did not win that night. **I could not have stood on the floor of the Texas Senate for 13 hours in order to beat the midnight deadline and block that bill without the raised voices of the thousands who gathered in the Senate gallery, up and down the halls of the Capitol complex, and even outside on the Capitol lawn**. Together, we kept each other safe, and we showed the nation what we can accomplish when we stand in unity against oppression. **In the decade since, and after the fall of**** _Roe_****, anti-abortion politicians in Texas have been determined to eliminate access to abortion by every means possible**. They banned abortion from the moment of conception, paved the way for vigilante lawsuits against those helping someone access the care that they need, and made it a felony to provide an abortion, punishable by imprisonment for life. **Ken Paxton has even stretched the bounds of his office and targeted a Houston-area midwife who provided care for immigrant communities because Paxton falsely alleged that she provided abortions, all so he could make an example of her, put her in jail, and strike fear in the hearts of those trying to help women access care elsewhere.** Worse than that, the midwife’s bail was set at an astronomical $1.4 million dollars, even though the average bail for the same level of charges in the same county was $36,000. **If it weren’t for a bail fund paying her bail of $1.4 million dollars, Maria Rojas would still be sitting in jail before she even had the chance to defend herself.** **Just as I stood on the floor with so many Texans alongside me in 2013, we need to stand together now to keep people safe.** We can stop people like Ken Paxton from using bail as a weapon against those trying to help people access the care they need. And we can do it by making sure adequate bail funds exist to free someone who’s been unjustly held. **That’s why it’s so important to step up and contribute to bail funds for others who will most certainly find themselves facing a similar situation.** [**Can you split a donation between the Repro Legal Defense Fund and Community Justice Exchange’s National Bail Fund Network?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtvcaAfRLIqTMQ86QNreCDgN0kuzmvRypAOlYTopRnc82Cn3UYI1IRj5f0Z6GIdcO3vxQOUYUT5pmeNSFDR4bY6gRvmmJlxdmfAk4J1FmkKtk-MG6E7eirxl8SNYWPSPaLUi2htePtgdzFKeeIuyGWKEy8hjfUwYm1fTeYLEihvCuwVz2feFoc5p1HItUZeu1__YPV_aGgRfohagpK4u7_WfJuD2h55P3i3cE7E9W8BlriSBkryHoPFXWulVJ3o1Qo2h5lgV_yXFOECG9o_-efJqyGdHVqwgsyloj4puLnMEN1VHjFL_D8_dwpdz4Thl7QgsJbsnjsw-TkmFNlK4DLx3S_Oe-xZ1-IdEu4i4Uj_A4KmhYUKQTe1VyWqRwreTerbC-WsJCjlGrdeValsMPD2/4it/vsSMTlYVS8C-QHyhryfhzA/h0/h001.i3PN7sF2jwIxTl1XAVeOpQvR5mLSDqjAKiocykPFg4c) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to the Repro Legal Defense Fund and Community Justice Exchange’s National Bail Fund Network_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtvcaAfRLIqTMQ86QNreCDgN0kuzmvRypAOlYTopRnc80bExR3jcZ-XkCvhsRt-qWTRPHKDT4-G8w8l-5we3RVnN-UbiyyjUq99KLGOxa5GoFTbuibWqKn32ltCbQbIMARYALjLvnB43gy0s59XRBymzn2Nn124MvS90mwS81ln5b-EW_pwsSHwwiCrhPhE_H--KZvw3TXgVSdMVKfXZjIn0vJXxZx07bSTeq0kyDGm6ThGURmhCiKZPsD3pclCSLulVszrw4Gn9m2VM9Ht33mhvT-FJG_-cy5cIlreaJ9hVN9Zjmxd1OukhfH9VNdeMNt1lErTG_PujQWbTibICSybYOy7WQYxfY-rDVdjvhHMSTZksfSEeW_P0l0C8-_Ml392eh1XiNKTC_xpzi4qGF6dguLlpxHeK0JxqRD7TIO93WxvYSOGumpZ3Myja3hKT00/4it/vsSMTlYVS8C-QHyhryfhzA/h1/h001.f2i1rAxSx9FaqTiskH45SBDiLIQKTmE4OciWh-J17Iw)

name: Doug Mastriano
subject: We’ve walked through fire together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano**
body:
Now, more than ever Rebbie and I need your help!
| | | | [](https://link.mas.sendnucleus.)
---
| | **Dear Friend,**
We’ve walked through fire together. **Now, more than ever** **Rebbie and I need your help!**
From the chaos of the 2020 election—when we held the _first-ever_ election integrity hearing in Gettysburg—to standing against the illegal lockdowns that tore apart our lives and communities. Together, we fought to reopen our schools and businesses. We stood for our seniors who were left to suffer alone behind closed doors.
When the world seemed to fall silent, _you didn’t_. And neither did we.
Through prayer, perseverance, and your unshakable support, we became the _only_ movement in America to pass a constitutional amendment protecting your freedoms from future lockdowns. We endured political persecution. We beat Nancy Pelosi in court. And we did it all—with integrity and courage.
---
[Support the Movement](https://link.mas.sendnucleus.)
But now, our Commonwealth stands at a turning point.
Will we rise into a new era of faith, liberty, and renewal—or fall back into the same failed policies of the past under Shapiro’s “Wolf 2.0” regime?
**Rebbie and I can’t do this alone.**
This has always been a movement _of the people_. And now, more than ever, we need you with us. Your donation— _any amount_ —isn’t just fuel for a campaign... It’s a signal that you’re still standing with us. That this cause is still alive in your heart.
👉 **Please give today at**[**www.doug4pa.com**](https://link.mas.sendnucleus.)
| | [DONATE HERE ](https://link.mas.sendnucleus.)
---
| | **You can send your check** to:
**Friends of Doug Mastriano**
PO Box 138
Fayetteville, PA 17222
Every dollar goes directly into the battle, and **we will never sell or share your data.** ****
This is not just politics. This is a fight for the soul of Pennsylvania. The time is now. The path is clear. And with your help, we will rise again.
**Fearless and True,**
**Doug Mastriano**

---
| |

---
| **Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano**
---
|

body:
I’m running in a previously Democratic-held district that Republicans won by only one point in 2024. That makes this a Tier 1 district that Democrats need to flip to take back the House. There’s simply no other path to a House majority.

| Super quick, before you log off for the day.

I’m running in a previously Democratic-held district that Republicans won by only one point in 2024. That makes this a Tier 1 district that Democrats need to flip to take back the House. There’s simply no other path to a House majority.

That means the NRCC is going to do everything they can to hold onto this seat. My opponent Ryan Mackenzie is already holding large-dollar fundraisers with Mike Johnson and his special interest backers. We need to build a strong grassroots campaign NOW to fight back.

The road ahead is going to be tough, but I’m ready to take on tough fights with you by my side.

Check out the great sponsors of today's show:
**Masa Chips**
You're probably watching the Sean Spicer Show right now and thinking "hmm, I wish I had something healthy and satisfying to snack on..." Well Masa Chips are exactly what you are looking for. Big corporations use cheap nasty seed oils that can cause inflammation and health issues. Masa cut out all the bad stuff and created a tortilla chip with just 3 ingredients: organic nixtamalized corn, sea salt, and 100 percent grass-fed beef tallow. Snacking on MASA chips feels different--you feel satisfied, light, and energetic, with no crash, bloat, or sluggishness. So head to https://MASAChips.com/SEAN to get 25% off your first order.
**Delta Rescue**
Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/
Special Envoy Steve Witkoff met with President Putin for the fifth time this year to try and broker a ceasefire in the Russia-Ukraine war. Special Envoy to Ukraine, Lieutenant General Keith Kellogg is here with us to discuss this matter. President Trump is seeking a comprehensive ceasefire on air, sea, land and infrastructure with hopes to lead to a long term peace plan. Russia has lost over one million soldiers lives in the war, suffered economically and diplomatically. General Kellogg has been working with the Ukrainians and they are ready to come to the table. With NATO allies investment of U.S. weapons and a sanctions deadline approaching, will we see a ceasefire in the coming days? Attorney General Pam Bondi has opened up a grand jury investigation into the Russia hoax. Over the last few weeks Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has presented damning evidence of Obama and key players in his administration. The grand conspiracy could potentially tie 2016 all the way to the Mar-a-Lago raid of 2022. Sean Davis, the Founder and CEO of The Federalist is here to explain all the players and what outcomes we might see from the biggest political scandal of our time.

**Lieutenant General Keith Kellogg**

GOP Rep. Lisa McClain **[shut down Wolf Blitzer's complaining](https://substack.com/redirect/8550353f-ae4e-4c82-8734-05bc24388f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about Republican "gerrymandering," confronting him withn the fact that Democrats hav been guilty of doing so for years, and now Republicans are finally fighting back.
"We didn't make the rules of the game,... We are now playing the game!" McClain told Blitzer.
**[Watch the live clash here:](https://substack.com/redirect/8550353f-ae4e-4c82-8734-05bc24388f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8550353f-ae4e-4c82-8734-05bc24388f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8550353f-ae4e-4c82-8734-05bc24388f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# _Developing:_ 5 soldier injured in Georgia Fort Stewart shooting
A U.S. Army sergeant opened fire at Fort Stewart, Georgia on Wednesday, **[injuring at least five soldiers](https://substack.com/redirect/ecd9d549-6455-4e43-b1a6-beb9601db53e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the 2nd Armored Brigade Combat Team area before being apprehended.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ab111c3-59f7-41dc-beb9-044369710bdc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The incident occurred quickly with rapid response** \- law enforcement was dispatched at 10:56 a.m., the suspect was captured at 11:35 a.m., and the base lockdown was lifted by 12:10 p.m.
* **All injured soldiers were treated on-site and transported to Winn Army Community Hospital** , though their current conditions remain unknown.
* **President Trump, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, and Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem were all briefed** on the incident, with the FBI coordinating the investigation alongside Army Criminal Investigation Division.
* **Fort Stewart serves approximately 15,000 active-duty soldiers and 16,000 family members** , with Georgia officials including Governor Brian Kemp and Senator Raphael Warnock expressing prayers and support for the victims and their families.

* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/886b535c-300b-49cd-a001-47bf636e7d98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Is Big Tech colluding with the media to censor RFK Jr?
That's the claim behind a massive lawsuit that involves everyone from Google to Facebook and the Washington Post...
But what exactly are these Big Tech conglomerates trying to hide?
We believe it's a **[giant secret](https://substack.com/redirect/886b535c-300b-49cd-a001-47bf636e7d98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that could cost them hundreds of billions if exposed. But big tech will stop at nothing to keep him quiet about **[this](https://substack.com/redirect/886b535c-300b-49cd-a001-47bf636e7d98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
And they may just succeed...
Which is why we're not waiting around.
We're revealing everything TODAY in the first 5 minutes of **[this uncensored video](https://substack.com/redirect/886b535c-300b-49cd-a001-47bf636e7d98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

name: Naomi at Grijalva HQ
subject: All are welcome to join this movement!🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
We have less than 50 days left until our Election in September! Join us!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/82164ca8c9ea/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308784?e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=2e883b0ea3&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | | | |
# JOIN US THIS WEEKEND!
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| Hi Peter,
Join us as we hit the doors for Adelita Grijalva—because this movement only works with _**you**_ in it.
Bring your friends, family, neighbors—everyone’s welcome, and every conversation counts. 📚✊ We’ve already made huge strides, and now, with just **7 weekends left** until the General Election, it’s time to go all in.
Thanks to your hard work, we’ve made it to the **Special General Election on September 23rd** —and we’re on the path to electing **Adelita Grijalva as Arizona’s first Latina in Congress**! 🌵✨
Let’s get out there, talk to voters, and keep the momentum growing. Victory is within reach—let’s make history together!
---
| **Here’s what’s happening this week:****Canvassing Door to Door!** Help us go door-to-door and connect with voters face-to-face. We have canvases this week in **Tucson and Nogales!**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=5e663b7cfb&e=f7c3700ccb)
| **Saturday Canvass in Tucson** Saturday, August 9th @ 8:30 AM2720 E Broadway Blvd. Tucson, AZ
---
| [RSVP to Tucson Canvasses!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=8b88685feb&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=f6733e6325&e=f7c3700ccb)
| **CARPOOL CANVASS IN NOGALES****JOIN US** Sunday, August 10th @ 3:00PM
---
| [RSVP to Nogales Canvass!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=529e3b2335&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| For a smoother experience, please**download MiniVAN ahead of your canvass**. [Here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=f1e359eeb9&e=f7c3700ccb) is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. **Download links** : MiniVAN for [iPhone](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=dc2e982919&e=f7c3700ccb) and [Android](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=2762b2d216&e=f7c3700ccb).
---
| **Thinking about joining us to canvass this weekend? 😊****If you have any questions, please reach out to us, at** : **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
**Con Mucho Cariño,****Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**
---
| [Donate](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=00d105db1d&e=f7c3700ccb)
