name: James Carville
subject: America is in deep trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112866717/561876178/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk1ZmFkNS0xMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1ONeY0y8T5qE-HtwfQ_zMoxkGncvnQ9B1yx3EEuMtQ=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112866718/561876179/-788614911?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk1ZmFkNS0xMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1ONeY0y8T5qE-HtwfQ_zMoxkGncvnQ9B1yx3EEuMtQ=) Team, I’ll cut to the chase: America is in **deep, deep trouble.** In just the first six months of Trump’s second term, here’s what we’ve seen:
* Massive tax cuts for billionaires while kicking millions of Americans off of their health insurance.
* Federal officers fired for being “disloyal.”
* Civil servants purged.
* Critics arrested.
* Trump’s DOJ used to retaliate against political enemies.
* The economy tanked with reckless tariffs and chaos.
* **And worst of all: no one’s stopping him.**

The Supreme Court ruled he has absolute immunity. The Republican Congress cheers him on. And Democrats in the Senate? Despite fighting like hell, we’re outnumbered, losing vote after vote while Trump rewrites laws by executive order. Social Security? On the chopping block. The Department of Education? Dismantled. Women’s rights, gun safety, and climate progress? **All at risk.** This isn’t politics as usual. This is authoritarianism. And pretending democracy will fix itself? That’s a fantasy. Here’s the truth: **Flipping the Senate in 2026 is our last, best shot.** **That’s why Flip the Senate exists. ** They’re not the DNC. They’re an independent organization focused solely on this: **Taking back the Senate majority. ** We’ve got less than 16 months to do it — or lose our democracy for good. **[Will you chip in to help stop Trump’s MAGA movement before it’s too late?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112866719/561876180/-746039140?amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk1ZmFkNS0xMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1ONeY0y8T5qE-HtwfQ_zMoxkGncvnQ9B1yx3EEuMtQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112866720/561876181/-788614911?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk1ZmFkNS0xMzczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m1ONeY0y8T5qE-HtwfQ_zMoxkGncvnQ9B1yx3EEuMtQ=)

clean_body: | = = Team, I’ll cut to the chase: America is in deep, deep trouble. In just the first six months of Trump’s second term, here’s what we’ve seen: Massive tax cuts for billionaires while kicking millions of Americans off of their health insurance. Federal officers fired for being “disloyal.” Civil servants purged. Critics arrested. Trump’s DOJ used to retaliate against political enemies. The economy tanked with reckless tariffs and chaos. And worst of all: no one’s stopping him. The Supreme Court ruled he has absolute immunity. The Republican Congress cheers him on. And Democrats in the Senate? Despite fighting like hell, we’re outnumbered, losing vote after vote while Trump rewrites laws by executive order. Social Security? On the chopping block. The Department of Education? Dismantled. Women’s rights, gun safety, and climate progress? All at risk. This isn’t politics as usual. This is authoritarianism. And pretending democracy will fix itself? That’s a fantasy. Here’s the truth: Flipping the Senate in 2026 is our last, best shot. That’s why Flip the Senate exists. They’re not the DNC. They’re an independent organization focused solely on this: Taking back the Senate majority. We’ve got less than 16 months to do it — or lose our democracy for good. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = — James Carville = Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Wes Moore
subject: A message for Peter
body:

Hey, Peter! I want
to start off by thanking you.

It’s because of supporters like you that I was first elected to office.
Seriously. My campaign was polling at 1% when I first got into the race.

I would be nowhere without your support. It’s how we continue to make good
on the promise we made on day one: To leave no one behind.

I have to level with you: We are witnessing the federal government’s
attempt to roll back the progress we’ve made. And it’s happening quicker
than we think.

It’s critical that we show up at times like these, and that we are
fighting back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250806-1?refcode=em-20250806-1&refcode2=423_1086043_V0GPom&akid=423%2E1086043%2EV0GPom ]So, will you rush a donation of any amount today?

Peter, I have to
level with you: We are witnessing the federal government’s attempt to roll
back the progress we’ve made.

Together, we’ve pushed forward:

🏫 Record funding for public schools,

🤝🏽 Support for federal workers,

🦺 Bipartisan public safety reforms,

👏🏽 And more.

All of the progress we’ve made for
Marylanders is on the
line.

When you invest in this campaign, you are investing in the promise we’ve
made since day one. To leave no one behind.

Thank you for all that you do.

Elevate,

Wes

subject: Follow the money: it’s not coming from Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:

---
| Dear Friend, Brad’s Democrat opponent just announced a huge **$260,000 fundraising haul** — and it’s not from who you would expect. Money is pouring in from the _liberal coasts_ — Hollywood elites, San Francisco progressives, and New York special interests who would love nothing more than to flip this seat blue and send another rubber stamp for the liberal agenda to Congress. Why are they so interested in this race? Because Brad Finstad is standing in their way. Brad is a proud conservative who defends our values and always puts Minnesota families first. That’s why the liberal machine is coming after him with everything they’ve got. We can’t let them buy this seat.
---

Thank you for standing with Brad, — Team Finstad

subject: Vindictive Vile Villain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
You don’t have to give anything, but if you believe America is still worth defending, I hope you’ll enlist with me today. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9562ea0e577d48d2aadff6165b2831ee&_e=H1VnuHMUF0cDrIbo8jgm0i0KlFmdCVeCe_BQasfbkCMJLx3353odH4b_7PIc4d-dwsU2it5sl_hXkeWvU_tLFXxdBbZVdDJsdDwpwJPBh51mcQJbH4GZb0GUW-pXZwkYdsdz0eTIpOus7NvMBNwax6n9oaAgFETIEvb-TrDD8W4z7a4UHeg-syM4DZ8JvilmeNwH1CaCRcaBK5iEM1tH023g133d_gLq0g7X9dOGvwamk_SACaSc3h9vLCZeuXrqLCzlpfVqUe8ZBylo2CzFaUha1RmnNlw120FjDfp1uxsDEgW37tr1fBSF5CXQHoGgCEKxa2Q02NoqmjMqkotDNhhMf1cUiBIx_X8MbLnvwlkONMEXBfMpjBuJ3FvYviH4FZl3YbdelDnmtwGQ9ojmB2hLofpZ-wo_mOVmMYeeD_xrZg5PPLUDTDQKGdnz5HW4O4yeiJ5PHc_tN4H8xPXQgDU-iyhcaWVZofhEqxNejTCy-RBTbvY3J6yN-jTVBrJXZ604Hgh8AF21YbqDvmgqdaSWvmLF8fpogJCKhQAu1pyvVxN1f3kYwuDADqPAfSPa_reSlwkiOOPGT_zHYn2O9eeR0HPVOFt_DLBd09bg5oBC1mViBpfa5MagOBUVH7lP3qK7YBD5_72nGDXZOpedECIiyIRJ0dwotb5LxV-kI4PgfzX7vUbH7KkzyW0dtUGc39EXMCqc3-zWZqelzF43DldXL9ZTi3_WbEw7wZevZQEZ3ow1_kry0IwtfajJnZVPMtlQLuLE-DNu23ZkWcMphw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

_[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9562ea0e577d48d2aadff6165b2831ee&_e=H1VnuHMUF0cDrIbo8jgm0i0KlFmdCVeCe_BQasfbkCMJLx3353odH4b_7PIc4d-dwsU2it5sl_hXkeWvU_tLFXxdBbZVdDJsdDwpwJPBh51mcQJbH4GZb0GUW-pXZwkYdsdz0eTIpOus7NvMBNwax6n9oaAgFETIEvb-TrDD8W4z7a4UHeg-syM4DZ8JvilmeNwH1CaCRcaBK5iEM1tH023g133d_gLq0g7X9dOGvwamk_SACaSc3h9vLCZeuXrqLCzlpfVqUe8ZBylo2CzFaT3Tmq-e5DgAk9IyQzGevW-ZjeCVvY6OtYE2jCyQYSrlnlCsEjSBW6yLLwQwdcQhwCyQVjmYOWD5xH5xlJFdGKU-_pp26yrNQwZQGYDeIg_MmTf4EI_YC4JaxOG-k4CGZyRFlEQmcupxjAlIDcmxX7cv6yprrBSUuwjxgMezxNXiLo-HCmnPa8iiwpxcbFJt4GMYvycBM4rAtxiPfclYQecphZvuIO6f1FjQD6Wug7xaM1fIz5_qOChza37dSm0lnBYOYHQhbYa1-1wINYcV-fLBzjNYvlbtOaiMCQpsfuQTDeJBq3QiKRXoQx0LLRpSW-IVu_XARU7ktoTBpptPcfPYQPLdA_d8YFA-8WfzguudVklJ8TunQ1rhgEpYvjYncOoPJM9jjxG3EbkeDBae4Hy0IKWN-7UPMpeoKxlShnedzelSKAnEwRHl7LQHXpHSSNPK5hStdlT1TjOAn1blHSzUpn8YTVGYoqponYQi2BWAb7UokQt-rZv-tBvlsMCS8g%3D%3D)_
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

**[Will you chip in $1, $5, or even $50 to help me win this battle?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9562ea0e577d48d2aadff6165b2831ee&_e=H1VnuHMUF0cDrIbo8jgm0i0KlFmdCVeCe_BQasfbkCMJLx3353odH4b_7PIc4d-dwsU2it5sl_hXkeWvU_tLFXxdBbZVdDJsdDwpwJPBh51mcQJbH4GZb0GUW-pXZwkYdsdz0eTIpOus7NvMBNwax6n9oaAgFETIEvb-TrDD8W4z7a4UHeg-syM4DZ8JvilmeNwH1CaCRcaBK5iEM1tH023g133d_gLq0g7X9dOGvwamk_SACaSc3h9vLCZeuXrqLCzlpfVqUe8ZBylo2CzFaW2iGjF0RtIEGCvKZJYOGU6MgXZ66C6Ke6KrI3raErzHQueln2AyYXM6kQvzdvxIVKz5Xg7fVS9LnNwb7QU5kYFkJh5zpZH7_fO9x9iT8_ahb_RHiZn6akUyeOW77hlHt67ynnGltFKgIhI4lUgKTqFf-CDiT4tbF7LkMQTGrKy1bqRcAm90in7hDf1uKJ2VJ6D00QEwOdJ3gh8VWc0rYLIjgn9tX_KRTzlvaXGqqVEZbKgbW2_SPrwLh_e3fVv2-2ttrvQViyqZrgTK3AMxvzfEtAe3Aiisl5NsZuxxtiD1_Qy1moUUFcGzC2PaEzHgolFX1iLsAZXc5I-mTWPzC46pow_83uqoRJRFsgnlH59gTs-S8Gs6JeBP7XQ3rvv3AhOtdaLWmyFR9RlLvJn1V7JPdQ-6FF8hTy5Fwjr0vJs9bwXiv2BNDk8g6wOh42vqqR8I1lW7Do8DcsTXd9AvQWOXWJ5I7ZWsJ2sYfrGlcds__cufNcrquTPUksH9GeVOyw%3D%3D)**

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9562ea0e577d48d2aadff6165b2831ee&_e=H1VnuHMUF0cDrIbo8jgm0i0KlFmdCVeCe_BQasfbkCMJLx3353odH4b_7PIc4d-dwsU2it5sl_hXkeWvU_tLFXxdBbZVdDJsdDwpwJPBh51mcQJbH4GZb0GUW-pXZwkYdsdz0eTIpOus7NvMBNwax6n9oaAgFETIEvb-TrDD8W4z7a4UHeg-syM4DZ8JvilmeNwH1CaCRcaBK5iEM1tH023g133d_gLq0g7X9dOGvwamk_SACaSc3h9vLCZeuXrqLCzlpfVqUe8ZBylo2CzFafDE91MjS0e0xv7kd69ygjG3SoYx75WEGID1lLKKKL5k0vme52CzpG-SA9MLeCYZT5FbGmIcppKUPuN6YlFJdV8uJKWYSKfeFU1ct-YqhAFb7SRtgSprKUK4sSrr0k_y0a5LHdadg5cZHf-xZ6qOsugIau7ZebHU4DslvnejymdtHP-CfZT-ig-iC2eEUQHDwLmvqDpliCSgp-mDfoKIN8W_srQIyhQ2OGBkP7-oas-zAOc74xhH5PoVSiSWdgeiiiUN2QB8k2TRXB3rQqA7-vgXMc9U_2SQXEDTUydRXByLy8WoJ1V9mT9_RqilOK1TWAdEazyda609LA3CBYOGsfDB5HY0K-RZ-p8HGgB8WlqFPPdQAyzoWVTfdRAveyz2DH0rUDtU7zdXzj0KblPPzg9pXCP-uZQRlqXQXvBTbywahkKmw_Qz1_W-eNAjanJCsW0kBgultqic2tQfKigcrsU5G_vu7GUuQ-p9_oIZBdTL12fGyXp1E2Yddc0ez2E24A%3D%3D)

I grew up playing hockey. **I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after 9/11.** I served because I love this country, wanted to make my mom proud, and knew I had something to give. Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield.

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice.

__ I’ve earned advanced degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins. I’ve trained in nuclear deterrence. I’ve worked across cultures, built teams under pressure, and led calmly when it mattered most. But none of that compares to the challenge ahead of me now — earning your trust and building a movement powerful enough to flip this seat.

clean_body: You don’t have to give anything, but if you believe America is still worth defending, I hope you’ll enlist with me today. | Peter, “Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.” Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values. They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it. As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions. And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but tofight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose. I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society. While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating. You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. I grew up playing hockey. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after 9/11. I served because I love this country, wanted to make my mom proud, and knew I had something to give. Twenty-four years later, I still feel that calling. It’s just a different kind of battlefield. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential election since 1976. And I know I’m the underdog — just a regular guy from Minnesota who’s been asked to do extraordinary things one more time. With your help, I know we can flip this Senate seat for the Republican Party - but that will require you getting involved TODAY. And you have a choice. I’ve earned advanced degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins. I’ve trained in nuclear deterrence. I’ve worked across cultures, built teams under pressure, and led calmly when it mattered most. But none of that compares to the challenge ahead of me now — earning your trust and building a movement powerful enough to flip this seat. I’m not asking for a blank check. I’m asking for a chance. Because we still live in a country worth defending. Respect and results still matter. And I believe people like you are ready to fight — not with insults, but with action. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Texas and the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
60 years ago today, after years of struggle and sacrifice, the Voting Rights Act of 1965 became the law of the land. That law was meant to protect the right to vote of people in every state—and in particular, in states like Texas, which has a long and shameful history of discrimination when it comes to voting.
It was a great Texan, President Lyndon B. Johnson, who signed the bill into law. And Texas Democrats are carrying on that work today to ensure that all Texans and all Americans have not only the right to vote but the ability to exercise that right freely and without interference.
Make no mistake: the right to vote is under attack, in Texas and across the country. From restrictive voting laws, to terrible court decisions, to the current effort to redraw congressional maps to maximize Republican seats by diluting the voices of minority communities.
Today, we are reminded of the power and possibility of what we can achieve when we work together for progress. We are also reminded of the importance of protecting the progress we have made.
As the late civil rights and voting rights hero Congressman John Lewis wrote in his final message to the nation he loved:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250807vra-anniversary?refcode=lpfe250807vra-anniversary [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250807vra-anniversary?refcode=lpfe250807vra-anniversary]
All of us can do something to protect our progress and our fundamental rights. Let’s keep fighting—and getting in good trouble—for fair maps, for full participation in our democracy, and for a future we believe in.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

Government analysts at the CIA concluded that COVID likely came from a lab in China. Instead of reporting the facts, their superiors overruled them because the findings aligned with Trump’s position that the pandemic resulted from a lab leak. According to the CIA’s own inspector general, anything that was even “too pro-Trump” was silenced. They wanted to avoid anything that could support the president’s message, so they buried the facts. Let that sink in: Our own intelligence agencies suppressed the truth, and prioritized politics over the American people’s right to know how the pandemic began. This is beyond unacceptable. name: Governor Kathy Hochul via DOTL
subject: Defend democracy — stand with Texas legislators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
|

Peter — This is Governor Kathy Hochul.

Right now, Texas Republicans are rewriting the rules to give themselves an advantage.

But I have a news flash for Republicans in Texas: _**This is no longer the Wild West.**_ We're not going to tolerate our democracy being stolen by a bunch of self-serving politicians.

**Americans don't want a system that's stacked against them. They believe in fairness — it's fundamental.**

That is why I welcomed the courageous Democratic Texas legislators to the New York State Capitol. These leaders have taken a bold stand against extreme Republican efforts to gerrymander their state to silence the voices of millions, especially Black and Latino communities in Texas.

**[Join me and Democracy on the Line in fighting back against Republicans’ attempts to silence our voices and erode our democracy. Split a donation today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112867515/561879062/-1752107157?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20250806_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlY2ZkMjY3LTE4NzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xD1bJqHHTWduIh201xEeoD_OpejadipUiT9CVTAL21w=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | ****[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112867516/561879064/-1752107157?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=DOTL_20250806_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlY2ZkMjY3LTE4NzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xD1bJqHHTWduIh201xEeoD_OpejadipUiT9CVTAL21w=)****

Peter, history will judge us and how we respond to this moment.

Republicans are willing to rewrite these rules to give themselves an advantage.

**The gloves are off, and I say, bring it on.**

Across the country, our democracy is under attack by Republicans who want to make it harder for people to be heard. **But we won’t go down without a fight.**

**[Please chip in to Democracy on the Line and my work to fight back against these anti-democratic schemes. Peter, the more of us who join this movement, the harder it is for anyone to silence our voices.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112867522/561879071/-1752107157?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20250806_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlY2ZkMjY3LTE4NzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xD1bJqHHTWduIh201xEeoD_OpejadipUiT9CVTAL21w=)**
Democracy is not a spectator sport — it’s up to all of us to protect it. I won’t back down, and neither should you.

Thank you for standing with me and with those fighting on the frontlines in Texas.

Ever Upward,

Governor Kathy Hochul

clean_body: | Peter — This is Governor Kathy Hochul. Right now, Texas Republicans are rewriting the rules to give themselves an advantage. But I have a news flash for Republicans in Texas: This is no longer the Wild West. We're not going to tolerate our democracy being stolen by a bunch of self-serving politicians. Americans don't want a system that's stacked against them. They believe in fairness — it's fundamental. That is why I welcomed the courageous Democratic Texas legislators to the New York State Capitol. These leaders have taken a bold stand against extreme Republican efforts to gerrymander their state to silence the voices of millions, especially Black and Latino communities in Texas. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: | **= = = = Peter, history will judge us and how we respond to this moment. name: STOP CHEATING
subject: This is how they erase voters
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/Engageyalltransparentlogo.png]
Friend, it's the Engage Y'all team.
Trump said it out loud:
“We are entitled to five more seats.”
Not earned.
Not voted for.
Entitled.
This is what he meant in 2024 when he said we’d never have to “worry about voting again.” Now his cronies — including Jimmy Patronis right here in Florida — are parroting the same corrupt plan.
Let’s be clear: This isn’t about representation. This is about rigging maps to silence voters — especially Black, Brown, and poor voters. Blatant racism. Minority rule.
If Texas succeeds, Florida is next. Our democracy is on the line.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Congress isn’t a clubhouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Congress can’t quit on working families.
#
My constituents elected me to do one job: improve the lives of our neighbors up and down the state.
That means fighting for paid family and medical leave. Lowering grocery prices. Defending unions. Delivering results.
**And I intend to do my job.**
But now Republicans in Congress are calling it quits. Speaker Mike Johnson and his allies are hanging a “closed for business” sign on the Capitol and starting the August recess early — not for any legitimate legislative reason, but because they’d rather protect Donald Trump than serve the American people and release the Epstein files.
Republicans should understand that Congress isn’t a clubhouse. It’s a co-equal branch of government. And Americans can’t afford a vacation from democracy.
While the Speaker plays political games, families are facing real struggles. The cost of living keeps rising. Health care remains unaffordable for too many. Working parents are stretched thin without child care or paid leave.
We still have work to do — and I’m not going anywhere.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me in sending a clear message to Speaker Johnson:
[**Sign the petition to demand Congress get back to work.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-congress-get-back-to-work/?source=em20250806-2248&akid=2248%2E21716%2EDQSH5k)
**[Add your name now »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-congress-get-back-to-work/?source=em20250806-2248&akid=2248%2E21716%2EDQSH5k)**
**This isn’t about politics. It’s about basic governance, transparency, and standing up for our neighbors — not covering up for the powerful.**
With gratitude,
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250806-1&t=1&refcode2=2248_21716_DQSH5k&akid=2248%2E21716%2EDQSH5k)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2248%2E21716%2EDQSH5k)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2248%2E21716%2EDQSH5k)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2248%2E21716%2EDQSH5k)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Josh Harder
subject: This headline hit me hard
body:
Like a punch to the gut. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112867565/561879232/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNkM2Q2YTgtMTg3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mSBd-4DBRFiy2Lk1rYNcd55yKANSWIPATn3q_9U1N5s=) | Peter, I’ll be honest — this headline hit me like a punch to the gut: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112867566/561879234/-548925425?&refcode=E14512-20250806-LatinoHeadline-Image-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGNkM2Q2YTgtMTg3My1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mSBd-4DBRFiy2Lk1rYNcd55yKANSWIPATn3q_9U1N5s=) It doesn’t feel good to read that. But more than anything, it’s a painful reminder of how high the stakes are in 2026 and how much ground we have to make up. [_**I need your help to invest early in our Latino organizing program and reach the voters who will decide this election. name: Forward Blue
subject: Condemn Trump’s attack on truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Blue, ForwardBlue
body:
Last week, the federal government released jobs numbers showing that Trump’s economy is in serious trouble.
# [ ](https://action.forwardblue.net/go/5877?t=1&akid=1282%2E1041858%2EOFeZFC)
Last week, the federal government released jobs numbers showing that Trump’s economy is in serious trouble — the worst since the pandemic. Within hours, Trump lashed out and fired the official responsible for reporting the data.
Why? Because he didn’t like what the numbers said.
[**_Sign the petition now to condemn Trump’s attack on truth and demand accountability._**](https://action.forwardblue.net/signup/202508-trump-lies-email/?amount=5&source=em20250806-1282&akid=1282%2E1041858%2EOFeZFC)
[Add your name ›››](https://action.forwardblue.net/signup/202508-trump-lies-email/?source=em20250806-1282&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=1282%2E1041858%2EOFeZFC)
---
This is a blatant attempt to rig economic data and lie to the American people.
Trump is once again trying to rewrite reality to hide the consequences of his own actions:
❌ His reckless tariffs are tanking global markets.
❌ His economic policies are driving up prices and sowing chaos.
❌ And now he’s silencing experts who dare to tell the truth about his failing economy.
We’ve seen this before — Trump tried to bury the real COVID numbers. Now he’s doing the same with the economy.
And if we don’t call it out, it will get worse.
[**_Stand up to Trump’s lies. Sign the petition now._**](https://action.forwardblue.net/signup/202508-trump-lies-email/?amount=5&source=em20250806-1282&akid=1282%2E1041858%2EOFeZFC)

---
– Forward Blue

body:
#
[https://secure.winred.com/ron-johnson/conspiracy-theorist-v2-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250806_conspiracy-theorist-v2__amc&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active] Fellow
patriot,

They call me a conspiracy theorist.

When I demand answers on the origins of COVID, Big Pharma’s
cover-ups, Biden’s mental decline, or how federal bureaucrats
weaponized the government against President Trump—they don’t
debate.

_Instead, they call me names._

But let me be clear: I don’t care what they call me. I care about
the truth.

And as Chairman of the Senate Permanent Subcommittee on
Investigations, I finally have the power to uncover it—and expose it
to the American people.
[https://secure.winred.com/ron-johnson/conspiracy-theorist-v2-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250806_conspiracy-theorist-v2__amc&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

But I can’t do it alone. I need grassroots conservatives like you
standing behind me. If you believe in what I’m doing, I’m asking
you to chip in ANY AMOUNT right now. Every single dollar helps fuel
this fight.
[https://secure.winred.com/ron-johnson/conspiracy-theorist-v2-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250806_conspiracy-theorist-v2__amc&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

PITCH IN NOW
[https://secure.winred.com/ron-johnson/conspiracy-theorist-v2-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250806_conspiracy-theorist-v2__amc&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]
They’ve tried everything to stop us—media smears, Big Tech
censorship, even the full weight of the federal government. But TRUTH
DOESN’T FEAR INVESTIGATION, and I won’t stop asking the tough
questions just because it makes them squirm.

WHETHER IT’S:
✅ Big Pharma’s lies and COVID corruption
✅ What they hid about Biden’s cognitive decline
✅ Or how the DOJ and intel agencies were weaponized
to destroy Trump

I’M DIGGING, I’M INVESTIGATING, AND I’M PUTTING THE FACTS IN
FRONT OF THE AMERICAN PEOPLE.
[https://secure.winred.com/ron-johnson/conspiracy-theorist-v2-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250806_conspiracy-theorist-v2__amc&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

The establishment HATES that. And that’s exactly why we need to keep
going.

So if you’ve had enough of the lies, the cover-ups, and the
gaslighting—CHIP IN $5 TODAY AND HELP ME AND MY ALLIES IN THE SENATE
HOLD THEM ACCOUNTABLE.
[https://secure.winred.com/ron-johnson/conspiracy-theorist-v2-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250806_conspiracy-theorist-v2__amc&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=5]

DONATE $5
[https://secure.winred.com/ron-johnson/conspiracy-theorist-v2-amc/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_amc&utm_campaign=20250806_conspiracy-theorist-v2__amc&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=5]
This fight isn’t about politics. It’s about the future of our
country. And the louder they scream, the harder I’ll push.

Thank you for being in this with me.

Senator Ron Johnson
Chairman, Senate Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations

subject: 60 years ago today

body:
What the Voting Rights Act of 1965 means today.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=TPCdjh6EMljQel1VBo1eRxFdZ1u3l5l2wkRu3EwK5UeyV6NclIDSMoCMeEJ%2FwkwTiEJjv4vimV%2F8n1UWH4Uap5T7CQNAsjmsyXhpKO9LNG3sX7QkN0imr3KfOY%2FqnbuUzgsvw80wVi7wiiiD36wHWMmCt0kDqXqsOXGPZG%2FQePBhrrB2YX4B%2Bh15UU5o%2BtrPAtWGiWnFg7vdDK7k24YvmC2ATnKJi%2B5Yfsit7yNFvXI7WGnA88GTscPKrfC4NGTnsmcCVetYrk7OLNjz215CjXgtrTLi9I%2FhkjzW1pCHvlXZ9kUYTn2hP3MSG%2FgNbuAt8e1bJUJW9lYQfOLhKsl%2BwjXCmH6zPKY6Dt1MoQCGDNoH9%2FIWI75KJQ0ZR3SoQBCQE%2FUq5MVC7Jy0ufWT4pfteaOqYjj8khKOxIVs%2BEIj0RE%3D)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112868596/561882666/-1546188038?source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_080625_VotingRights_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmNjMmM4YS0xYTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YyATSRN0qo6mGA72JKpt1gQs1C80kwJu19ztZjQ5bW0=)
---
Hi Peter, Today marks 60 years since the landmark Voting Rights Act was signed, giving long-overdue voter protections to Black Americans.

The 1960s may be bygone, but the Jim Crow-era voting bans aimed to disenfranchise communities of color remain prevalent in our nation, albeit under a different guise. From manipulating our voting maps to dilute the voting power of communities of color, rolling back mail-in and early voting options often utilized by many voters of color, and weaponizing incarceration status to permanently deny voting rights based on criminal convictions — **Americans are still facing unethical voter suppression tactics that aim to silence voices at the ballot box and beyond.** I’ve said it once, and I’ll continue to say it again and again: **Voting is a fundamental right of citizenship, and every American should have an equal voice in our democracy. ** I’m in Congress fighting for a country where democracy can flourish and where the fundamental right to vote is protected for all Americans — but the VRA is facing new attacks under the Trump administration. **[Peter, democracy is nothing without teamwork. Can I count on you to pitch in $10 or anything you can today to defend my seat and keep progress at the forefront in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112868597/561882667/1675519574?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_080625_VotingRights_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmNjMmM4YS0xYTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YyATSRN0qo6mGA72JKpt1gQs1C80kwJu19ztZjQ5bW0=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

---
I’ve witnessed North Carolina evolve from a segregated state to a state embracing its diverse communities. **But, I know progress takes time — and I am committing all of mine to ensure everyone has a seat,_and a say_ , at the table.**
On this anniversary of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, we must remember that our elections should reflect the will of the people, not the will of politicians. **The stakes have never been higher, Peter.**
In solidarity,

clean_body: What the Voting Rights Act of 1965 means today. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, Today marks 60 years since the landmark Voting Rights Act was signed, giving long-overdue voter protections to Black Americans. The 1960s may be bygone, but the Jim Crow-era voting bans aimed to disenfranchise communities of color remain prevalent in our nation, albeit under a different guise. From manipulating our voting maps to dilute the voting power of communities of color, rolling back mail-in and early voting options often utilized by many voters of color, and weaponizing incarceration status to permanently deny voting rights based on criminal convictions — Americans are still facing unethical voter suppression tactics that aim to silence voices at the ballot box and beyond. I’ve said it once, and I’ll continue to say it again and again: Voting is a fundamental right of citizenship, and every American should have an equal voice in our democracy. I’m in Congress fighting for a country where democracy can flourish and where the fundamental right to vote is protected for all Americans — but the VRA is facing new attacks under the Trump administration. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’ve witnessed North Carolina evolve from a segregated state to a state embracing its diverse communities. But, I know progress takes time — and I am committing all of mine to ensure everyone has a seat,and a say , at the table. On this anniversary of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, we must remember that our elections should reflect the will of the people, not the will of politicians. The stakes have never been higher, Peter. In solidarity, Valerie * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: A longer email on the anniversary of the Voting Rights Act. I hope you’ll give it a few minutes of your time.

body:
This is the promise of our democracy. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112868634/561882791/823540626?refcode=ea.eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjYyNDNmOS0xYTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HbltsxrvdA957XmB8ouG3C690d71PUayxRfuepmWTNo=&emci=ea6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)
**Sixty years ago today, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law.** It was a step forward in meeting America’s promise of democratic governance and liberty for all — and for nearly fifty years, it helped secure voting rights for all Americans. But in the years since the Supreme Court **struck down a key Voting Rights Act provision,** we’ve seen just how far some politicians will go to undermine democracy and deny voting rights or access for their own gain. **[With the Voting Rights Act, we came so close to achieving the founding promise of American democracy. Now, that promise is being broken over and over across our country. We have to fight back — and I’m asking you to stand with me now. Sign on to say you support voting rights protections for all Americans >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112868635/561882792/-94943042?refcode=ea.eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjYyNDNmOS0xYTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HbltsxrvdA957XmB8ouG3C690d71PUayxRfuepmWTNo=&emci=ea6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)** _Consider what happened in North Carolina:_ Republicans used their control over the state legislature to draw blatantly partisan legislative maps and give their party an unfair advantage in future elections, and even tried to throw out tens of thousands of legal votes in an election they lost. Americans in many states are facing restrictive voting laws and gerrymandered maps designed to make it harder for some of us to cast a ballot and to ensure that some of our ballots count less than others. **These are precisely the kinds of abuses of political power that the Voting Rights Act had helped prevent.** The GOP has made it clear that their loyalty is to their power and their party, not our people. **Peter, as the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina, I will fight to restore the full promise of the Voting Rights Act and defend every American’s right to have an equal voice in our democracy. It is a foundational promise that America must uphold.** **[If you are with me, I’m asking you to sign on and say you support protecting voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112868636/561882793/-94943042?refcode=ea.eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjYyNDNmOS0xYTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HbltsxrvdA957XmB8ouG3C690d71PUayxRfuepmWTNo=&emci=ea6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)** Thank you, Roy Cooper [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112868637/561882794/-94943042?refcode=ea.eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjYyNDNmOS0xYTczLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HbltsxrvdA957XmB8ouG3C690d71PUayxRfuepmWTNo=&emci=ea6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=eb6243f9-1a73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)

clean_body: This is the promise of our democracy. | Sixty years ago today, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law. It was a step forward in meeting America’s promise of democratic governance and liberty for all — and for nearly fifty years, it helped secure voting rights for all Americans. But in the years since the Supreme Court struck down a key Voting Rights Act provision, we’ve seen just how far some politicians will go to undermine democracy and deny voting rights or access for their own gain. Consider what happened in North Carolina: Republicans used their control over the state legislature to draw blatantly partisan legislative maps and give their party an unfair advantage in future elections, and even tried to throw out tens of thousands of legal votes in an election they lost. Americans in many states are facing restrictive voting laws and gerrymandered maps designed to make it harder for some of us to cast a ballot and to ensure that some of our ballots count less than others. These are precisely the kinds of abuses of political power that the Voting Rights Act had helped prevent. The GOP has made it clear that their loyalty is to their power and their party, not our people. Peter, as the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina, I will fight to restore the full promise of the Voting Rights Act and defend every American’s right to have an equal voice in our democracy. It is a foundational promise that America must uphold. Thank you, Roy Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = | = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| | Friend, As expected, the media's been in full-on attack mode. _So I 'm going to cut through the media's noise and give you the cold hard facts about President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill (BBB)._ _First off, the BBB introduces a NEW deduction for seniors: $6,000 EXTRA for single filers and $12,000 for married couples._ That means **_88% of seniors_** who receive Social Security benefits will now see _NO TAX_ on Social Security. The BBB also creates a new, tax-advantaged investment account prefunded with $1,000 for each child born from the beginning of 2025 through the end of 2028._ _ _I was proud to lead the original bill in the Senate._ **And speaking of the next generation of Americans** , the BBB also introduces the first-ever federal school choice program to empower parents over left-wing bureaucratic teachers. _But, Friend - President Trump and our Senate Majority are only getting started. We're just six months into our new unified Republican government._ **_That 's why I want to hear YOUR top priorities for the second half of 2025 to ensure your elected officials keep working for clean_body: What do you want our next big win to be? What do you want our next big win to be? | | | | | Friend, As expected, the media's been in full-on attack mode. So I 'm going to cut through the media's noise and give you the cold hard facts about President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill (BBB). First off, the BBB introduces a NEW deduction for seniors: $6,000 EXTRA for single filers and $12,000 for married couples. That means 88% of seniors who receive Social Security benefits will now see NO TAX on Social Security. The BBB also creates a new, tax-advantaged investment account prefunded with $1,000 for each child born from the beginning of 2025 through the end of 2028. I was proud to lead the original bill in the Senate. And speaking of the next generation of Americans , the BBB also introduces the first-ever federal school choice program to empower parents over left-wing bureaucratic teachers. But, Friend - President Trump and our Senate Majority are only getting started. We're just six months into our new unified Republican government. That 's why I want to hear YOUR top priorities for the second half of 2025 to ensure your elected officials keep working for YOU. [[TAKE THE SURVEY]]( Thank you, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | |

subject: This is not education.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
They call it an “America First” test for teachers.
What it really is? A MAGA loyalty oath.
🚨Oklahoma’s Republican leadership just announced that any teacher moving from a blue state will have to pass an “America First” certification exam — developed with help from far-right propaganda factory PragerU .🚨
This isn’t about teaching history. It’s about rewriting it.
It’s about driving good educators out of the classroom and replacing them with people who will parrot Trump’s agenda instead of preparing our kids for the future.
And if you think this stops in Oklahoma, you’re wrong. These culture-war stunts spread fast.
I’m running for Congress because our classrooms should be places of learning, not political indoctrination. Kids deserve teachers, not MAGA gatekeepers with a Bible quiz and a Trump bumper sticker.
If you’re with me, I need you to fight back:
👉 Chip in now and help us stop this before it spreads. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

They want to control what our kids learn. We’re going to make sure they fail.
Let’s shut this down before it starts.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin
Texas’s 18th Congressional District

name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: that place that no longer accepts cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hi, Derek – Team Fetterman here.
Look – we get it. Tapping your phone or card to pay is easy. No one’s mad about that.
But here’s the deal:
👉 Not everyone has a bank account.
👉 Not everyone wants one.
👉 And no one should be forced to use one just to buy milk.
That’s why John introduced the **Payment Choice Act.**
It says: **If you’re doing business in America, you take American cash. Period.**
Cash is legal tender. You earn it, you spend it.
No brick-and-mortar business should be allowed to turn you away for using it. 🤷
We've been seeing some “card only” signs in storefront windows, so we want to hear from you. **[Will you take 10 seconds to be one of the 5,000 responses we need?>>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51511?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk199-su-fl&t=1&akid=10241%2E434096%2E2znQVM)**
**Should businesses have to take cash?**
| | | [YES](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51512?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&%3Bzip=18326&%3Bcode=jtk199-su-fl&t=2&akid=10241%2E434096%2E2znQVM)
---
| [NO](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51512?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&%3Bzip=18326&%3Bcode=jtk199-su-fl&t=3&akid=10241%2E434096%2E2znQVM)
---
Thanks for sharing what you think,
Team Fetterman 💛
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk199-su-fl-footer&t=4&refcode2=10241_434096_2znQVM&akid=10241%2E434096%2E2znQVM)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: The Democrats' war chest is after NC. With your support, I can fight back.| | | | | Patriot, I’d like to introduce myself. My name is Michael Whatley. I’m a proven conservative leader and one of President Trump’s trusted allies, and I am running for U.S. Senate to represent the great state of North Carolina. The radical Democrats are waging war on this critical seat, and in just 24 hours of launching his campaign, former Governor Roy Cooper hauled in a massive $3.4 MILLION to try to flip it blue and dismantle President Trump’s America First legacy. We can’t let them win! | | | | Roy Cooper and his Washington elite allies are pushing their radical agenda onto the great people of North Carolina. OPEN BORDERS, SKYROCKETING TAXES, AND ATTACKS ON OUR CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS. | | | | President Trump knows I’m the fighter to hold this Senate seat and keep his America First movement strong. To win, we must surpass Cooper’s $3.4 million haul and prove that North Carolina is . ? This race is a battle for America’s future, and the Democrats are dumping millions to buy it. . Let’s show Roy Cooper and his liberal donors we won’t back down. Together, we’ll keep this seat red and fight for the country President Trump loves. For America First, | | | | Michael Whatley Republican Candidate for US Senate Proudly Endorsed by President Donald J. Peter, Republicans have unveiled their proposed redraw of the Texas congressional map, and it’s as outrageous as you’d expect. There’s no other way to put it. This is a blatant power grab — [**and we must do everything possible to stop it.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112869166/561884570/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXSpecial_email_20250806-NDRC-Tier1-TXSpecial_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250806-NDRC-Tier1-TXSpecial_&utm_campaign=TXSpecial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1NmQ2ZTRkLTFkNzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YC2a9XvQL3RJTQqyrV_VM5BAtXi1vUbYSo4GLcVRKjE=) **According to NPR, the new map could help Republicans achieve Donald Trump’s explicit goal of picking up five seats ahead of the 2026 midterms.** And it does so by manipulating district lines to dilute the voting power of communities of color. [**Republicans are racing to ram through this extreme gerrymander in Texas — we’re running out of time to mobilize a powerful opposition to stop them. Donate now to fight for fair maps in Texas and in other state redistricting battles.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112869167/561884571/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXSpecial_email_20250806-NDRC-Tier1-TXSpecial_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250806-NDRC-Tier1-TXSpecial_&utm_campaign=TXSpecial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1NmQ2ZTRkLTFkNzMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YC2a9XvQL3RJTQqyrV_VM5BAtXi1vUbYSo4GLcVRKjE=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Republicans’ proposed Texas map carefully shuffled Latino voters in and out of districts to create the illusion of gain. While they added a new majority Latino seat, the number of seats statewide in which Latino communities can elect a candidate of their choice actually _decreased._
The map redraws key districts from the Rio Grande Valley to Dallas to Houston. And it could force two popular Democratic incumbents in central Texas to run against one another.
It’s clear that Republicans in Texas are determined to follow the demands of Donald Trump and use this “highly unusual plan” — as described by _The Hill_ — to further strengthen their grip on power in Texas and in Congress.
[**Your contribution right now will help make sure we can keep fighting for fair representation in Texas and wherever gerrymandering poses a threat to fair maps. clean_body: The work we do in the next few months will determine whether democracy survives for years and decades to come. | Peter, Republicans have unveiled their proposed redraw of the Texas congressional map, and it’s as outrageous as you’d expect. There’s no other way to put it. This is a blatant power grab — = According to NPR, the new map could help Republicans achieve Donald Trump’s explicit goal of picking up five seats ahead of the 2026 midterms. And it does so by manipulating district lines to dilute the voting power of communities of color. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Republicans’ proposed Texas map carefully shuffled Latino voters in and out of districts to create the illusion of gain. While they added a new majority Latino seat, the number of seats statewide in which Latino communities can elect a candidate of their choice actually decreased. The map redraws key districts from the Rio Grande Valley to Dallas to Houston. And it could force two popular Democratic incumbents in central Texas to run against one another. It’s clear that Republicans in Texas are determined to follow the demands of Donald Trump and use this “highly unusual plan” — as described by The Hill — to further strengthen their grip on power in Texas and in Congress. = We’ll have more updates from Texas in the days ahead, NDRC Texas Watch = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Jay Jones
subject: I wasn’t going to email again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Folks, Jay Jones here.
I wasn’t going to reach out to you again today, but this news came across my desk: Republicans just dumped a seven-figure investment to support my opponent, Jason Miyares.
I’ve told you that Miyares and national Republicans were getting nervous. I’ve told you that this race wasn’t going to be a walk in the park. And now, I’m telling you that we need to respond – fast.
I’m being blunt because there’s so much on the line in this fight. Please, will you rush as much as you can spare so our campaign can respond to this massive investment from the GOP with the full force of our grassroots movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
HELP OUR CAMPAIGN RESPOND → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
The simple truth of this race is that Virginians can’t afford another four years of Jason Miyares as their Attorney General.
Donald Trump has threatened funding for our schools, gone after reproductive rights, and turned his back on voting rights. All the while, Miyares has sat there with his hands folded, and his silence speaks volumes.
Look, Trump knows that Miyares is his last best shot at holding onto power in Virginia. It’s why they’re fighting so hard to defeat us, and it’s why they just dropped $1+ million to spread lies about our campaign.
We cannot take this massive investment lightly, so now it’s time to fight back.
Whether it’s $25 or $250 – the most you can spare today would go a long way in helping us win this race for Attorney General, and shutting Trump out of Virginia’s legal system. Can you take 90 seconds to make a contribution now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=25]

- Jay

clean_body: [] Folks, Jay Jones here. I wasn’t going to reach out to you again today, but this news came across my desk: Republicans just dumped a seven-figure investment to support my opponent, Jason Miyares. I’ve told you that Miyares and national Republicans were getting nervous. I’ve told you that this race wasn’t going to be a walk in the park. And now, I’m telling you that we need to respond – fast. I’m being blunt because there’s so much on the line in this fight. Please, will you rush as much as you can spare so our campaign can respond to this massive investment from the GOP with the full force of our grassroots movement? [] HELP OUR CAMPAIGN RESPOND → [] The simple truth of this race is that Virginians can’t afford another four years of Jason Miyares as their Attorney General. Donald Trump has threatened funding for our schools, gone after reproductive rights, and turned his back on voting rights. All the while, Miyares has sat there with his hands folded, and his silence speaks volumes. Look, Trump knows that Miyares is his last best shot at holding onto power in Virginia. It’s why they’re fighting so hard to defeat us, and it’s why they just dropped $1+ million to spread lies about our campaign. We cannot take this massive investment lightly, so now it’s time to fight back. Whether it’s $25 or $250 – the most you can spare today would go a long way in helping us win this race for Attorney General, and shutting Trump out of Virginia’s legal system. Can you take 90 seconds to make a contribution now? [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] DONATE $500 [] DONATE MORE [] Let's go win. - Jay Jay Jones for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Democrats.org
subject: How Trump’s trillion-dollar cuts to essential programs hurt working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, Donald Trump promised he’d bring costs down on Day One and deliver a “golden age” for America. Six months later, prices are up and job losses have skyrocketed — reaching levels not seen since the pandemic — as hiring slows to a near standstill. Working families are being robbed by Trump’s billionaire-first economic agenda. They're losing their jobs and worrying about how they’re going to afford food, electricity, and health care amid rising costs. Just look at Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” which makes massive cuts to critical programs like Medicaid and SNAP. All the while, the ultrawealthy get a trillion-dollar tax break. Here's how Trump's billionaire-first budget hurts working families:
1. Makes $911 billion in cuts to Medicaid, robbing 17 million Americans of health care, and putting over 300 rural hospitals at risk of closure.

2. Slashes SNAP funding by $186 billion, causing over 22 million American families to lose some or all of their food assistance.

3. Increases energy costs by hundreds of dollars, including by as much as 30%.

4. Puts nearly 2 million construction and 2 million clean energy manufacturing jobs at risk, while cuts to Medicaid and SNAP endanger another 1.2 million jobs.

**Democrats are fighting up and down the ballot for a future where working families aren’t struggling to make ends meet and we’re moving the country forward, not backwards.** [**If electing Democrats who will check Trump’s power and fight to create a more affordable future for everyone matters to you, we’re asking you to join our fight and chip in $3 today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250806_4196_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4196_22930333_-UN3Nt&akid=4196%2E22930333%2E-UN3Nt) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250806_4196_fr&refcode2=4196_22930333_-UN3Nt&akid=4196%2E22930333%2E-UN3Nt)**
